papers.title: A4: Microarchitecture-Aware LLC Management for Datacenter Servers with Emerging I/O Devices.
papers.abstract: In modern server CPUs, the Last-Level Cache (LLC) serves not only as a victim cache for higher-level private caches but also as a buffer for low-latency DMA transfers between CPU cores and I/O devices through Direct Cache Access (DCA). However, prior work has shown that high-bandwidth network-I/O devices can rapidly flood the LLC with packets, often causing significant contention with co-running workloads. One step further, this work explores hidden microarchitectural properties of the Intel Xeon CPUs, uncovering two previously unrecognized LLC contentions triggered by emerging high-bandwidth I/O devices. Specifically, (C1) DMA-written cache lines in LLC ways designated for DCA (referred to as DCA ways) are migrated to certain LLC ways (denoted as inclusive ways) when accessed by CPU cores, unexpectedly contending with non-I/O cache lines within the inclusive ways. In addition, (C2) high-bandwidth storage-I/O devices, which are increasingly common in datacenter servers, benefit little from DCA while contending with (latency-sensitive) network-I/O devices within DCA ways. To this end, we present A4 , a runtime LLC management framework designed to alleviate both (C1) and (C2) among diverse co-running workloads, using a hidden knob and other hardware features implemented in those CPUs. Additionally, we demonstrate that A4 can also alleviate other previously known network-I/O-driven LLC contentions. Overall, it improves the performance of latency-sensitive, high-priority workloads by 51% without notably compromising that of low-priority workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 在现代服务器 CPU 中，末级缓存 (LLC) 不仅充当高级私有缓存的受害者缓存，还充当通过直接缓存访问 (DCA) 在 CPU 内核和 I/O 设备之间进行低延迟 DMA 传输的缓冲区。然而，之前的研究表明，高带宽网络 I/O 设备可以使 LLC 快速充满数据包，通常会导致与共同运行的工作负载发生严重争用。更进一步，这项工作探索了英特尔至强 CPU 隐藏的微架构属性，揭示了由新兴高带宽 I/O 设备引发的两个先前未被识别的 LLC 争用。具体地，(C1)指定用于DCA的LLC路(称为DCA路)中的DMA写入的高速缓存线在被CPU核访问时迁移到某些LLC路(表示为包容路)，意外地与包容路内的非I/O高速缓存线竞争。此外，在数据中心服务器中越来越常见的 (C2) 高带宽存储 I/O 设备在与 DCA 方式内的（延迟敏感的）网络 I/O 设备竞争时，从 DCA 中获益甚少。为此，我们提出了 A4，这是一个运行时 LLC 管理框架，旨在使用隐藏旋钮和这些 CPU 中实现的其他硬件功能来减轻不同共同运行工作负载之间的 (C1) 和 (C2)。此外，我们证明 A4 还可以缓解其他先前已知的网络 I/O 驱动的 LLC 争用。总体而言，它将延迟敏感的高优先级工作负载的性能提高了 51%，而不会显着影响低优先级工作负载的性能。

papers.title: Accelerating Simulation of Quantum Circuits under Noise via Computational Reuse.
papers.abstract:
To realize the full potential of quantum computers, we must mitigate qubit errors by developing noise-aware algorithms, compilers, and architectures. Thus, simulating quantum programs on high-performance computing (HPC) systems with different noise models is a de facto tool researchers use. Unfortunately, noisy simulators iteratively execute a similar circuit for thousands of trials, thereby incurring significant performance overheads.

To address this, we propose a noisy simulation technique called Tree-Based Quantum Circuit Simulation (TQSim) 1 . TQSim exploits the reusability of intermediate results during the noisy simulation, reducing computation. TQSim dynamically partitions a circuit into several subcircuits. It then reuses the intermediate results from these subcircuits during computation. Compared to a noisy Qulacs-based baseline simulator, TQSim achieves a speedup of up to 3.89 × for noisy simulations. TQSim is designed to be efficient with multi-node setups while also maintaining tight fidelity bounds.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了充分发挥量子计算机的潜力，我们必须通过开发噪声感知算法、编译器和架构来减少量子位错误。因此，在具有不同噪声模型的高性能计算（HPC）系统上模拟量子程序是研究人员使用的事实上的工具。不幸的是，嘈杂的模拟器会迭代执行类似的电路进行数千次试验，从而导致显着的性能开销。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为基于树的量子电路模拟（TQSim）1的噪声模拟技术。 TQSim 在噪声模拟过程中利用了中间结果的可重用性，从而减少了计算量。 TQSim 动态地将电路划分为多个子电路。然后，它在计算期间重用这些子电路的中间结果。与基于 Qulacs 的噪声基线模拟器相比，TQSim 在噪声模拟方面实现了高达 3.89 倍的加速。 TQSim 旨在高效地进行多节点设置，同时保持严格的保真度范围。

papers.title: Adaptive CHERI Compartmentalization for Heterogeneous Accelerators.
papers.abstract:
Hardware accelerators offer high performance and energy efficiency for specific tasks compared to general-purpose processors. However, current hardware accelerator designs focus primarily on performance, overlooking security. This poses significant security risks due to potential memory safety violations that can affect the entire hardware system. Existing methods either rely on Input-Output Memory Management Units (IOMMUs) for memory isolation between memory pages, leading to vulnerabilities in intra-page memory accesses, or modify an accelerator architecture for specialized memory protection, which requires significant effort and cannot scale across multiple diverse applications.

In this paper, we propose a general method for fine-grained memory protection in heterogeneous systems without modifying accelerator architectures . We extend the Capability Hardware Enhanced RISC Instructions (CHERI) from CPUs to an adaptive hardware interface named CapChecker. The CapChecker imports capabilities from the CPU and guards memory accesses at the pointer level from CHERI-unaware accelerators as if they were CHERI-aware natively. Over a set of benchmarks on hardware accelerators in a heterogeneous system, our approach achieves fine-grained memory protection, with a 1.4% performance overhead compared to CHERI-unaware accelerators on average.
papers.abstract_zh:
与通用处理器相比，硬件加速器可为特定任务提供高性能和高能效。然而，当前的硬件加速器设计主要关注性能，忽视安全性。由于潜在的内存安全违规可能会影响整个硬件系统，因此这会带来重大的安全风险。现有方法要么依赖输入输出内存管理单元（IOMMU）在内存页面之间进行内存隔离，从而导致页内内存访问中的漏洞，要么修改加速器架构以实现专门的内存保护，这需要大量工作并且无法跨多个不同的应用程序进行扩展。

在本文中，我们提出了一种在不修改加速器架构的情况下在异构系统中进行细粒度内存保护的通用方法。我们将功能硬件增强型 RISC 指令 (CHERI) 从 CPU 扩展到名为 CapChecker 的自适应硬件接口。 CapChecker 从 CPU 导入功能，并保护不支持 CHERI 的加速器在指针级别的内存访问，就像它们本身支持 CHERI 一样。通过对异构系统中硬件加速器的一组基准测试，我们的方法实现了细粒度的内存保护，与 CHERI 不感知的加速器相比，平均性能开销为 1.4%。

papers.title: AiF: Accelerating On-Device LLM Inference Using In-Flash Processing.
papers.abstract: While large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance across diverse application domains, their substantial memory demands present challenges, especially on personal devices with limited DRAM capacity. Recent LLM inference engines have introduced SSD offloading for model parameters to reduce memory footprint. However, the highly memory-bound nature of on-device LLMs makes inference speed heavily dependent on read bandwidth, leading to significant performance degradation due to the limited bandwidth of SSDs. In this paper, we propose an in-flash processing solution for on-device LLM, called Accelerator-in-Flash (AiF), which integrates matrix-vector multiplication (GEMV) operations directly into flash chips. By enabling in-flash GEMV operations, AiF leverages the high internal bandwidth of flash chips without being constrained by the limited external bandwidth. Building on this core structure, AiF employs two novel flash read techniques that were specifically optimized for reading LLM parameters stored in flash memory. AiF achieves a 4x boost in internal read bandwidth during inference with minimal implementation overhead, thanks to its streamlined error correction process. Evaluations on eight real-world LLMs reveal that AiF provides a 14.6x throughput improvement compared to baseline SSD offloading schemes. Furthermore, AiF surpasses in-memory inference, delivering 1.4x higher throughput with a significantly reduced memory footprint.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然大型语言模型 (LLM) 在不同的应用领域中实现了卓越的性能，但其大量的内存需求带来了挑战，特别是在 DRAM 容量有限的个人设备上。最近的 LLM 推理引擎为模型参数引入了 SSD 卸载，以减少内存占用。然而，设备上 LLM 的高度内存限制性质使得推理速度严重依赖于读取带宽，从而导致由于 SSD 的有限带宽而导致性能显着下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于设备上 LLM 的闪存内处理解决方案，称为闪存加速器 (AiF)，它将矩阵向量乘法 (GEMV) 操作直接集成到闪存芯片中。通过启用闪存内 GEMV 操作，AiF 充分利用了闪存芯片的高内部带宽，而不受有限的外部带宽的限制。在此核心结构的基础上，AiF 采用了两种新颖的闪存读取技术，这些技术专门针对读取存储在闪存中的 LLM 参数进行了优化。得益于其简化的纠错流程，AiF 在推理期间以最小的实现开销实现了 4 倍的内部读取带宽提升。对 8 个真实世界的 LLM 的评估表明，与基准 SSD 卸载方案相比，AiF 的吞吐量提高了 14.6 倍。此外，AiF 超越了内存中推理，可将吞吐量提高 1.4 倍，同时显着减少内存占用。

papers.title: AIM: Software and Hardware Co-design for Architecture-level IR-drop Mitigation in High-performance PIM.
papers.abstract: SRAM Processing-in-Memory (PIM) has emerged as the most promising implementation for high-performance PIM, delivering superior computing density, energy efficiency, and computational precision. However, the pursuit of higher performance necessitates more complex circuit designs and increased operating frequencies, which exacerbate IR-drop issues. Severe IR-drop can significantly degrade chip performance and even threaten reliability. Conventional circuit-level IR-drop mitigation methods, such as back-end optimizations, are resource-intensive and often compromise power, performance, and area (PPA). To address these challenges, we propose AIM, comprehensive software and hardware co-design for architecture-level IR-drop mitigation in high-performance PIM. Initially, leveraging the bit-serial and in-situ dataflow processing properties of PIM, we introduce R tog and HR, which establish a direct correlation between PIM workloads and IR-drop. Building on this foundation, we propose LHR and WDS, enabling extensive exploration of architecture-level IR-drop mitigation while maintaining computational accuracy through software optimization. Subsequently, we develop IR-Booster, a dynamic adjustment mechanism that integrates software-level HR information with hardware-based IR-drop monitoring to adapt the V-f pairs of the PIM macro, achieving enhanced energy efficiency and performance. Finally, we propose the HR-aware task mapping method, bridging software and hardware designs to achieve optimal improvement. Post-layout simulation results on a 7nm 256-TOPS PIM chip demonstrate that AIM achieves up to 69.2% IR-drop mitigation, resulting in 2.29 × energy efficiency improvement and 1.152 × speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: SRAM 内存处理 (PIM) 已成为高性能 PIM 最有前途的实现，可提供卓越的计算密度、能源效率和计算精度。然而，追求更高的性能需要更复杂的电路设计和更高的工作频率，这会加剧 IR 压降问题。严重的 IR 压降会显着降低芯片性能，甚至威胁可靠性。传统的电路级 IR 压降缓解方法（例如后端优化）是资源密集型的，并且通常会影响功耗、性能和面积 (PPA)。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 AIM，即全面的软件和硬件协同设计，用于高性能 PIM 中的架构级 IR 压降缓解。首先，利用 PIM 的位串行和原位数据流处理特性，我们引入了 R tog 和 HR，它们在 PIM 工作负载和 IR-drop 之间建立了直接关联。在此基础上，我们提出了 LHR 和 WDS，从而能够对架构级 IR 压降缓解进行广泛探索，同时通过软件优化保持计算准确性。随后，我们开发了 IR-Booster，这是一种动态调整机制，将软件级 HR 信息与基于硬件的 IR-drop 监控相结合，以适应 PIM 宏的 V-f 对，从而提高能源效率和性能。最后，我们提出了人力资源感知的任务映射方法，桥接软件和硬件设计以实现最佳改进。 7nm 256-TOPS PIM 芯片上的布局后仿真结果表明，AIM 实现了高达 69.2% 的 IR 压降缓解，从而实现了 2.29 倍的能效提升和 1.152 倍的加速。

papers.title: AMALI: An Analytical Model for Accurately Modeling LLM Inference on Modern GPUs.
papers.abstract:
Large language model (LLM) inference applications are surging in recent years, which largely relies on modern GPUs. On the other hand, GPU analytical model is a commonly used tool for architects to precisely identify bottlenecks quickly with deep insights. However, existing GPU analytical models fall short of accurately modeling LLM inference applications on modern GPUs, because of unsuitable tensor core modeling, ignoring constant cache as well as instruction cache modeling and abstracting away important details for LLM inference applications.

To address this problem, we propose a novel analytical model dubbed AMALI to accurately model LLM inference on modern GPUs with three innovations. First, we develop an instruction modifier and throughput based tensor core model by accurately capturing the math pipe throttle stalls to enhance the architecture modeling for modern GPUs. Second, we propose analytical models for constant cache and instruction cache by developing micro-benchmarks to measure CUDA kernel launching latencies. This significantly improves AMALI’s accuracy compared to real GPU hardware. Finally, we design a multi-warp model by leveraging warp instruction number distribution to reflect LLM inference application characteristics.

We validate AMALI on an A100 GPU by using typical LLM inference applications. The results show that AMALI reduces the MAPE (mean absolute percentage error) from 127.56% to 23.59% compared to the state-of-the-art GCoM model. We further showcase that AMALI can be used to explore architecture design space by designing the tensor core capability of H100. The results show that AMALI accurately predicts the end-to-end performance improvements with the enhanced tensor core capability.
papers.abstract_zh:
近年来，大型语言模型（LLM）推理应用程序激增，这在很大程度上依赖于现代 GPU。另一方面，GPU分析模型是架构师常用的工具，可以通过深入的洞察快速准确地识别瓶颈。然而，现有的 GPU 分析模型无法在现代 GPU 上准确建模 LLM 推理应用，因为张量核心建模不合适，忽略了常量缓存和指令缓存建模，并抽象了 LLM 推理应用的重要细节。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 AMALI 的新型分析模型，通过三项创新在现代 GPU 上精确建模 LLM 推理。首先，我们通过准确捕获数学管道节流停顿来开发基于指令修改器和吞吐量的张量核心模型，以增强现代 GPU 的架构建模。其次，我们通过开发微基准来测量 CUDA 内核启动延迟，提出恒定缓存和指令缓存的分析模型。与真实的 GPU 硬件相比，这显着提高了 AMALI 的准确性。最后，我们利用warp指令数分布设计了多warp模型来反映LLM推理应用特征。

我们使用典型的 LLM 推理应用程序在 A100 GPU 上验证 AMALI。结果表明，与最先进的 GCoM 模型相比，AMALI 将 MAPE（平均绝对百分比误差）从 127.56% 降低到 23.59%。我们进一步展示了AMALI可以通过设计H100的张量核心能力来探索架构设计空间。结果表明，AMALI 准确预测了增强的张量核心能力带来的端到端性能提升。

papers.title: ANSMET: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search with Near-Memory Processing and Hybrid Early Termination.
papers.abstract: Approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) is a fundamental operation in modern vector databases to efficiently retrieve nearby vectors to a given query. On general-purpose computing platforms, ANNS is found not only to be highly memory-bound due to the large amount of high-dimensional vectors to access, but also exhibits very low utilization of the fetched data as many memory accesses and computations are wasted on not-so-nearby vectors. To alleviate these two inefficiencies, we propose a hardware-software co-design that integrates near-data processing architectures with a novel hybrid partial-dimension/bit early termination strategy. Distance calculation and comparison in ANNS are offloaded to the near-data processing units at the memory rank level. As a vector is being gradually fetched from memory, we conservatively estimate a lower bound of its distance to the query using the partially fetched data, e.g., a subset of dimensions and/or partial bits of each element. If this lower bound already exceeds a threshold, we could early terminate to avoid future unnecessary data accesses and computations. In the presence of such irregular early termination execution flow, we further optimize the data layouts within a single memory access and across multiple memory ranks in the system, and handle efficient coordination between the near-data units and the host processor that executes the rest of index traversal and result sorting. With all the above optimizations, our design demonstrates an average 5.26 × speedup of using near-data processing, and another 1.52 × from enabling hybrid early termination on top of it.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 是现代矢量数据库中的一项基本操作，可有效检索给定查询的附近矢量。在通用计算平台上，ANNS 不仅由于需要访问大量高维向量而受到内存的高度限制，而且由于许多内存访问和计算都浪费在不太邻近的向量上，因此所获取数据的利用率非常低。为了缓解这两种低效率问题，我们提出了一种硬件-软件协同设计，它将近数据处理架构与新颖的混合部分维度/位提前终止策略集成在一起。 ANNS 中的距离计算和比较被卸载到内存等级级别的近数据处理单元。当向量逐渐从内存中获取时，我们使用部分获取的数据（例如，每个元素的维度子集和/或部分位）保守地估计其与查询的距离的下限。如果这个下限已经超过阈值，我们可以提前终止以避免将来不必要的数据访问和计算。在存在这种不规则的提前终止执行流程的情况下，我们进一步优化了系统中单次内存访问和跨多个内存等级的数据布局，并处理近数据单元和执行其余索引遍历和结果排序的主机处理器之间的有效协调。通过上述所有优化，我们的设计展示了使用近数据处理的平均加速速度为 5.26 倍，而在其之上启用混合提前终止则另外加速了 1.52 倍。

papers.title: ANVIL: An In-Storage Accelerator for Name-Value Data Stores.
papers.abstract:
Name–value pairs (NVPs) are a widely-used abstraction to organize data in millions of applications. At a high level, an NVP associates a name (e.g., array index, key, hash) with each value in a collection of data. Specific NVP data store formats can vary widely, ranging from simple arrays/dictionaries and lookup tables to key–value stores and data mining workloads. Despite their importance, existing optimizations for NVPs are limited to only a single data store format, as the broad definition of NVPs allows for significant heterogeneity in encoding and implementation.

We propose ANVIL, the first end-to-end system that allows programmers to broadly accelerate most formats of NVPs. With a conventional solid-state drive (SSD), large-scale NVP lookups can saturate both external and internal SSD bandwidth, as every NVP in the data store needs to be sent back to the host CPU to check for a matching name. ANVIL makes use of in-storage processing to avoid reading out any data for names that do not match, by performing name match checks directly inside the SSD’s NAND flash chips. We demonstrate that ANVIL can substantially reduce disk I/O, reduce metadata overheads, and provide speedups of 4.0 ×, 25 ×, and 14.6% over a conventional SSD, for three different NVP workloads (database transactions, analytics, and graph processing).
papers.abstract_zh:
名称-值对 (NVP) 是一种广泛使用的抽象，用于组织数百万个应用程序中的数据。在高层，NVP 将名称（例如，数组索引、键、散列）与数据集合中的每个值相关联。特定的 NVP 数据存储格式可能有很大差异，从简单的数组/字典和查找表到键值存储和数据挖掘工作负载。尽管 NVP 很重要，但现有的优化仅限于单一数据存储格式，因为 NVP 的广泛定义允许编码和实现中存在显着的异质性。

我们提出了 ANVIL，这是第一个允许程序员广泛加速大多数格式 NVP 的端到端系统。使用传统的固态硬盘 (SSD)，大规模 NVP 查找可能会使外部和内部 SSD 带宽饱和，因为数据存储中的每个 NVP 都需要发送回主机 CPU 以检查匹配的名称。 ANVIL 通过直接在 SSD 的 NAND 闪存芯片内部执行名称匹配检查，利用存储内处理来避免读取任何名称不匹配的数据。我们证明，对于三种不同的 NVP 工作负载（数据库事务、分析和图形处理），ANVIL 可以大幅减少磁盘 I/O、减少元数据开销，并比传统 SSD 提供 4.0 ×、25 × 和 14.6% 的加速。

papers.title: AQB8: Energy-Efficient Ray Tracing Accelerator through Multi-Level Quantization.
papers.abstract: Ray tracing (RT) is a rendering technique that produces high-fidelity images by simulating how light physically interacts with objects in a scene. This realism comes at a high computational and memory cost, largely driven by the need to find numerous ray-object intersections. To accelerate this process, scenes are typically structured using bounding volume hierarchy (BVH) trees, where objects are grouped within bounding boxes to minimize the number of required intersection tests. Specialized hardware, known as RT accelerators, accelerates BVH processing to boost computational speed, yet memory traffic persists as a major bottleneck, largely due to the bandwidth consumed by standard 32-bit floating-point (FP32) bounding boxes. Consequently, previous work has aimed to reduce memory traffic by compressing these boxes into low-bit (e.g., 8-bit) representations. However, existing compression techniques typically require decompressing bounding boxes back to FP32 for intersection tests, thus failing to eliminate the computational burden and energy cost associated with complex FP32 arithmetic during BVH traversal. This work introduces AQB8 , an RT accelerator designed to operate on a quantized BVH tree constructed using a novel multi-level quantization technique. This approach enables RT to operate directly on low-bit integers using simpler, area-efficient hardware units, thereby drastically reducing the need for FP32 arithmetic during BVH traversal while mitigating overheads associated with reduced precision. As a result, across various scenes, AQB8 achieves a 70% reduction in DRAM accesses, a 49% reduction in energy consumption, a 27% hardware area reduction, and a 1.82x performance speedup over modern GPU RT accelerators. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/nycu-caslab/AQB8.
papers.abstract_zh: 光线追踪 (RT) 是一种渲染技术，通过模拟光线与场景中对象的物理交互方式来生成高保真图像。这种真实感的代价是很高的计算和内存成本，这主要是由于需要找到大量的射线与物体相交。为了加速这一过程，通常使用包围体层次结构 (BVH) 树来构造场景，其中对象在边界框中分组，以最大限度地减少所需的相交测试的数量。称为 RT 加速器的专用硬件可加速 BVH 处理以提高计算速度，但内存流量仍然是主要瓶颈，这主要是由于标准 32 位浮点 (FP32) 边界框消耗的带宽。因此，之前的工作旨在通过将这些框压缩为低位（例如 8 位）表示来减少内存流量。然而，现有的压缩技术通常需要将边界框解压回 FP32 进行相交测试，因此无法消除 BVH 遍历期间与复杂 FP32 算法相关的计算负担和能量成本。这项工作介绍了 AQB8，这是一种 RT 加速器，设计用于在使用新颖的多级量化技术构建的量化 BVH 树上运行。这种方法使 RT 能够使用更简单、节省空间的硬件单元直接对低位整数进行操作，从而大大减少 BVH 遍历期间对 FP32 算术的需求，同时减少与精度降低相关的开销。因此，在各种场景中，AQB8 与现代 GPU RT 加速器相比，实现了 DRAM 访问量减少 70%、能耗降低 49%、硬件面积减少 27%、性能加速 1.82 倍。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/nycu-caslab/AQB8 上公开获取。

papers.title: ARTERY: Fast Quantum Feedback using Branch Prediction.
papers.abstract: Quantum feedback makes the execution of dynamic quantum circuits possible and is widely used in quantum algorithms. However, due to the inherent computation and transmission cost, the latency of the quantum feedback becomes a considerable burden on the current quantum algorithm. The dynamic property of the feedback also makes the gates blocked until the feedback is finished. In this paper, we propose ARTERY, which uses branch prediction to support instruction pre-execution and speed up the feedback. ARTERY integrates historical statistics of branches and a real-time readout pulse analysis to predict the branch. With this idea, we build up a reconciled branch predictor that concatenates the historical statistics of branches and a real-time branch circuit speculation obtained from the readout-pulse trajectory predictor. We further explore the implementation of peripheral hardware for feedback, including a scalable inter-FPGA connection via the backplane, a feedback trigger mechanism for dynamic instruction timing, and an adaptive pulse sampling technique to maximize the hardware bandwidth. ARTERY accelerates quantum feedback process by 2.07 × compared to the state-of-the-art method, with over 90% prediction accuracy, achieving 1.24 × fidelity improvement.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子反馈使得动态量子电路的执行成为可能，并广泛应用于量子算法中。然而，由于固有的计算和传输成本，量子反馈的延迟成为当前量子算法的相当大的负担。反馈的动态特性也使得门被阻塞，直到反馈完成。在本文中，我们提出了ARTERY，它使用分支预测来支持指令预执行并加速反馈。 ARTERY 集成分支的历史统计和实时读出脉冲分析来预测分支。有了这个想法，我们建立了一个协调的分支预测器，它将分支的历史统计数据和从读出脉冲轨迹预测器获得的实时分支电路推测连接起来。我们进一步探索了用于反馈的外围硬件的实现，包括通过背板的可扩展的FPGA间连接、用于动态指令定时的反馈触发机制以及最大化硬件带宽的自适应脉冲采样技术。与最先进的方法相比，ARTERY 将量子反馈过程加速了 2.07 倍，预测精度超过 90%，保真度提高了 1.24 倍。

papers.title: ArtMem: Adaptive Migration in Reinforcement Learning-Enabled Tiered Memory.
papers.abstract: With the increasing memory demands of emerging applications, tiered memory has become a viable solution for reducing data center hardware costs. Given the low performance of the capacity tiers in tiered memory systems, optimizing memory management is crucial in improving overall system performance. This paper identifies three key limitations in existing tiered memory solutions. First, existing solutions often perform differently across different workloads, leading to suboptimal performance in some workloads. Second, they often fail to adjust migration strategies in response to low fast memory tier access rates, resulting in ineffective data placement. Third, they often miss the opportunity to dynamically tune the memory migration scope based on workload patterns, leading to unnecessary page migrations and under-utilization of tiered memory potential. This paper proposes ArtMem, a reinforcement learning (RL)-driven framework that dynamically manages tiered memory systems and adapts to workload evolution to address these limitations. ArtMem enables better placement of memory pages, enhancing system performance while reducing unnecessary migrations. Experimental evaluations show that ArtMem outperforms state-of-the-art tiering systems, achieving 35% - 172% performance improvements over diverse workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着新兴应用的内存需求不断增加，分层内存已成为降低数据中心硬件成本的可行解决方案。鉴于分层内存系统中容量层的性能较低，优化内存管理对于提高系统整体性能至关重要。本文指出了现有分层内存解决方案的三个关键限制。首先，现有解决方案在不同的工作负载中通常表现不同，导致某些工作负载的性能不佳。其次，他们经常无法调整迁移策略来应对低快速内存层访问速率，从而导致数据放置无效。第三，他们经常错过根据工作负载模式动态调整内存迁移范围的机会，导致不必要的页面迁移和分层内存潜力的利用不足。本文提出了 ArtMem，这是一种强化学习 (RL) 驱动的框架，可动态管理分层内存系统并适应工作负载演变以解决这些限制。 ArtMem 可以更好地放置内存页面，增强系统性能，同时减少不必要的迁移。实验评估表明，ArtMem 的性能优于最先进的分层系统，在不同的工作负载上实现了 35% - 172% 的性能提升。

papers.title: Assassyn: A Unified Abstraction for Architectural Simulation and Implementation.
papers.abstract:
The continuous growth of on-chip transistors driven by technology scaling urges architecture developers to design and implement novel architectures to effectively utilize the excessive on-chip resources. Due to the challenges of programming in register-transfer level (RTL) languages, performance modeling based on simulation is typically developed alongside hardware implementation, allowing the exploration of high-level design decisions before dealing with the error-prone, low-level RTL details. However, this approach also introduces new challenges in coordinating across multiple teams to align implementation details separate codebases.

In this paper, we address this issue by presenting Assassyn, a unified , high-level , and general-purpose programming framework for architectural simulation and implementation. By taking advantage of the concept of asynchronous event handling, a widely existing behavior in both hardware design and implementation and software engineering, a general-purpose , and high-level programming abstraction is proposed to mitigate the difficulties of RTL programming. Moreover, the unified programming interface naturally enables an accurate and faithful alignment between the simulation-based performance modeling and RTL implementation.

Our evaluation demonstrates that Assassyn’s high-level programming interface is sufficiently expressive to implement a wide range of architectures, from architectural components, and application-specific accelerators, to designs as complicated as out-of-order CPUs. All the generated simulators perfectly align with the generated RTL behavior, while achieving 2.2-8.1 × simulation speedup, and requiring 70% lines of code. The generated RTL achieves comparable perf/area compared to handcrafted RTL, and 6 × perf/area compared to high-level synthesis generated RTL code by introducing by mean 1.26 × lines of code overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
由技术扩展驱动的片上晶体管的持续增长促使架构开发人员设计和实现新颖的架构，以有效地利用过多的片上资源。由于使用寄存器传输级 (RTL) 语言进行编程的挑战，基于仿真的性能建模通常与硬件实现一起开发，从而允许在处理容易出错的低级 RTL 细节之前探索高级设计决策。然而，这种方法也带来了跨多个团队协调以协调不同代码库的实现细节的新挑战。

在本文中，我们通过提出 Assassyn 来解决这个问题，Assassyn 是一个用于架构模拟和实现的统一的、高级的、通用的编程框架。通过利用异步事件处理的概念（硬件设计和实现以及软件工程中广泛存在的行为），提出了一种通用的高级编程抽象来减轻 RTL 编程的困难。此外，统一的编程接口自然可以实现基于仿真的性能建模和 RTL 实现之间的准确和忠实的对齐。

我们的评估表明，Assassyn 的高级编程接口具有足够的表现力，可以实现各种架构，从架构组件和特定于应用程序的加速器，到像乱序 CPU 这样复杂的设计。所有生成的模拟器都与生成的 RTL 行为完美一致，同时实现 2.2-8.1 倍的模拟加速，并且需要 70% 的代码行。与手工制作的 RTL 相比，生成的 RTL 实现了可比的性能/面积，并且通过引入平均 1.26 × 行代码开销，与高级综合生成的 RTL 代码相比，实现了 6 × 性能/面积。

papers.title: ATiM: Autotuning Tensor Programs for Processing-in-DRAM.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-DRAM (DRAM-PIM) has emerged as a promising technology for accelerating memory-intensive operations in modern applications, such as Large Language Models (LLMs). Despite its potential, current software stacks for DRAM-PIM face significant challenges, including reliance on hand-tuned libraries that hinder programmability, limited support for high-level abstractions, and the lack of systematic optimization frameworks. To address these limitations, we present ATiM, a search-based optimizing tensor compiler for UPMEM. Key features of ATiM include: (1) automated searches of the joint search space for host and kernel tensor programs, (2) PIM-aware optimizations for efficiently handling boundary conditions, and (3) improved search algorithms for the expanded search space of UPMEM systems. Our experimental results on UPMEM hardware demonstrate performance gains of up to 6.18 × for various UPMEM benchmark kernels and 8.21 × for GPT-J layers. To the best of our knowledge, ATiM is the first tensor compiler to provide fully automated, autotuning-integrated code generation support for a DRAM-PIM system. By bridging the gap between high-level tensor computation abstractions and low-level hardware-specific requirements, ATiM establishes a foundation for advancing DRAM-PIM programmability and enabling streamlined optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: DRAM 中的处理 (DRAM-PIM) 已成为一种有前途的技术，可加速现代应用程序（例如大型语言模型 (LLM)）中的内存密集型操作。尽管具有潜力，但当前的 DRAM-PIM 软件堆栈面临着重大挑战，包括对阻碍可编程性的手动调整库的依赖、对高级抽象的支持有限以及缺乏系统优化框架。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 ATiM，一种用于 UPMEM 的基于搜索的优化张量编译器。 ATiM 的主要功能包括：(1) 自动搜索主机和内核张量程序的联合搜索空间，(2) 用于有效处理边界条件的 PIM 感知优化，以及 (3) 用于 UPMEM 系统扩展搜索空间的改进搜索算法。我们在 UPMEM 硬件上的实验结果表明，各种 UPMEM 基准内核的性能提升高达 6.18 倍，GPT-J 层的性能提升高达 8.21 倍。据我们所知，ATiM 是第一个为 DRAM-PIM 系统提供全自动、自动调整集成代码生成支持的张量编译器。通过弥合高级张量计算抽象和低级硬件特定要求之间的差距，ATiM 为推进 DRAM-PIM 可编程性和实现简化优化奠定了基础。

papers.title: Avalanche: Optimizing Cache Utilization via Matrix Reordering for Sparse Matrix Multiplication Accelerator.
papers.abstract: Sparse Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is essential in various scientific and engineering applications but poses significant challenges due to irregular memory access patterns. Many hardware accelerators have been proposed to accelerate SpMM. However, they have yet to focus on on-chip memory utilization. In this paper, we highlight the underutilization of the on-chip memory in the SpMM accelerators. Then we propose Avalanche , a novel hardware accelerator that optimally utilizes the on-chip memory to efficiently cache both matrices B and C . Avalanche incorporates three key techniques: Matrix Reordering (Mat-Reorder) , Dead-Product Early Eviction (DP-Evict) , and Reuse Distance-Aware Matrix Caching (RM-Caching) . Mat-Reorder enhances data locality by reordering the columns of matrix A , ensuring early completion of computations for matrix C . DP-Evict optimizes on-chip memory usage by promptly evicting fully computed (dead) products from on-chip memory. RM-Caching maximizes data reuse by caching frequently accessed elements of matrix B based on their reuse distance. Experimental results demonstrate that Avalanche achieves an average performance improvement of 1.97 × compared to the state-of-the-art SpMM accelerator, with a chip area of 6.15 mm 2
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 在各种科学和工程应用中至关重要，但由于不规则的内存访问模式而带来了重大挑战。已经提出了许多硬件加速器来加速 SpMM。然而，他们尚未关注片上内存的利用率。在本文中，我们强调 SpMM 加速器中片上存储器的利用不足。然后我们提出 Avalanche，一种新颖的硬件加速器，它可以最佳地利用片上内存来有效地缓存矩阵 B 和 C 。 Avalanche 融合了三种关键技术：矩阵重新排序 (Mat-Reorder)、死产品早期驱逐 (DP-Evict) 和重用距离感知矩阵缓存 (RM-Caching)。 Mat-Reorder 通过对矩阵 A 的列重新排序来增强数据局部性，确保矩阵 C 的计算尽早完成。 DP-Evict 通过立即从片上存储器中逐出完全计算的（死）产品来优化片上存储器的使用。 RM-Caching 通过根据重用距离缓存矩阵 B 中经常访问的元素，最大化数据重用。实验结果表明，与最先进的SpMM加速器相比，Avalanche的平均性能提升了1.97倍，芯片面积为6.15 mm 2

papers.title: Avant-Garde: Empowering GPUs with Scaled Numeric Formats.
papers.abstract: The escalating computational and memory demands of deep neural networks have outpaced chip density improvements, making arithmetic density a key bottleneck for GPUs. Scaled numeric formats, such as FP8 and Microscaling (MX), improve arithmetic density by applying adaptive scaling factors across varying block sizes and multiple scaling hierarchies. Unfortunately, supporting diverse scaled numeric formats often requires GPUs to rely on software-based implementations, increasing instruction and register overhead and degrading performance. We propose Avant-Garde, a GPU microarchitecture that natively supports diverse scaled numeric formats by converting them into a consistent single-level internal representation. Avant-Garde integrates an Operand Transformer, a hardware module that dynamically flattens multi-level scaling formats into single-level internal representations, a novel Tensor Core, and an optimized data layout to eliminate instruction and register overhead. Our evaluations show that Avant-Garde achieves up to 74% higher throughput and 44% lower execution time, while maintaining accuracy within 0.2% compared to conventional GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络不断增长的计算和内存需求已经超过了芯片密度的提高，使得算术密度成为 GPU 的关键瓶颈。缩放数字格式（例如 FP8 和微缩放 (MX)）通过在不同的块大小和多个缩放层次结构中应用自适应缩放因子来提高算术密度。不幸的是，支持多种缩放数字格式通常需要 GPU 依赖基于软件的实现，从而增加指令和寄存器开销并降低性能。我们提出了 Avant-Garde，这是一种 GPU 微架构，它通过将不同的缩放数字格式转换为一致的单级内部表示来原生支持它们。 Avant-Garde 集成了操作数转换器、动态地将多级缩放格式扁平化为单级内部表示的硬件模块、新颖的 Tensor Core 以及优化的数据布局，以消除指令和寄存器开销。我们的评估表明，与传统 GPU 相比，Avant-Garde 的吞吐量提高了 74%，执行时间缩短了 44%，同时精度保持在 0.2% 以内。

papers.title: BingoGCN: Towards Scalable and Efficient GNN Acceleration with Fine-Grained Partitioning and SLT.
papers.abstract:
Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are increasingly popular due to their wide applicability to tasks requiring the understanding of unstructured graph data, such as those in social network analysis and autonomous driving. However, real-time, large-scale GNN inference faces challenges due to the large size of node features and adjacency matrices, leading to memory communication and buffer size overheads caused by irregular memory access patterns. While graph partitioning can help with localized access patterns and reduction in on-chip buffer size, fine-grained partitioning results in increased inter-partition edges and off-chip memory accesses, negatively impacting overall performance.

To overcome these limitations, we propose BingoGCN, a scalable GNN acceleration framework that introduces multidimensional dynamic feature summarization called Cross-Partition Message Quantization (CMQ) for inter-partition message passing. This eliminates irregular off-chip memory access without additional training and accuracy loss, even with fine-grained partitioning. By shifting the bottleneck from memory to computation, BingoGCN allows for further performance optimization through the Strong Lottery Ticket (SLT) theory using randomly generated weights. BingoGCN addresses the challenge of SLT’s unstructured sparsity in hardware acceleration with a novel training algorithm and random weight generator designs, enabling fine-grained (FG) sparsity and improved load balancing. We integrated CMQ and FG-SLT into the message-passing of GNNs and designed an efficient hardware architecture to support this flow. Our FPGA-based implementation achieves a significant reduction in memory accesses while preserving accuracy comparable to the original models.
papers.abstract_zh:
图神经网络 (GNN) 因其广泛适用于需要理解非结构化图数据的任务（例如社交网络分析和自动驾驶中的任务）而越来越受欢迎。然而，由于节点特征和邻接矩阵的尺寸较大，实时、大规模的 GNN 推理面临着挑战，导致不规则的内存访问模式引起的内存通信和缓冲区大小开销。虽然图分区有助于实现本地化访问模式并减少片上缓冲区大小，但细粒度分区会导致分区间边缘和片外内存访问增加，从而对整体性能产生负面影响。

为了克服这些限制，我们提出了 BingoGCN，这是一种可扩展的 GNN 加速框架，它引入了称为跨分区消息量化（CMQ）的多维动态特征汇总，用于分区间消息传递。这消除了不规则的片外存储器访问，无需额外的训练和准确性损失，即使采用细粒度分区也是如此。通过将瓶颈从内存转移到计算，BingoGCN 允许使用随机生成的权重通过强彩票 (SLT) 理论进一步优化性能。 BingoGCN 通过新颖的训练算法和随机权重生成器设计解决了硬件加速中 SLT 非结构化稀疏性的挑战，实现了细粒度 (FG) 稀疏性并改进了负载平衡。我们将 CMQ 和 FG-SLT 集成到 GNN 的消息传递中，并设计了一个高效的硬件架构来支持该流程。我们基于 FPGA 的实现显着减少了内存访问，同时保持了与原始模型相当的精度。

papers.title: Bishop: Sparsified Bundling Spiking Transformers on Heterogeneous Cores with Error-constrained Pruning.
papers.abstract: Spiking neural networks(SNNs) have emerged as a promising solution for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices and neuromorphic hardware due to their low power consumption. Spiking transformers, which integrate attention mechanisms similar to those found in artificial neural networks (ANNs), have recently exhibited impressive performance. However, these models are large in size and involve high-volume computation in both time and space, posing significant challenges for efficient hardware acceleration. We present Bishop , the first dedicated hardware accelerator architecture and HW/SW co-design framework for spiking transformers that optimally represents, manages, and processes spike-based workloads while exploring spatiotemporal sparsity and data reuse. Specifically, we introduce the concept of Token-Time Bundle (TTB), a container that bundles spiking data of a set of tokens over multiple time points. Our heterogeneous accelerator architecture Bishop concurrently processes workload packed in TTBs and explores intra- and inter-bundle multiple-bit weight reuse to significantly reduce memory access. Bishop utilizes a stratifier, a dense core array, and a sparse core array to process MLP blocks and projection layers. The stratifier routes high-density spiking activation workload to the dense core and low-density counterpart to the sparse core, ensuring optimized processing tailored to the given spatiotemporal sparsity level. To further reduce data access and computation, we introduce a novel Bundle Sparsity-Aware (BSA) training pipeline that enhances not only the overall but also structured TTB-level firing sparsity. Moreover, the processing efficiency of self-attention layers is boosted by the proposed Error-Constrained TTB Pruning ( ECP ), which trims activities in spiking queries, keys, and values both before and after the computation of spiking attention maps with a well-defined error bound. Finally, we design a reconfigurable TTB spiking attention core to efficiently compute spiking attention maps by executing highly simplified “AND” and “Accumulate” operations. On average, Bishop achieves a 5.91 × speedup and 6.11 × improvement in energy efficiency over previous SNN accelerators, while delivering higher accuracy across multiple datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于功耗低，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 已成为部署在资源受限的边缘设备和神经形态硬件上的一种有前景的解决方案。尖峰变压器集成了类似于人工神经网络（ANN）中的注意力机制，最近表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，这些模型体积庞大，涉及时间和空间上的大量计算，对高效的硬件加速提出了重大挑战。我们推出了 Bishop，这是第一个用于尖峰变压器的专用硬件加速器架构和硬件/软件协同设计框架，它可以最佳地表示、管理和处理基于尖峰的工作负载，同时探索时空稀疏性和数据重用。具体来说，我们引入了令牌时间捆绑（TTB）的概念，这是一个捆绑多个时间点上一组令牌的尖峰数据的容器。我们的异构加速器架构 Bishop 同时处理 TTB 中打包的工作负载，并探索捆绑内和捆绑间的多位权重重用，以显着减少内存访问。 Bishop 利用分层器、密集核心阵列和稀疏核心阵列来处理 MLP 块和投影层。分层器将高密度尖峰激活工作负载路由到致密核心，将低密度对应的激活工作负载路由到稀疏核心，确保根据给定的时空稀疏水平定制优化处理。为了进一步减少数据访问和计算，我们引入了一种新颖的 Bundle Sparsity-Aware (BSA) 训练管道，它不仅增强了整体，而且还增强了结构化的 TTB 级发射稀疏性。此外，提出的误差约束 TTB 修剪（ ECP ）提高了自注意力层的处理效率，该修剪在计算具有明确定义的误差范围的尖峰注意力图之前和之后修剪尖峰查询、键和值的活动。最后，我们设计了一个可重新配置的 TTB 尖峰注意力核心，通过执行高度简化的“AND”和“Accumulate”操作来有效计算尖峰注意力图。平均而言，与之前的 SNN 加速器相比，Bishop 实现了 5.91 倍的加速和 6.11 倍的能源效率改进，同时在多个数据集上提供了更高的准确性。

papers.title: CaliQEC: In-situ Qubit Calibration for Surface Code Quantum Error Correction.
papers.abstract: Quantum Error Correction (QEC) is essential for fault-tolerant, large-scale quantum computation. However, error drift in qubits undermines QEC performance during long computations, necessitating frequent calibration. Conventional calibration methods disrupt quantum states, requiring system downtime and rendering in situ calibration impractical. To address this challenge, we propose QECali, a novel framework that enables in situ calibration for surface codes. Our evaluation demonstrates that QECali introduces modest qubit overhead and negligible increases in execution time, offering the first practical solution for in situ calibration in surface code based quantum computation.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子纠错（QEC）对于容错、大规模量子计算至关重要。然而，量子位的误差漂移会在长时间计算过程中损害 QEC 性能，因此需要频繁校准。传统的校准方法会破坏量子态，需要系统停机并且导致原位校准不切实际。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 QECali，这是一种能够对表面代码进行原位校准的新颖框架。我们的评估表明，QECali 引入了适度的量子位开销，并且执行时间的增加可以忽略不计，为基于表面代码的量子计算中的原位校准提供了第一个实用的解决方案。

papers.title: Cambricon-SR: An Accelerator for Neural Scene Representation with Sparse Encoding Table.
papers.abstract:
Neural Scene Representation (NSR) is a promising technique for representing real scenes. By learning from dozens of 2D photos captured from different viewpoints, NSR computes the 3D representation of real scenes. However, the performance of NSR processing running on GPU is insufficient for applications. Cambricon-R achieves high performance of more than 60 scenes per second, but at the cost of modeling quality.

In this paper, we propose Cambricon-SR, an algorithm-hardware co-designed accelerator to improve NSR performance and quality. First, we propose a novel NSR algorithm with sparse encoding table, it achieves more than 80% of sparsity for the encoding table with negligible accuracy loss. Second, to efficiently eliminate the invalid memory access requests to the pruned entries, we propose the sparse index unit based on sequential SRAM access to address the challenge of irregular memory access to the sparse structure bitmap. It achieves a throughput increase of 7.54 × for the encoding stage with an additional area overhead of 8.59%. Third, we propose the dynamic shared buffer for the MLP units to reduce the buffer usage by 85.3% so that we can increase the number of the MLP units.

We conduct experimental evaluations on 8 typical scenes. The results demonstrate that, compared with A100 GPU and Cambricon-R, Cambricon-SR achieves 1259 × and 4.12 × speedup, and reduces the energy consumption by 1139 × and 2.98 × for each training iteration of NSR, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
神经场景表示（NSR）是一种很有前途的表示真实场景的技术。通过学习从不同角度拍摄的数十张 2D 照片，NSR 计算真实场景的 3D 表示。然而，运行在GPU上的NSR处理性能对于应用程序来说是不够的。 Cambricon-R实现了每秒超过60个场景的高性能，但代价是建模质量。

在本文中，我们提出了 Cambricon-SR，一种算法-硬件联合设计的加速器，用于提高 NSR 性能和质量。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的具有稀疏编码表的 NSR 算法，它实现了编码表超过 80% 的稀疏性，并且精度损失可以忽略不计。其次，为了有效消除对修剪条目的无效内存访问请求，我们提出了基于顺序SRAM访问的稀疏索引单元，以解决对稀疏结构位图的不规则内存访问的挑战。编码阶段的吞吐量提高了 7.54 倍，额外区域开销增加了 8.59%。第三，我们提出了 MLP 单元的动态共享缓冲区，以减少 85.3% 的缓冲区使用量，以便我们可以增加 MLP 单元的数量。

我们对8个典型场景进行了实验评估。结果表明，与A100 GPU和Cambricon-R相比，Cambricon-SR的加速比分别为1259×和4.12×，NSR每次训练迭代的能耗分别降低了1139×和2.98×。

papers.title: Caravan: A Hardware/Software Co-Design for Efficient SIMD Neighbor Search on Point Clouds.
papers.abstract: Neighbor search is the backbone task for point cloud processing, which is widely employed in current 3D computer vision applications. To be efficient, neighbor search relies on spatial data structures such as k-d trees, to prune the search space. We found that consecutive neighbor search queries in point cloud processing are often similar, visiting k-d tree nodes with considerable resemblance. In this work, we show how to leverage this observation to effectively exploit the available CPU Vector Processing Unit (VPU) to cheaply speed up neighbor search . We devise our solution with a hardware/software co-design called Caravan. At the software level, Caravan-SW exploits this search similarity, gathering consecutive queries to search for their neighbors in parallel with SIMD instructions. Yet, when the navigation of queries diverges, particularly in the deeper levels of the k-d tree, Caravan-SW faces sparsity and VPU lanes are underutilized. We tackle this with Caravan-HW, adding two new instructions that re-index valid vector elements and allow fast operand shuffling and dense SIMD operations to take place, suppressing the hard-to-predict runtime sparsity of Caravan-SW. With AVX512, Caravan-SW speeds up neighbor search by 4.05 × (1.85 × end-to-end) during point cloud segmentation in a commodity CPU. With the additional Caravan-HW support, the leaf processing part of neighbor search can be further optimized, boosting speed up to 5.19 × (1.97 × end-to-end), with minimal area costs of 0.032 mm². Our programmable and minimally intrusive solution has end-to-end benefits comparable to accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 邻域搜索是点云处理的骨干任务，广泛应用于当前的 3D 计算机视觉应用中。为了提高效率，邻居搜索依赖于空间数据结构（例如 k-d 树）来修剪搜索空间。我们发现点云处理中的连续邻居搜索查询通常是相似的，访问的 k-d 树节点具有相当大的相似性。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何利用这一观察结果来有效地利用可用的 CPU 矢量处理单元 (VPU)，以低廉的成本加速邻居搜索。我们通过称为 Caravan 的硬件/软件协同设计来设计我们的解决方案。在软件级别，Caravan-SW 利用这种搜索相似性，收集连续查询以与 SIMD 指令并行搜索其邻居。然而，当查询导航出现分歧时，特别是在 k-d 树的更深层次中，Caravan-SW 面临稀疏性，并且 VPU 通道未得到充分利用。我们通过 Caravan-HW 解决了这个问题，添加了两条新指令，重新索引有效向量元素，并允许进行快速操作数改组和密集 SIMD 操作，从而抑制 Caravan-SW 难以预测的运行时稀疏性。借助 AVX512，Caravan-SW 在商用 CPU 中的点云分割期间将邻居搜索速度提高了 4.05 ×（1.85 × 端到端）。借助额外的 Caravan-HW 支持，邻居搜索的叶处理部分可以进一步优化，将速度提高至 5.19 ×（1.97 × 端到端），且面积成本最小为 0.032 mm²。我们的可编程且侵入性极低的解决方案具有与加速器相当的端到端优势。

papers.title: Cassandra: Efficient Enforcement of Sequential Execution for Cryptographic Programs.
papers.abstract:
Constant-time programming is a widely deployed approach to harden cryptographic programs against side channel attacks. However, modern processors often violate the underlying assumptions of standard constant-time policies by transiently executing unintended paths of the program. Despite many solutions proposed, addressing control flow misspeculations in an efficient way without losing performance is an open problem.

In this work, we propose Cassandra , a novel hardware/software mechanism to enforce sequential execution for constant-time cryptographic code in a highly efficient manner. Cassandra explores the radical design point of disabling the branch predictor and recording-and-replaying sequential control flow of the program. Two key insights that enable our design are that (1) the sequential control flow of a constant-time program is mostly static over different runs, and (2) cryptographic programs are loop-intensive and their control flow patterns repeat in a highly compressible way. These insights allow us to perform an upfront branch analysis that significantly compresses control flow traces. We add a small component to a typical processor design, the Branch Trace Unit , to store compressed traces and determine fetch redirections according to the sequential model of the program. Despite providing a strong security guarantee, Cassandra counterintuitively provides an average \(1.85\%\) speedup compared to an unsafe baseline processor, mainly due to enforcing near-perfect fetch redirections.
papers.abstract_zh:
恒定时间编程是一种广泛部署的方法，用于强化加密程序以抵御侧信道攻击。然而，现代处理器经常通过瞬时执行程序的非预期路径来违反标准恒定时间策略的基本假设。尽管提出了许多解决方案，但在不损失性能的情况下以有效的方式解决控制流错误推测仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 Cassandra，一种新颖的硬件/软件机制，以高效的方式强制执行恒定时间加密代码的顺序执行。 Cassandra 探索了禁用分支预测器以及记录和重放程序顺序控制流的根本设计点。支持我们设计的两个关键见解是：(1) 恒定时间程序的顺序控制流在不同的运行中大部分是静态的，(2) 加密程序是循环密集型的，它们的控制流模式以高度可压缩的方式重复。这些见解使我们能够执行前期分支分析，从而显着压缩控制流跟踪。我们在典型的处理器设计中添加了一个小组件，即分支跟踪单元，用于存储压缩跟踪并根据程序的顺序模型确定获取重定向。尽管提供了强大的安全保证，但与不安全的基线处理器相比，Cassandra 与直觉相反地提供了平均 \(1.85\%\) 加速，这主要是由于强制执行近乎完美的获取重定向。

papers.title: Chimera: Communication Fusion for Hybrid Parallelism in Large Language Models.
papers.abstract:
Large Language Models (LLMs), exemplified by ChatGPT, have emerged as a predominant workload in current machine learning systems. To achieve efficient training and inference within the constraints of limited single-NPU memory capacity, deploying LLMs on multi-NPU systems typically adopt a hybrid approach that combines various parallelism patterns. This hybrid parallelism within LLMs introduces a significant amount of diverse collective communications. However, these frequent blocking communications impose a substantial burden on the multi-NPU systems. Overcoming the communication bottleneck is crucial to unlocking the potential of multi-NPU systems for efficient and scalable LLM processing.

This paper introduces Chimera, a communication fusion mechanism for hybrid parallelism in LLMs. We comprehensively analyze the communication processes of each LLM parallelism pattern, identify the communication redundancy in hybrid parallelism and eliminate redundancy by fusing adjacent communication operators during parallelism transformation. By reordering operations and generating redundancy-free communication operator, Chimera effectively mitigates communication bottleneck in hybrid LLM parallelism. Our results show that Chimera achieves 1.23-7.06 × network bandwidth speedup. Additionally, the end-to-end performance of LLM forward pass and backward pass on different typical multi-NPU systems achieves respective 1.32-1.58 × and 1.16-1.36 × speedups on average compared with those without communication fusion.
papers.abstract_zh:
以 ChatGPT 为代表的大型语言模型 (LLM) 已成为当前机器学习系统中的主要工作负载。为了在有限的单 NPU 内存容量的限制下实现高效的训练和推理，在多 NPU 系统上部署 LLM 通常采用结合各种并行模式的混合方法。法学硕士内的这种混合并行引入了大量不同的集体通信。然而，这些频繁的阻塞通信给多 NPU 系统带来了巨大的负担。克服通信瓶颈对于释放多 NPU 系统实现高效且可扩展的 LLM 处理的潜力至关重要。

本文介绍了 Chimera，一种用于法学硕士混合并行的通信融合机制。我们全面分析了每种LLM并行模式的通信过程，识别混合并行中的通信冗余，并在并行变换时通过融合相邻通信算子来消除冗余。通过对操作重新排序并生成无冗余通信算子，Chimera 有效缓解了混合 LLM 并行中的通信瓶颈。我们的结果表明 Chimera 实现了 1.23-7.06 × 网络带宽加速。此外，与没有通信融合的系统相比，LLM前向传递和后向传递在不同典型多NPU系统上的端到端性能平均分别实现了1.32-1.58×和1.16-1.36×加速。

papers.title: Chip Architectures Under Advanced Computing Sanctions✱.
papers.abstract:
The rise of large scale machine learning models has generated unprecedented requirements and demand on computing hardware to enable these trillion parameter models. However, the importance of these bleeding-edge chips to the global economy, technological advancement, and strategic national interests have made them targets of sanctions. Recent advanced computing sanctions set limits on a device’s Total Processing Performance, device bandwidth, and Performance Density and placed export controls on flagship data center and consumer products.

In this work, we present the first study on the architectural and economic externality implications of these advanced computing sanctions and their effects on large language model (LLM) inference. We identify which architectural parameters are limited under existing regulations, and perform thorough design space exploration of compliant designs. Optimized designs are able to improve LLM inference prefill performance by 4% and decoding performance by 27% compared to a restricted device baseline.

We then demonstrate how an architecture-first approach for computing policies allows chip designers and policymakers to craft efficient guidelines that achieve desired goals while minimizing negative externalities. We show how architectural features can unify marketing-based data center vs. non-data center regulations and how policies can be specified to create gaming-focused device architectures which are inherently limited in AI performance. Augmenting existing performance metrics with insightful architectural constraints better predict workload performance. Combined metrics achieved up to 42.4x narrower distributions compared to using theoretical compute performance alone, enable targeted and efficient policies.
papers.abstract_zh:
大规模机器学习模型的兴起对计算硬件产生了前所未有的要求和需求，以支持这些万亿参数模型。然而，这些尖端芯片对全球经济、技术进步和国家战略利益的重要性，使其成为制裁的目标。最近的高级计算制裁对设备的总处理性能、设备带宽​​和性能密度设置了限制，并对旗舰数据中心和消费产品实施了出口管制。

在这项工作中，我们首次研究了这些先进计算制裁的架构和经济外部性影响及其对大语言模型 (LLM) 推理的影响。我们确定哪些架构参数受到现有法规的限制，并对合规设计进行彻底的设计空间探索。与受限设备基准相比，优化设计能够将 LLM 推理预填充性能提高 4%，将解码性能提高 27%。

然后，我们演示计算策略的架构优先方法如何允许芯片设计者和政策制定者制定有效的指导方针，以实现预期目标，同时最大限度地减少负外部性。我们展示了架构功能如何统一基于营销的数据中心与非数据中心法规，以及如何指定策略来​​创建以游戏为中心的设备架构，这些架构本质上在人工智能性能方面受到限制。通过富有洞察力的架构约束来增强现有性能指标，可以更好地预测工作负载性能。与单独使用理论计算性能相比，组合指标可实现高达 42.4 倍的窄分布，从而实现有针对性的高效策略。

papers.title: Concorde: Fast and Accurate CPU Performance Modeling with Compositional Analytical-ML Fusion.
papers.abstract: Cycle-level simulators such as gem5 are widely used in microarchitecture design, but they are prohibitively slow for large-scale design space explorations. We present Concorde , a new methodology for learning fast and accurate performance models of microarchitectures. Unlike existing simulators and learning approaches that emulate each instruction, Concorde predicts the behavior of a program based on compact performance distributions that capture the impact of different microarchitectural components. It derives these performance distributions using simple analytical models that estimate bounds on performance induced by each microarchitectural component, providing a simple yet rich representation of a program’s performance characteristics across a large space of microarchitectural parameters. Experiments show that Concorde is more than five orders of magnitude faster than a reference cycle-level simulator, with about 2% average Cycles-Per-Instruction (CPI) prediction error across a range of SPEC, open-source, and proprietary benchmarks. This enables rapid design-space exploration and performance sensitivity analyses that are currently infeasible, e.g., in about an hour, we conducted a first-of-its-kind fine-grained performance attribution to different microarchitectural components across a diverse set of programs, requiring nearly 150 million CPI evaluations.
papers.abstract_zh: gem5 等周期级模拟器广泛应用于微架构设计，但对于大规模设计空间探索来说它们的速度慢得令人望而却步。我们提出了 Concorde，一种用于学习快速、准确的微架构性能模型的新方法。与模拟每条指令的现有模拟器和学习方法不同，Concorde 基于紧凑的性能分布来预测程序的行为，该分布捕获了不同微架构组件的影响。它使用简单的分析模型得出这些性能分布，该模型估计每个微架构组件引起的性能界限，从而在大量微架构参数中提供程序性能特征的简单而丰富的表示。实验表明，Concorde 比参考周期级模拟器快了五个数量级以上，在一系列 SPEC、开源和专有基准测试中，平均每指令周期 (CPI) 预测误差约为 2%。这使得目前无法实现的快速设计空间探索和性能敏感性分析成为可能，例如，在大约一个小时内，我们对一系列不同程序中的不同微架构组件进行了首次细粒度的性能归因，需要近 1.5 亿次 CPI 评估。

papers.title: Constant-Rate Entanglement Distillation for Fast Quantum Interconnects.
papers.abstract:
Distributed quantum computing allows the modular construction of large-scale quantum computers and enables new protocols for blind quantum computation. However, such applications in the large-scale, fault-tolerant regime place stringent demands on the fidelity and rate of entanglement generation, which are not met by existing methods for quantum interconnects.

In this work, we develop constant-rate entanglement distillation methods to address this bottleneck in the setting of noisy local operations. By using a sequence of two-way entanglement distillation protocols based on quantum error detecting codes with increasing rate, and combining with standard fault tolerance techniques, we achieve constant-rate entanglement distillation. We show that the scheme has constant-rate in expectation, and further numerically optimize to achieve low practical overhead under memory constraints. We find that compared to existing quantum interconnect schemes, our methods reduce the communication overhead by more than 10 × in relevant regimes, leading to a direct speed-up in the execution of distributed quantum algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh:
分布式量子计算允许大规模量子计算机的模块化构造，并实现盲量子计算的新协议。然而，大规模容错机制中的此类应用对纠缠生成的保真度和速率提出了严格的要求，而现有的量子互连方法无法满足这些要求。

在这项工作中，我们开发了恒速纠缠蒸馏方法来解决噪声局部操作设置中的这一瓶颈。通过使用一系列基于递增速率量子错误检测码的双向纠缠蒸馏协议，并结合标准容错技术，我们实现了恒速率纠缠蒸馏。我们证明该方案具有预期的恒定速率，并进一步进行数值优化以在内存限制下实现较低的实际开销。我们发现，与现有的量子互连方案相比，我们的方法在相关机制中将通信开销减少了 10 倍以上，从而直接加速了分布式量子算法的执行。

papers.title: CoopRT: Accelerating BVH Traversal for Ray Tracing via Cooperative Threads.
papers.abstract:
Ray Tracing is a rendering technique to simulate the way light interacts with objects to create realistic images. It has become prominent thanks to the latest hardware support on Graphics Processing Units (GPUs), i.e., the Ray-Tracing (RT) unit, specially designed to accelerate ray tracing operations. Despite such hardware advances, ray tracing remains a performance bottleneck for high-performance graphics workloads, such as real-time path tracing (PT), which is an application of ray tracing where multiple bouncing rays are traced per pixel. The key reasons are (a) the costly Bounding Volume Hierarchy (BVH) traversal operation, and (b) low Single-Instruction-Multiple-Thread (SIMT) efficiency as the rays in the same warp deviate inevitably in their traversal paths.

In this work, we propose a novel architecture design for cooperative BVH traversal that exploits the parallelism present in the BVH traversal process. The key idea of our CoopRT scheme is to make use of the idle threads, either completely inactive when the ray tracing instruction is executed or partially idle due to early completion, to help the long running threads in the same warp. Specifically, we enable idle threads in a GPU warp to utilize their readily available traversal hardware to help traverse the BVH tree for the busy threads, therefore helping them finish their traversal much faster. This approach is implemented purely in hardware, requiring no changes to the programming model. We present our architecture design and show that it only involves small changes to the existing RT unit.

We evaluated CoopRT in Vulkan-sim, a cycle-level simulator, and observed up to 5.11x speedup over the baseline, with a geometric mean of 2.15x speedup at the cost of a moderate area overhead of 3.0% of the warp buffer in the RT unit. Using the energy-delay product, our CoopRT achieves an average of 2.29x improvement over the baseline.
papers.abstract_zh:
光线追踪是一种渲染技术，用于模拟光线与对象交互的方式以创建逼真的图像。由于图形处理单元 (GPU)（即专为加速光线追踪操作而设计的光线追踪 (RT) 单元）的最新硬件支持，它已变得突出。尽管硬件有所进步，光线追踪仍然是高性能图形工作负载的性能瓶颈，例如实时路径追踪 (PT)，它是光线追踪的一种应用，其中每个像素追踪多个弹跳光线。关键原因是（a）昂贵的边界体积层次（BVH）遍历操作，以及（b）单指令多线程（SIMT）效率低，因为同一扭曲中的光线在其遍历路径中不可避免地偏离。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于协作 BVH 遍历的新颖架构设计，该设计利用了 BVH 遍历过程中存在的并行性。我们的 CoopRT 方案的关键思想是利用空闲线程（在执行光线追踪指令时完全不活动或由于提前完成而部分空闲）来帮助同一扭曲中长时间运行的线程。具体来说，我们使 GPU warp 中的空闲线程能够利用其现成的遍历硬件来帮助遍历繁忙线程的 BVH 树，从而帮助它们更快地完成遍历。这种方法纯粹在硬件中实现，不需要改变编程模型。我们展示了我们的架构设计，并表明它只涉及对现有 RT 单元的微小更改。

我们在 Vulkan-sim（一个循环级模拟器）中评估了 CoopRT，观察到比基线提高了 5.11 倍，几何平均值为 2.15 倍，但代价是 RT 单元中扭曲缓冲区的适度区域开销为 3.0%。使用能量延迟产品，我们的 CoopRT 比基线平均提高了 2.29 倍。

papers.title: CORD: Low-Latency, Bandwidth-Efficient and Scalable Release Consistency via Directory Ordering.
papers.abstract:
Increasingly, multi-processing unit (PU) systems ( e.g. , CPU-GPU, multi-CPU, multi-GPU, etc.) are embracing cache-coherent shared memory to facilitate inter-PU communication. The coherence protocols in these systems support write-through accesses that place the data directly at the LLC to enable efficient producer-consumer communications pervasive in AI/ML workloads. Moreover, release consistency has emerged as the standard memory model in such systems due to its programming simplicity and ability to support high performance. In today’s multi-PU systems, the source processor that issues the writes also orders them to enforce release consistency, even for write-through accesses. Unfortunately, such source ordering of write-through operations results in unnecessary communications between the source processor and the LLC directory, incurring significant performance, interconnect traffic, and energy overheads for multi-PU applications.

To eliminate such communication, we present cord 1 , a novel cache coherence protocol that orders write-through accesses directly at the cache directory . cord employs several novel mechanisms to minimize the metadata required for ordering traffic while efficiently scaling to multiple directories. Evaluations atop the gem5 simulator show that compared to source ordering, cord improves application performance by \(24\%\) and reduces traffic by \(13\%\) on average while incurring \(\lt 1\%\) storage, area, and power overheads. Compared to hand-optimized message-passing implementations, cord observes a mere \(3\%\) performance overhead and \(6\%\) more traffic on average with a significantly simpler programming model.
papers.abstract_zh:
越来越多的多处理单元 (PU) 系统（例如，CPU-GPU、多 CPU、多 GPU 等）采用缓存一致性共享内存来促进 PU 间通信。这些系统中的一致性协议支持直写访问，将数据直接放置在 LLC 中，以实现 AI/ML 工作负载中普遍存在的高效生产者-消费者通信。此外，由于其编程简单性和支持高性能的能力，释放一致性已成为此类系统中的标准内存模型。在当今的多 PU 系统中，发出写入的源处理器还命令它们强制执行发布一致性，即使对于直写访问也是如此。不幸的是，这种写通操作的源排序会导致源处理器和 LLC 目录之间不必要的通信，从而为多 PU 应用带来显着的性能、互连流量和能源开销。

为了消除这种通信，我们提出了 cord 1，这是一种新颖的缓存一致性协议，它直接在缓存目录上命令直写访问。 cord 采用多种新颖的机制来最大限度地减少订购流量所需的元数据，同时有效地扩展到多个目录。 gem5 模拟器上的评估表明，与源排序相比，cord 平均将应用程序性能提高了 \(24\%\)，并减少了 \(13\%\) 流量，同时产生了 \(\lt 1\%\) 存储、面积和功率开销。与手工优化的消息传递实现相比，cord 的性能开销仅为\(3\%\)，并且平均流量增加了\(6\%\)，并且编程模型明显简单。

papers.title: Cramming a Data Center into One Cabinet, a Co-Exploration of Computing and Hardware Architecture of Waferscale Chip.
papers.abstract:
The rapid advancements in large language models (LLMs) have significantly increased hardware demands. Wafer-scale chips, which integrate numerous compute units on an entire wafer, offer a high-density computing solution for data centers and can extend Moore’s Law at system level. However, current wafer-scale data center architectures face inefficiencies, such as uncoordinated resource allocation and lack of co-optimization for system area, preventing optimal integration density and performance within given cost and physical constraints. We propose a co-exploration approach of computing and hardware architectures to bridge this gap.

We first develop an optimized wafer-scale single-cabinet data center model, integrating configurable on-chip memory dies and employing a vertically stacked hardware architecture. Based on this model, we introduce Titan, an automated exploration framework for intra-chip and inter-chip architecture design and optimization. Based on the architecture features of wafer-scale systems with optimal integration density, Titan establishes parameter dependencies to co-design the computing and hardware architectures. To reduce the design cycle for wafer-scale systems, Titan introduces vertical area constraints and pre-checks physical limits by integrating a series of reliability prediction models. It also integrates hardware capacity and cost evaluations to enable multi-objective optimization. Under the same cost constraint, on average, Titan’s cabinet design architecture improves system computing capacity by 2.90 ×, communication bandwidth by 2.11 ×, and memory bandwidth by 11.23 × compared to the state-of-the-art Dojo-like wafer-scale single tray architecture. Simulated in different scenarios, Titan’s design delivers 3.17 × and 10.66 × performance improvement for Llama2-7B and Llama2-72B. Moreover, we leverage Titan to uncover insights into the optimal single-chip area choice within a cabinet under different cost constraints.
papers.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速发展显着增加了硬件需求。晶圆级芯片在整个晶圆上集成了众多计算单元，为数据中心提供高密度计算解决方案，并可以在系统级别扩展摩尔定律。然而，当前的晶圆级数据中心架构面临着效率低下的问题，例如资源分配不协调和缺乏系统区域的协同优化，从而无法在给定的成本和物理限制下实现最佳的集成密度和性能。我们提出了一种计算和硬件架构的共同探索方法来弥补这一差距。

我们首先开发了一个优化的晶圆级单机柜数据中心模型，集成了可配置的片上存储器芯片并采用垂直堆叠的硬件架构。基于这个模型，我们推出了Titan，一个用于芯片内和芯片间架构设计和优化的自动化探索框架。 Titan根据具有最佳集成密度的晶圆级系统的架构特征，建立参数依赖关系来协同设计计算和硬件架构。为了缩短晶圆级系统的设计周期，Titan引入了垂直面积约束，并通过集成一系列可靠性预测模型来预先检查物理限制。它还集成了硬件容量和成本评估，以实现多目标优化。在相同成本约束下，与最先进的类Dojo晶圆级单托盘架构相比，Titan的机柜设计架构平均将系统计算能力提高2.90倍，通信带宽提高2.11倍，内存带宽提高11.23倍。在不同场景下进行模拟，Titan 的设计为 Llama2-7B 和 Llama2-72B 提供了 3.17 倍和 10.66 倍的性能提升。此外，我们利用 Titan 来揭示不同成本限制下机柜内最佳单芯片面积选择的见解。

papers.title: Dadu-Corki: Algorithm-Architecture Co-Design for Embodied AI-powered Robotic Manipulation.
papers.abstract: Embodied AI robots have the potential to fundamentally improve the way human beings live and manufacture. Continued progress in the burgeoning field of using large language models to control robots depends critically on an efficient computing substrate, and this trend is strongly evident in manipulation tasks. In particular, today’s computing systems for embodied AI robots for manipulation tasks are designed purely based on the interest of algorithm developers, where robot actions are divided into a discrete frame basis. Such an execution pipeline creates high latency and energy consumption. This paper proposes Corki , an algorithm-architecture co-design framework for real-time embodied AI-powered robotic manipulation applications. We aim to decouple LLM inference, robotic control, and data communication in the embodied AI robots’ compute pipeline. Instead of predicting action for one single frame, Corki predicts the trajectory for the near future to reduce the frequency of LLM inference. The algorithm is coupled with a hardware that accelerates transforming trajectory into actual torque signals used to control robots and an execution pipeline that parallels data communication with computation. Corki largely reduces LLM inference frequency by up to 5.1 ×, resulting in up to 5.9 × speed up. The success rate improvement can be up to 13.9%.
papers.abstract_zh: 具身人工智能机器人有潜力从根本上改善人类的生活和制造方式。使用大型语言模型控制机器人这一新兴领域的持续进展关键取决于高效的计算基板，这种趋势在操作任务中表现得非常明显。特别是，当今用于执行操作任务的实体人工智能机器人的计算系统纯粹是基于算法开发人员的兴趣而设计的，其中机器人动作被划分为离散帧基础。这样的执行管道会产生高延迟和能耗。本文提出了 Corki，一种算法架构协同设计框架，用于实时体现人工智能驱动的机器人操作应用程序。我们的目标是在具体的 AI 机器人的计算管道中解耦 LLM 推理、机器人控制和数据通信。 Corki 不是预测一帧的动作，而是预测不久的将来的轨迹，以减少 LLM 推理的频率。该算法与加速将轨迹转换为用于控制机器人的实际扭矩信号的硬件以及并行数据通信与计算的执行管道相结合。 Corki 将 LLM 推理频率大幅降低了 5.1 倍，从而实现了高达 5.9 倍的加速。成功率提升可达13.9%。

papers.title: DCPerf: An Open-Source, Battle-Tested Performance Benchmark Suite for Datacenter Workloads.
papers.abstract: We present DCPerf, the first open-source performance benchmark suite actively used to inform procurement decisions for millions of CPU in hyperscale datacenters. Although numerous benchmarks exist, our evaluation reveals that they inaccurately project server performance for datacenter workloads or fail to scale to resemble production workloads on modern many-core servers. DCPerf distinguishes itself in two aspects: (1) it faithfully models essential software architectures and features of datacenter applications, such as microservice architecture and highly optimized multi-process or multi-thread concurrency; and (2) it strives to align its performance characteristics with those of production workloads, at both the system level and microarchitecture level. Both are made possible by our direct access to the source code and hyperscale production deployments of datacenter workloads. Additionally, we share real-world examples of using DCPerf in critical decision-making, such as selecting future CPU SKUs and guiding CPU vendors in optimizing their designs. Our evaluation demonstrates that DCPerf accurately projects the performance of representative production workloads within a 3.3% error margin across four generations of production servers introduced over a span of six years, with core counts varying widely from 36 to 176.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 DCPerf，这是第一个开源性能基准套件，积极用于为超大规模数据中心中数百万个 CPU 的采购决策提供信息。尽管存在许多基准测试，但我们的评估表明，它们无法准确地预测数据中心工作负载的服务器性能，或者无法扩展以类似于现代多核服务器上的生产工作负载。 DCPerf 的特点有两个方面：（1）它忠实地模拟了数据中心应用程序的基本软件架构和特性，例如微服务架构和高度优化的多进程或多线程并发； (2) 它努力在系统级别和微架构级别上使其性能特征与生产工作负载的性能特征保持一致。通过我们直接访问源代码和数据中心工作负载的超大规模生产部署，这两者成为可能。此外，我们还分享了在关键决策中使用 DCPerf 的真实示例，例如选择未来的 CPU SKU 和指导 CPU 供应商优化其设计。我们的评估表明，DCPerf 在六年内推出的四代生产服务器（核心数量从 36 到 176 不等）中准确预测了代表性生产工作负载的性能，误差范围为 3.3%。

papers.title: Debunking the CUDA Myth Towards GPU-based AI Systems: Evaluation of the Performance and Programmability of Intel's Gaudi NPU for AI Model Serving.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive evaluation of Intel Gaudi NPUs as an alternative to NVIDIA GPUs, which is currently the de facto standard in AI system design. First, we create microbenchmarks to compare Intel Gaudi-2 with NVIDIA A100, showing that Gaudi-2 achieves competitive performance not only in primitive AI compute, memory, and communication operations but also in executing several important AI workloads end-to-end. We then assess Gaudi NPU’s programmability by discussing several software-level optimization strategies to employ for implementing critical FBGEMM operators and vLLM, evaluating their efficiency against GPU-optimized counterparts. Results indicate that Gaudi-2 achieves energy efficiency comparable to A100, though there are notable areas for improvement in terms of software maturity. Overall, we conclude that, with effective integration into high-level AI frameworks, Gaudi NPUs could challenge NVIDIA GPU’s dominance in the AI server market, though further improvements are necessary to fully compete with NVIDIA’s robust software ecosystem.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文对英特尔 Gaudi NPU 作为 NVIDIA GPU 的替代品进行了全面评估，NVIDIA GPU 是目前人工智能系统设计的事实上的标准。首先，我们创建微基准来比较 Intel Gaudi-2 与 NVIDIA A100，结果表明 Gaudi-2 不仅在原始 AI 计算、内存和通信操作方面，而且在端到端执行多个重要的 AI 工作负载方面都实现了具有竞争力的性能。然后，我们通过讨论用于实现关键 FBGEMM 算子和 vLLM 的几种软件级优化策略来评估 Gaudi NPU 的可编程性，并根据 GPU 优化的对应方案评估其效率。结果表明，Gaudi-2 的能效与 A100 相当，但在软件成熟度方面还有显着的改进空间。总的来说，我们的结论是，通过有效集成到高级人工智能框架中，Gaudi NPU 可以挑战 NVIDIA GPU 在人工智能服务器市场的主导地位，尽管还需要进一步改进才能与 NVIDIA 强大的软件生态系统充分竞争。

papers.title: DiTile-DGNN: An Efficient Accelerator for Distributed Dynamic Graph Neural Network Inference.
papers.abstract: Dynamic Graph Neural Networks (DGNNs) have recently emerged as a promising model for learning complex temporal and spatial relationships in evolving graphs. The performance of DGNNs is enabled by the simultaneous integration of both graph neural networks (GNNs) and recurrent neural networks (RNNs). Despite the theoretical advancements, the design space of such complex models has significantly exploded due to the combinatorial challenges of heterogeneous computation kernels and intricate data dependency (i.e., intra- and inter-snapshot data dependency). This makes the computations of DGNN hard to scale, posing significant challenges in parallelism, data reuse, and communication. To address this challenge, we propose DiTile-DGNN, an efficient accelerator for large-scale DGNN execution. The proposed DiTile-DGNN consists of a redundancy-free parallelism strategy, workload balance optimization, and a reconfigurable accelerator architecture. Specifically, we propose a redundancy-free framework that can efficiently find an efficient parallelism strategy that can fully eliminate the data redundancy between graph snapshots while minimizing the communication complexity. Additionally, we propose a workload balance optimization for DGNN models to enhance resource utilization and eliminate synchronization overhead between snapshots. Lastly, we propose a reconfigurable accelerator architecture, with a flexible interconnect, that can be dynamically configured in support of various DGNN dataflows. Our simulations demonstrate that DiTile-DGNN achieves 48.4%, 56.1%, 23.2%, and 36.1% reductions in execution time and 83.4%, 84.0%, 75.6%, and 71.4% improvements in energy efficiency compared to state-of-the-art accelerators, including ReaDy [ 20 ], DGNN-Booster [ 8 ], RACE [ 51 ], and MEGA [ 12 ], on average across multiple DGNN datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 动态图神经网络（DGNN）最近成为一种有前途的模型，用于学习演化图中的复杂时间和空间关系。 DGNN 的性能是通过图神经网络 (GNN) 和循环神经网络 (RNN) 的同时集成来实现的。尽管理论上取得了进步，但由于异构计算内核和复杂的数据依赖性（即快照内和快照间数据依赖性）的组合挑战，此类复杂模型的设计空间已经显着爆炸。这使得 DGNN 的计算难以扩展，在并行性、数据重用和通信方面提出了重大挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 DiTile-DGNN，这是一种用于大规模 DGNN 执行的高效加速器。所提出的 DiTile-DGNN 由无冗余并行策略、工作负载平衡优化和可重构加速器架构组成。具体来说，我们提出了一种无冗余框架，可以有效地找到一种高效的并行策略，可以完全消除图快照之间的数据冗余，同时最大限度地降低通信复杂性。此外，我们提出了 DGNN 模型的工作负载平衡优化，以提高资源利用率并消除快照之间的同步开销。最后，我们提出了一种可重新配置的加速器架构，具有灵活的互连，可以动态配置以支持各种 DGNN 数据流。我们的模拟表明，与最先进的加速器（包括 ReaDy [20]、DGNN-Booster [8]、 RACE [51] 和 MEGA [12]，在多个 DGNN 数据集上平均。

papers.title: DREAM: Enabling Low-Overhead Rowhammer Mitigation via Directed Refresh Management.
papers.abstract:
This paper focuses on Memory-Controller (MC) side Rowhammer mitigation. MC-side mitigation consists of two parts: First, a tracker to identify the aggressor rows. Second, a command to let the MC inform the DRAM chip to perform victim-refresh for the specified aggressor row. To facilitate this, prior works assumed a per-bank Nearby Row Refresh (NRR) command. However, JEDEC standards did not support NRR. Instead, JEDEC introduced Directed Refresh Management (DRFM) , which can simultaneously perform mitigations for one row each in 8 (DRFMsb) or 32 (DRFMab) banks. As DRFM stalls 8-32 banks, it incurs high overheads. For example, at a threshold of 2K, PARA incurs a slowdown of 3.9% with NRR, 12.7% with DRFMsb, and 49% with DRFMab. Although counter-based trackers can avoid these slowdowns, they require significant storage. The goal of our paper is to reduce the performance and storage overheads of MC-based mitigations by using properties of DRFM.

Our paper proposes DREAM, DRFM-Aware Rowhammer Mitigation . We propose two variants of DREAM. Our first design, DREAM-R , reduces the performance overhead of randomized trackers by increasing the time between sampling the row and issuing a DRFM. The delay allows other banks the time to sample their own rows, thereby increasing the number of rows mitigated under a single DRFM. DREAM-R reduces the average performance overhead of PARA from 12.7% (DRFMsb) to 4.24% and MINT from 15.9% (DRFMsb) to 2.1%. We bound the impact of delayed DRFM on the tolerated Rowhammer threshold. Our second design DREAM-C, reduces the storage for counter-based trackers by leveraging the fact that DRFM can concurrently mitigate several rows. DREAM-C forms a gang containing 32-256 rows, randomly selected equally from all the 32 banks, and allocates a single counter for the entire gang. DREAM-C reduces the storage required at a threshold of 500 to only 1KB/bank, which is 8x lower than Graphene while avoiding the complexity of CAM lookups and incurring negligible slowdown. We also show that DREAM compares favorably to PRAC.
papers.abstract_zh:
本文重点介绍内存控制器 (MC) 端 Rowhammer 缓解措施。 MC 端缓解措施由两部分组成：首先，用于识别攻击者行的跟踪器。其次，命令让 MC 通知 DRAM 芯片对指定的攻击者行执行受害者刷新。为了促进这一点，之前的工作假设了每个存储体的附近行刷新（NRR）命令。然而，JEDEC 标准不支持 NRR。相反，JEDEC 引入了定向刷新管理 (DRFM)，它可以同时对 8 个 (DRFMsb) 或 32 个 (DRFMab) 存储体中的每一行执行缓解措施。由于 DRFM 会停止 8-32 个存储体，因此会产生很高的管理费用。例如，在阈值为 2K 时，PARA 使用 NRR 会导致 3.9% 的减速，使用 DRFMsb 会导致 12.7% 的减速，使用 DRFMab 会导致 49% 的减速。尽管基于计数器的跟踪器可以避免这些减速，但它们需要大量存储空间。我们论文的目标是通过使用 DRFM 的属性来降低基于 MC 的缓解措施的性能和存储开销。

我们的论文提出了 DREAM、DRFM-Aware Rowhammer Mitigation。我们提出了 DREAM 的两种变体。我们的第一个设计 DREAM-R 通过增加对行进行采样和发出 DRFM 之间的时间来降低随机跟踪器的性能开销。延迟允许其他银行有时间对自己的行进行采样，从而增加在单个 DRFM 下缓解的行数。 DREAM-R 将 PARA 的平均性能开销从 12.7% (DRFMsb) 降低到 4.24%，将 MINT 从 15.9% (DRFMsb) 降低到 2.1%。我们限制了延迟 DRFM 对 Rowhammer 容忍阈值的影响。我们的第二个设计 DREAM-C 通过利用 DRFM 可以同时缓解多行的事实，减少了基于计数器的跟踪器的存储。 DREAM-C 形成一个包含 32-256 行的组，从所有 32 个组中随机平均选择，并为整个组分配一个计数器。 DREAM-C 将阈值 500 所需的存储量减少到每个存储体仅 1KB，比石墨烯低 8 倍，同时避免了 CAM 查找的复杂性并导致可忽略不计的速度下降。我们还表明 DREAM 优于 PRAC。

papers.title: DReX: Accurate and Scalable Dense Retrieval Acceleration via Algorithmic-Hardware Codesign.
papers.abstract:
Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) supplements large language models (LLM) with information retrieval to ensure up-to-date, accurate, factually grounded, and contextually relevant outputs. RAG implementations often employ dense retrieval methods and approximate k-nearest neighbor search (ANNS). Unfortunately, ANNS is inherently dataset-specific and prone to low recall, potentially leading to inaccuracies when irrelevant or incomplete context is passed to the LLM. Furthermore, sending numerous imprecise documents to the LLM for generation can significantly degrade performance compared to processing a smaller set of accurate documents.

We propose DReX , a dataset-agnostic, accurate, and scalable D ense Re trieval Acc eleration scheme enabled through a novel algorithmic-hardware co-design. We leverage in-DRAM logic to enable early filtering of embedding vectors far from the query vector. An outside-DRAM near-memory accelerator then performs exact nearest neighbor searches on the remaining filtered embeddings. This resulting design minimizes off-chip data movement and ensures precise and efficient retrieval, laying the foundation for robust and performant RAG systems that are broadly applicable. Our evaluation shows that DReX delivers a 6.2-7 × reduction in time-to-first-token for a representative RAG application over a state-of-the-art mechanism while incurring reasonable area and power overheads in the memory subsystem.
papers.abstract_zh:
检索增强生成 (RAG) 通过信息检索补充大型语言模型 (LLM)，以确保最新、准确、基于事实且上下文相关的输出。 RAG 实现通常采用密集检索方法和近似 k 最近邻搜索 (ANNS)。不幸的是，ANNS 本质上是数据集特定的，并且容易出现低召回率，当不相关或不完整的上下文传递给 LLM 时，可能会导致不准确。此外，与处理较小的一组准确文档相比，向法学硕士发送大量不精确的文档进行生成可能会显着降低性能。

我们提出了 DReX，这是一种与数据集无关、准确且可扩展的密集检索加速方案，通过新颖的算法-硬件协同设计实现。我们利用 DRAM 逻辑来实现远离查询向量的嵌入向量的早期过滤。然后，外部 DRAM 近内存加速器对剩余的过滤嵌入执行精确的最近邻搜索。由此产生的设计最大限度地减少了片外数据移动，并确保精确高效的检索，为广泛适用的稳健且高性能的 RAG 系统奠定了基础。我们的评估表明，与最先进的机制相比，DReX 可以将代表性 RAG 应用程序的首次令牌时间缩短 6.2-7 倍，同时在内存子系统中产生合理的面积和功率开销。

papers.title: DS-TPU: Dynamical System for on-Device Lifelong Graph Learning with Nonlinear Node Interaction.
papers.abstract:
Graph learning on dynamical systems has recently surfaced as an emerging research domain. By leveraging a novel electronic Dynamical System (DS), various graph learning challenges have been effectively tackled through a rapid, spontaneous natural annealing process. This method has attracted increasing attention due to its orders-of-magnitude improvements in speed and energy efficiency compared to traditional Graph Neural Network (GNN) approaches for inference tasks. However, (1) the current DS hardware only supports inference, missing its native solution for training; while relying on conventional hardware is likely more expensive than GNNs. (2) The current DS architecture only allows linear interactions among its nodes, limiting training accuracy.

In this work, we present a Dynamical-System Training-Processing Unit (DS-TPU) developed through algorithm-architecture co-design to tackle the two major challenges: (1) An on-device lifelong learning mechanism that leverages feedback electric current as the loss function in response to the observed training data, allowing electron-speed refinement on the present model parameters. (2) A nonlinear DS node interaction mechanism constructed from Chebyshev polynomials to significantly improve the compatibility between the DS hardware and the embedded relation of graph data. Extensive evaluations using six real-world graph learning applications demonstrate that for accuracy, DS-TPU achieves 10.8% MAE reduction over the best results of five widely used GNNs. In terms of training performance, the 5-Watt DS-TPU architecture achieves on-average 810 × speedup over the offline training for DS on an Nvidia A100 GPU, and 640 × over GNN training on the same GPU. In terms of inference performance, DS-TPU achieves 2548 × over the A100 GPU and 115 × over the best state-of-the-art GNN accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh:
动态系统上的图学习最近作为一个新兴的研究领域出现。通过利用新型电子动力系统（DS），通过快速、自发的自然退火过程，各种图形学习挑战得到了有效解决。与用于推理任务的传统图神经网络（GNN）方法相比，该方法由于在速度和能源效率方面有了数量级的提高而引起了越来越多的关注。然而，（1）当前的DS硬件仅支持推理，缺少训练的原生解决方案；而依赖传统硬件可能比 GNN 更昂贵。 (2)当前的DS架构仅允许其节点之间的线性交互，限制了训练精度。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过算法架构协同设计开发的动态系统训练处理单元（DS-TPU），以解决两个主要挑战：（1）设备上的终身学习机制，利用反馈电流作为响应观察到的训练数据的损失函数，允许对当前模型参数进行电子速度细化。 (2)由切比雪夫多项式构建的非线性DS节点交互机制，显着提高DS硬件与图数据嵌入关系之间的兼容性。使用六个现实世界的图学习应用程序进行的广泛评估表明，就准确性而言，DS-TPU 比五个广泛使用的 GNN 的最佳结果降低了 10.8% 的 MAE。在训练性能方面，5瓦DS-TPU架构比Nvidia A100 GPU上的DS离线训练平均加速810倍，比同一GPU上的GNN训练平均加速640倍。在推理性能方面，DS-TPU 比 A100 GPU 提高了 2548 倍，比最先进的 GNN 加速器提高了 115 倍。

papers.title: DX100: Programmable Data Access Accelerator for Indirection.
papers.abstract:
Indirect memory accesses frequently appear in applications where memory bandwidth is a critical bottleneck. Prior indirect memory access proposals, such as indirect prefetchers, runahead execution, fetchers, and decoupled access/execute architectures, primarily focus on improving memory access latency by loading data ahead of computation but still rely on the DRAM controllers to reorder memory requests and enhance memory bandwidth utilization. DRAM controllers have limited visibility to future memory accesses due to the small capacity of request buffers and the restricted memory-level parallelism of conventional core and memory systems.

We introduce DX100, a programmable data access accelerator for indirect memory accesses. DX100 is shared across cores to offload bulk indirect memory accesses and associated address calculation operations. DX100 reorders , interleaves , and coalesces memory requests to improve DRAM row-buffer hit rate and memory bandwidth utilization. DX100 provides a general-purpose ISA to support diverse access types, loop patterns, conditional accesses, and address calculations. To support this accelerator without significant programming efforts, we discuss a set of MLIR compiler passes that automatically transform legacy code to utilize DX100. Experimental evaluations on 12 benchmarks spanning scientific computing, database, and graph applications show that DX100 achieves performance improvements of 2.6 × over a multicore baseline and 2.0 × over the state-of-the-art indirect prefetcher.
papers.abstract_zh:
间接内存访问经常出现在内存带宽成为关键瓶颈的应用程序中。先前的间接内存访问建议，例如间接预取器、超前执行、获取器和解耦访问/执行架构，主要侧重于通过在计算之前加载数据来改善内存访问延迟，但仍然依赖 DRAM 控制器来重新排序内存请求并提高内存带宽利用率。由于请求缓冲区容量小以及传统核心和内存系统的内存级并行性受限，DRAM 控制器对未来内存访问的可见性有限。

我们推出 DX100，一种用于间接内存访问的可编程数据访问加速器。 DX100 跨内核共享，以卸载批量间接内存访问和相关的地址计算操作。 DX100 重新排序、交错和合并内存请求，以提高 DRAM 行缓冲区命中率和内存带宽利用率。 DX100 提供通用 ISA，支持多种访问类型、循环模式、条件访问和地址计算。为了在无需大量编程工作的情况下支持该加速器，我们讨论了一组 MLIR 编译器通道，可自动转换遗留代码以利用 DX100。对涵盖科学计算、数据库和图形应用程序的 12 个基准的实验评估表明，DX100 的性能比多核基准提高了 2.6 倍，比最先进的间接预取器提高了 2.0 倍。

papers.title: Dynamic Load Balancer in Intel Xeon Scalable Processor: Performance Analyses, Enhancements, and Guidelines.
papers.abstract: The rapid increase in inter-host networking speed has challenged host processing capabilities, as bursty traffic and uneven load distribution among host CPU cores give rise to excessive queuing delays and service latency variances. To cost-efficiently tackle this challenge, the latest Intel Xeon Scalable Processor has integrated an on-chip accelerator, named Dynamic Load Balancer (DLB). It consists of hardware queues, arbiters, and priority-based Quality of Service (QoS) features to maximize load-balancing performance while minimizing host CPU cycle consumption. In this work, we first compare the performance of DLB against popular software-based load balancers with a microbenchmark suite, demonstrating that DLB significantly outperforms them. Yet, DLB still consumes a significant number of host CPU cycles to prepare and enqueue work descriptors for received packets. Second, to eliminate the consumption of host CPU cycles in load balancing, we propose a system architecture/software co-design solution, AccDirect. Specifically, AccDirect leverages the Peer-to-Peer (P2P) communication capability of PCIe devices to enable a direct communication path between DLB and NIC, through which NIC directly enqueues the work descriptors. Our evaluation shows that AccDirect-based DLB offers practically the same performance as conventional DLB while reducing the system-wide power consumption of host CPU by 10%. Compared to the throughput of a commodity hardware-based load balancer for an end-to-end application, that of AccDirect-based DLB is 14–50 \(\%\) higher with comparable p99 latency.
