Lastly, we provide guidelines to make the best use of DLB, which is riddled with a vast configuration space and advanced features, after conducting a comprehensive evaluation.
papers.abstract_zh: 主机间网络速度的快速增长对主机处理能力提出了挑战，突发流量和主机CPU核心之间的负载分配不均匀导致过多的排队延迟和服务延迟差异。为了经济高效地应对这一挑战，最新的英特尔至强可扩展处理器集成了一个名为动态负载均衡器 (DLB) 的片上加速器。它由硬件队列、仲裁器和基于优先级的服务质量 (QoS) 功能组成，可最大限度地提高负载平衡性能，同时最大限度地减少主机 CPU 周期消耗。在这项工作中，我们首先使用微基准套件将 DLB 与流行的基于软件的负载均衡器的性能进行比较，证明 DLB 明显优于它们。然而，DLB 仍然消耗大量主机 CPU 周期来为接收到的数据包准备和排队工作描述符。其次，为了消除负载平衡中主机CPU周期的消耗，我们提出了系统架构/软件协同设计解决方案AccDirect。具体来说，AccDirect利用PCIe设备的点对点（P2P）通信能力来实现DLB和NIC之间的直接通信路径，NIC通过该路径直接将工作描述符排队。我们的评估表明，基于 AccDirect 的 DLB 提供与传统 DLB 几乎相同的性能，同时将主机 CPU 的系统范围功耗降低了 10%。与用于端到端应用程序的基于商品硬件的负载均衡器的吞吐量相比，基于 AccDirect 的 DLB 的吞吐量高出 14-50 \(\%\)，且 p99 延迟相当。最后，我们在进行全面评估后，提供了如何充分利用DLB的指南，DLB拥有广阔的配置空间和先进的功能。

papers.title: Ecco: Improving Memory Bandwidth and Capacity for LLMs via Entropy-Aware Cache Compression.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated transformative capabilities across diverse artificial intelligence applications, yet their deployment is hindered by substantial memory and computational demands, especially in resource-constrained environments. Quantization techniques have emerged as a critical solution, reducing data precision to enhance memory and computational efficiency. However, existing methods often suffer from high runtime overheads and potential accuracy degradation. To address these challenges, we propose Ecco , an entropy-based cache compression technique tailored for LLMs. Ecco combines group-wise and non-uniform quantization with pre-defined shared k-means patterns and Huffman coding to exploit the inherent entropy characteristics of LLM cache data. Recognizing the inefficiencies of traditional Huffman coding in terms of parallelism and latency, we introduce a novel parallel Huffman-based decoding process with a multi-stage pipeline design, reducing latency by two orders of magnitude and achieving throughput comparable to GPU L2 caches. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that Ecco achieves an up to 2.9 × and 1.9 × speedup over the state-of-the-art AWQ and SmoothQuant framework, 2.4 × over the Olive accelerator, all while increasing memory capacity by nearly 4 × and maintaining state-of-the-art LLM accuracy. These results underscore the effectiveness of our entropy-based cache compression in enhancing LLM performance and efficiency, paving the way for more deployable large-scale AI models.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已在不同的人工智能应用中展示了变革能力，但其部署受到大量内存和计算需求的阻碍，尤其是在资源有限的环境中。量化技术已成为一种关键的解决方案，它可以降低数据精度以提高内存和计算效率。然而，现有方法通常会遭受高运行时开销和潜在的准确性下降的困扰。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Ecco，这是一种专为 LLM 量身定制的基于熵的缓存压缩技术。 ECCO 将分组和非均匀量化与预定义的共享 k 均值模式和霍夫曼编码相结合，以利用 LLM 缓存数据的固有熵特征。认识到传统霍夫曼编码在并行性和延迟方面的低效率，我们引入了一种新颖的基于并行霍夫曼的解码过程，采用多级管道设计，将延迟减少了两个数量级，并实现了与 GPU L2 缓存相当的吞吐量。综合评估表明，Ecco 比最先进的 AWQ 和 SmoothQuant 框架实现了高达 2.9 倍和 1.9 倍的加速，比 Olive 加速器提高了 2.4 倍，同时将内存容量增加了近 4 倍，并保持了最先进的 LLM 精度。这些结果强调了我们基于熵的缓存压缩在增强 LLM 性能和效率方面的有效性，为更可部署的大规模 AI 模型铺平了道路。

papers.title: Enabling Ahead Prediction with Practical Energy Constraints.
papers.abstract: Accurate branch predictors require multiple cycles to produce a prediction, and that latency hurts processor performance. "Ahead prediction" solves the performance problem by starting the prediction early. Unfortunately, this means making the prediction without the directions of the N branches between when the prediction starts and when the relevant branch’s prediction is needed. The energy required to consider all 2 n possible cases increases by 14.6x, making ahead prediction not viable. This paper shows that most of the intermediate branch directions never materialize, reducing the number of observed missing history patterns significantly (usually, only one or two). We modified the TAGE predictor to eliminate those branches from having to be considered. The result, our ahead predictor can produce a performance benefit of 4.4%, while causing an increase in energy consumption of only 1.5x, far less than the 14.6x that was thought to be necessary, and very much viable.
papers.abstract_zh: 准确的分支预测器需要多个周期才能产生预测，而这种延迟会损害处理器性能。 “提前预测”通过提前开始预测来解决性能问题。不幸的是，这意味着在预测开始和需要相关分支预测之间的 N 个分支的方向没有的情况下进行预测。考虑所有 2 n 种可能情况所需的能量增加了 14.6 倍，使得提前预测不可行。本文表明，大多数中间分支方向从未实现，从而显着减少了观察到的缺失历史模式的数量（通常只有一两个）。我们修改了 TAGE 预测器以消除必须考虑的那些分支。结果，我们的超前预测器可以产生 4.4% 的性能优势，同时导致能耗仅增加 1.5 倍，远低于人们认为必要的 14.6 倍，而且非常可行。

papers.title: EOD: Enabling Low Latency GNN Inference via Near-Memory Concatenate Aggregation.
papers.abstract:
As online services based on graph databases increasingly integrate with machine learning, serving low-latency Graph Neural Network (GNN) inference for individual requests has become a critical challenge. Real-time GNN inference services operate in an inductive setup, which can handle newly added, previously unseen nodes and their edges. In this setup, the system must prepare the computational graph and input node features for target nodes, followed by GNN inference using the given input data. However, the workflow of a GNN serving system presents two key challenges that hinder low-latency inference. The first challenge arises from the extensive preparation step, which involves heavy memory access in host memory and significant data I/O to devices, constituting the largest portion of end-to-end inference latency. The second challenge is the well-known neighborhood explosion problem in GNN research. As the receptive field for target nodes increases exponentially with the number of layers, this issue exacerbates overall latency.

To address these challenges, we propose a Near-Memory Processing (NMP) based low-latency GNN inference serving system named EOD. To ensure low-latency real-time GNN service, we co-design the algorithm and hardware to tackle the aforementioned issues. First, to mitigate the neighborhood explosion problem, we propose a precomputation method for the training node set, reducing memory access and computational complexity from exponential to linear growth. Additionally, we introduce a concatenated ZVC compression method to minimize the overhead of storing precomputed hidden features. Finally, to alleviate heavy host-side memory access and data I/O, we design an NMP architecture that enables efficient aggregation on concatenated ZVC-compressed data. As a result, EOD achieves a geometric mean of 981.1 × and 912.0 × aggregation speedup over the baseline and the existing architecture for GNN aggregation. Additionally, EOD achieves a geometric mean of 17.9 ×, and up to 74.3 × end-to-end latency speedup over the GPU baseline.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着基于图数据库的在线服务越来越多地与机器学习集成，为单个请求提供低延迟图神经网络（GNN）推理已成为一项关键挑战。实时 GNN 推理服务在归纳设置中运行，可以处理新添加的、以前未见过的节点及其边缘。在此设置中，系统必须准备目标节点的计算图和输入节点特征，然后使用给定的输入数据进行 GNN 推理。然而，GNN 服务系统的工作流程提出了阻碍低延迟推理的两个关键挑战。第一个挑战来自大量的准备步骤，其中涉及主机内存中的大量内存访问和设备的大量数据 I/O，构成了端到端推理延迟的最大部分。第二个挑战是GNN研究中众所周知的邻域爆炸问题。由于目标节点的感受野随着层数呈指数增长，因此这个问题会加剧整体延迟。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于近内存处理（NMP）的低延迟 GNN 推理服务系统，名为 EOD。为了确保低延迟的实时 GNN 服务，我们共同设计了算法和硬件来解决上述问题。首先，为了缓解邻域爆炸问题，我们提出了一种训练节点集的预计算方法，将内存访问和计算复杂度从指数增长减少到线性增长。此外，我们引入了级联 ZVC 压缩方法，以最大限度地减少存储预先计算的隐藏特征的开销。最后，为了减轻繁重的主机端内存访问和数据 I/O，我们设计了一种 NMP 架构，可以对串联的 ZVC 压缩数据进行高效聚合。结果，EOD 比基线和现有的 GNN 聚合架构实现了 981.1 × 和 912.0 × 几何平均的聚合加速。此外，EOD 的几何平均值比 GPU 基线提高了 17.9 倍，端到端延迟加速高达 74.3 倍。

papers.title: Evaluating Ruche Networks: Physically Scalable, Cost-Effective, Bandwidth-Flexible NoCs.
papers.abstract:
2-D mesh has been widely used as an on-chip network topology, because of its low design complexity and physical scalability. However, its poor latency and throughput scaling have been well-noted in the past. Previous solutions to overcome its unscalability relied on outdated assumptions that no longer hold true in recent architectures. Concentrated routers make an assumption that low injection rate would cause low conflicts; however, recent manycore processors and accelerators require streaming bandwidth for their data-intensive workloads. Widening the channel width to recover the bisection bandwidth halved by concentration assumes that the underlying architecture can flexibly adapt to the wider channel width; however, it comes with an additional cost associated with wider datapaths, serialization, and additional buffering.

Ruche Networks retain all the desirable properties of 2-D mesh to remain physically scalable, yet provide an architecturally flexible and cost-effective mechanism to effortlessly scale up the network performance by adding uniform long-range physical links. While their feasibility in real silicon has been demonstrated, there has not been any detailed evaluation of its network performance, scalability, and energy efficiency. This paper aims to fill the gap in research by providing some insight on design tradeoffs. Using RTL-level implementations, we demonstrate that Ruche Networks are superior to 2-D mesh and torus in terms of power, area efficiency, cycle time and network performance.
papers.abstract_zh:
二维网格因其低设计复杂性和物理可扩展性而被广泛用作片上网络拓扑。然而，其糟糕的延迟和吞吐量扩展在过去已经引起了人们的注意。以前克服其不可扩展性的解决方案依赖于过时的假设，这些假设在最近的架构中不再适用。集中路由器假设低注入率会导致低冲突；然而，最近的多核处理器和加速器需要流带宽来处理其数据密集型工作负载。加宽沟道宽度以恢复集中减半的二等分带宽，假设底层架构可以灵活适应更宽的沟道宽度；然而，它会带来与更宽的数据路径、序列化和额外缓冲相关的额外成本。

Ruche Networks 保留了 2D 网格的所有所需属性以保持物理可扩展性，同时提供架构上灵活且经济高效的机制，通过添加统一的远程物理链路轻松扩展网络性能。虽然它们在实际芯片中的可行性已经得到证明，但尚未对其网络性能、可扩展性和能源效率进行任何详细评估。本文旨在通过提供一些关于设计权衡的见解来填补研究空白​​。使用 RTL 级实现，我们证明了 Ruche 网络在功耗、面积效率、周期时间和网络性能方面优于 2-D 网格和环面。

papers.title: Fair-CO2: Fair Attribution for Cloud Carbon Emissions.
papers.abstract: Fair-CO 2 is a system for fairly attributing operational and embodied carbon in cloud data centers to user workloads. It leverages the Shapley value, a game theory solution for fair shared cost attribution with theoretical fairness guarantees. We propose the standard Shapley value solution as a ground truth for attribution in cloud data centers, addressing two key gaps in existing carbon attribution methods that lead to unfair attributions: the effect of dynamic demand on embodied carbon, and interference effects in colocated scenarios. However, the computational cost of the Shapley value solution scales exponentially with the number of workloads and becomes intractable for large systems. Fair-CO 2 addresses the scalability challenges of the Shapley value while preserving its fairness benefits via two core components: demand-aware embodied carbon attribution and interference-aware resource cost attribution. Using Monte Carlo simulations of workload schedules and colocation scenarios, we show that Fair-CO 2 can approximate the ground truth Shapley attribution solution at scale. We also show how users, once provided a fair way of estimating their workload carbon footprint, can dynamically optimize workload deployment for carbon savings.
papers.abstract_zh: Fair-CO 2 是一个将云数据中心的运营碳和隐含碳公平地分配给用户工作负载的系统。它利用了 Shapley 值，这是一种具有理论公平性保证的公平共享成本归因的博弈论解决方案。我们提出标准 Shapley 值解决方案作为云数据中心归因的基本事实，解决现有碳归因方法中导致不公平归因的两个关键缺陷：动态需求对隐含碳的影响以及共置场景中的干扰效应。然而，Shapley 值解决方案的计算成本随着工作负载的数量呈指数级增长，并且对于大型系统来说变得棘手。 Fair-CO 2 解决了 Shapley 值的可扩展性挑战，同时通过两个核心组件保持其公平性优势：需求感知的碳归因和干扰感知的资源成本归因。通过对工作负载计划和主机托管场景进行蒙特卡罗模拟，我们表明 Fair-CO 2 可以大规模逼近真实的 Shapley 归因解决方案。我们还展示了用户一旦提供了一种公平的方法来估计其工作负载碳足迹，就可以动态优化工作负载部署以节省碳排放。

papers.title: FAST: An FHE Accelerator for Scalable-parallelism with Tunable-bit.
papers.abstract:
Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables direct computation on encrypted data, providing substantial security advantages in cloud-based modern society. However, FHE suffers from significant computational overhead compared to plaintext computation, hindering its adoption in real-world applications. While many accelerators have been designed to address performance bottlenecks, most do not fully leverage cryptographic optimization technologies, leaving room for further performance enhancements.

In this work, we propose FAST, an FHE accelerator incorporating recent cryptographic optimizations, including hoisting technology and the gadget decomposition key-switching method (named KLSS method). We analyze ciphertext level consumption throughout application execution and observe that workload requirements vary significantly with different ciphertext levels for both hybrid and KLSS key-switching methods. Additionally, we note the differing computational precision requirements for these key-switching methods. Based on these observations, we designed a versatile framework that supports multiple key-switching methods during a single application execution and integrates hoisting technology. Furthermore, we developed a scalable, precision-tunable multiplier to accommodate the needs of hybrid and KLSS key-switching methods. FAST architecture features a specialized multiplier and novel data organization to exploit cryptographic optimizations effectively. To our knowledge, this is the first accelerator to support hoisting technology and the gadget decomposition key-switching method. Our solution achieves a significant performance improvement, averaging a 1.8 × speedup.
papers.abstract_zh:
完全同态加密 (FHE) 可以对加密数据进行直接计算，在基于云的现代社会中提供显着的安全优势。然而，与明文计算相比，FHE 的计算开销很大，阻碍了其在实际应用中的采用。尽管许多加速器旨在解决性能瓶颈，但大多数加速器并未充分利用加密优化技术，从而为进一步增强性能留下了空间。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 FAST，一种融合了最新密码优化的 FHE 加速器，包括提升技术和小工具分解密钥切换方法（称为 KLSS 方法）。我们分析了整个应用程序执行过程中的密文级别消耗，并观察到混合和 KLSS 密钥切换方法的工作负载需求随着不同密文级别的变化而显着变化。此外，我们注意到这些按键切换方法的不同计算精度要求。基于这些观察，我们设计了一个多功能框架，在单个应用程序执行期间支持多种按键切换方法，并集成了提升技术。此外，我们还开发了一种可扩展、可精确调节的乘法器，以满足混合和 KLSS 按键切换方法的需求。 FAST 架构具有专门的乘法器和新颖的数据组织，可以有效地利用加密优化。据我们所知，这是第一个支持提升技术和小工具分解按键切换方法的加速器。我们的解决方案实现了显着的性能改进，平均速度提高了 1.8 倍。

papers.title: FATE: Boosting the Performance of Hyper-Dimensional Computing Intelligence with Flexible Numerical DAta TypE.
papers.abstract:
Hyper-Dimensional Computing (HDC) is a promising brain-inspired learning framework designed for efficient, hardware-friendly computation. By utilizing highly parallel operations, HDC encodes raw data into a hyper-dimensional space, facilitating efficient training and inference processes. However, the high precision required for representing high-dimensional vectors presents challenges for implementing HDC on resource-constrained edge devices, mainly due to the significant computational cost of performing multiplication for cosine similarity calculations. On the other hand, binary HDC offers lower costs but sacrifices accuracy.

This paper addresses these challenges by focusing on data quantization, a hardware-efficient compression technique that incorporates sparsity to effectively balance cost and accuracy on embedded FPGA. Unlike existing methods that employ the same quantization scheme for all dimensions, we propose a novel solution that applies different numerical data types to different dimensions of data representations. This approach is motivated by two factors: (1) the varying importance among dimensions and (2) the potential for better utilization of heterogeneous FPGA hardware resources. To achieve this, we propose FATE , an algorithm/architecture co-designed solution that utilizes low-precision data types for less important dimensions, enabling the replacement of multiplication operations with logic calculations. This approach leverages FPGA Look-Up Table (LUT) resources for efficient implementation. The key insight of FATE is that dimensions with high importance require high-precision data types, while the low-importance dimensions do not, allowing them to be sacrificed for low hardware overheads. Furthermore, to maximize resource utilization, we design a workload-aware mixed quantization scheme that offers flexible compression based on these differences in dimensional importance. The proposed quantization framework is seamlessly integrated into the existing FPGA implementations, leveraging the heterogeneous resources available (LUTs and DSPs) for low-precision and high-precision dimensions, respectively. We evaluate FATE across multiple application domains. With optimized data type ratios on the Kintex-7 FPGA device, our design results in up to \(50\%\) speedup and \(53.79\%\) energy saving, while maintaining accuracy compared to solely exploiting DSPs for all dimension computations.
papers.abstract_zh:
超维计算（HDC）是一种很有前景的类脑学习框架，专为高效、硬件友好的计算而设计。通过利用高度并行操作，HDC 将原始数据编码到超维空间中，促进高效的训练和推理过程。然而，表示高维向量所需的高精度给在资源受限的边缘设备上实现 HDC 带来了挑战，这主要是由于执行余弦相似度计算的乘法的计算成本很高。另一方面，二进制 HDC 成本较低，但会牺牲准确性。

本文通过关注数据量化来解决这些挑战，数据量化是一种硬件高效的压缩技术，它结合了稀疏性，可以有效平衡嵌入式 FPGA 的成本和准确性。与对所有维度采用相同量化方案的现有方法不同，我们提出了一种新颖的解决方案，将不同的数值数据类型应用于数据表示的不同维度。这种方法的动机有两个：(1) 维度之间的重要性不同；(2) 更好地利用异构 FPGA 硬件资源的潜力。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 FATE，这是一种算法/架构共同设计的解决方案，它利用低精度数据类型来处理不太重要的维度，从而能够用逻辑计算代替乘法运算。该方法利用 FPGA 查找表 (LUT) 资源来实现高效实施。 FATE 的关键见解是，高重要性的维度需要高精度的数据类型，而低重要性的维度则不需要，从而允许牺牲它们以换取低硬件开销。此外，为了最大限度地提高资源利用率，我们设计了一种工作负载感知的混合量化方案，该方案根据维度重要性的差异提供灵活的压缩。所提出的量化框架无缝集成到现有的 FPGA 实现中，分别利用可用的异构资源（LUT 和 DSP）来实现低精度和高精度维度。我们跨多个应用领域评估 FATE。通过在 Kintex-7 FPGA 器件上优化数据类型比率，我们的设计可实现高达 \(50\%\) 的加速和 \(53.79\%\) 节能，同时与单独利用 DSP 进行所有维度计算相比，保持准确性。

papers.title: Finesse: An Agile Design Framework for Pairing-based Cryptography via Software/Hardware Co-Design.
papers.abstract:
Pairing-based cryptography (PBC) is crucial in modern cryptographic applications. With the rapid advancement of adversarial research and the growing diversity of application requirements, PBC accelerators need regular updates in algorithms, parameter configurations, and hardware design. However, traditional design methodologies face significant challenges, including prolonged design cycles, difficulties in balancing performance and flexibility, and insufficient support for potential architectural exploration.

To address these challenges, we introduce Finesse , an agile design framework based on co-design methodology. Finesse leverages a co-optimization cycle driven by a specialized compiler and a multi-granularity hardware simulator, enabling both optimized performance metrics and effective design space exploration. Furthermore, Finesse adopts a modular design flow to significantly shorten design cycles, while its versatile abstraction ensures flexibility across various curve families and hardware architectures.

Finesse offers flexibility, efficiency, and rapid prototyping, comparing with previous frameworks. With compilation times reduced to minutes, Finesse enables faster iteration cycles and streamlined hardware-software co-design. Experiments on popular curves demonstrate its effectiveness, achieving 34 × improvement in throughput and 6.2 × increase in area efficiency compared to previous flexible frameworks, while outperforming state-of-the-art non-flexible ASIC designs with a 3 × gain in throughput and 3.2 × improvement in area efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于配对的密码学 (PBC) 在现代密码学应用中至关重要。随着对抗性研究的快速推进和应用需求的日益多样化，PBC加速器需要在算法、参数配置和硬件设计上定期更新。然而，传统的设计方法面临着重大挑战，包括设计周期延长、平衡性能和灵活性困难以及对潜在架构探索的支持不足。

为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 Finesse，一个基于协同设计方法的敏捷设计框架。 Finesse 利用由专用编译器和多粒度硬件模拟器驱动的协同优化周期，实现优化的性能指标和有效的设计空间探索。此外，Finesse 采用模块化设计流程，显着缩短设计周期，而其多功能抽象确保了跨各种曲线系列和硬件架构的灵活性。

与以前的框架相比，Finesse 提供了灵活性、效率和快速原型设计。 Finesse 的编译时间缩短至几分钟，可实现更快的迭代周期并简化硬件-软件协同设计。对流行曲线的实验证明了其有效性，与以前的灵活框架相比，吞吐量提高了 34 倍，面积效率提高了 6.2 倍，同时吞吐量提高了 3 倍，面积效率提高了 3.2 倍，性能优于最先进的非灵活 ASIC 设计。

papers.title: FlexNeRFer: A Multi-Dataflow, Adaptive Sparsity-Aware Accelerator for On-Device NeRF Rendering.
papers.abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF), an AI-driven approach for 3D view reconstruction, has demonstrated impressive performance, sparking active research across fields. As a result, a range of advanced NeRF models has emerged, leading on-device applications to increasingly adopt NeRF for highly realistic scene reconstructions. With the advent of diverse NeRF models, NeRF-based applications leverage a variety of NeRF frameworks, creating the need for hardware capable of efficiently supporting these models. However, GPUs fail to meet the performance, power, and area (PPA) cost demanded by these on-device applications, or are specialized for specific NeRF algorithms, resulting in lower efficiency when applied to other NeRF models. To address this limitation, in this work, we introduce FlexNeRFer , an energy-efficient versatile NeRF accelerator. The key components enabling the enhancement of FlexNeRFer include: i) a flexible network-on-chip (NoC) supporting multi-dataflow and sparsity on precision-scalable MAC array, and ii) efficient data storage using an optimal sparsity format based on the sparsity ratio and precision modes. To evaluate the effectiveness of FlexNeRFer, we performed a layout implementation using 28nm CMOS technology. Our evaluation shows that FlexNeRFer achieves 8.2 ∼ 243.3 × speedup and 24.1 ∼ 520.3 × improvement in energy efficiency over a GPU (i.e., NVIDIA RTX 2080 Ti), while demonstrating 4.2 ∼ 86.9 × speedup and 2.3 ∼ 47.5 × improvement in energy efficiency compared to a state-of-the-art NeRF accelerator (i.e., NeuRex).
papers.abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 是一种人工智能驱动的 3D 视图重建方法，已展现出令人印象深刻的性能，引发了跨领域的积极研究。因此，出现了一系列先进的 NeRF 模型，导致设备上的应用程序越来越多地采用 NeRF 进行高度逼真的场景重建。随着各种 NeRF 模型的出现，基于 NeRF 的应用程序利用各种 NeRF 框架，从而产生了对能够有效支持这些模型的硬件的需求。然而，GPU无法满足这些设备端应用所需的性能、功耗和面积（PPA）成本，或者专门针对特定的NeRF算法，导致应用于其他NeRF模型时效率较低。为了解决这个限制，在这项工作中，我们引入了 FlexNeRFer，一种节能的多功能 NeRF 加速器。增强 FlexNeRFer 的关键组件包括：i) 灵活的片上网络 (NoC)，支持精确可扩展 MAC 阵列上的多数据流和稀疏性；ii) 使用基于稀疏率和精度模式的最佳稀疏格式进行高效数据存储。为了评估 FlexNeRFer 的有效性，我们使用 28nm CMOS 技术进行了布局实施。我们的评估表明，与 GPU（即 NVIDIA RTX 2080 Ti）相比，FlexNeRFer 实现了 8.2 ∼ 243.3 × 加速比和 24.1 ∼ 520.3 × 能效提升，同时与最先进的 NeRF 加速器（即，神经雷克斯）。

papers.title: Folded Banks: 3D-Stacked HBM Design for Fine-Grained Random-Access Bandwidth.
papers.abstract:
Despite significant improvements in peak bandwidth, the HBM industry has neglected random-access (irregular) bandwidth, limiting performance in many real-world applications. Improving effective HBM bandwidth is challenging due to power-constrained activations and coarse-grained, long-distance data movement. Rather than addressing these issues directly, hardware vendors have opted for incremental changes, achieving a 6.4 × increase in sequential access bandwidth over two generations while leaving the irregular bandwidth challenges unresolved.

To remedy this, we introduce Folded Banks (FB-HBM) , a novel 3D bank design that redistributes bank subarrays (“folds”) across multiple dies and relocates command, control, and global sense amplifiers to an additional base layer. By implementing this logic in a new base layer, we eliminate the DRAM die overheads inherent in previous designs. This architecture enables vertical routing of intra-bank wires—column select lines (CSLs) and master data lines (MDLs)—through thin-pitch through-silicon vias (TSVs) and hybrid bonds, significantly reducing RC power losses. By employing self-timed sense amplifiers, we eliminate costly dummy subarrays previously required for reference voltages. Furthermore, our distributed TSV architecture minimizes inter-bank data movement and we reduce HBM row size and activation energy by selectively disabling memory arrays (MATs) within a bank.

Compared to a projected HBM4 design, FB-HBM achieves a 6.7 × improvement in random-access performance with a conservative 5 µm TSV pitch. This architectural advantage translates to a 2.28 × speedup across high-performance computing (HPC) and sparse machine learning applications.
papers.abstract_zh:
尽管峰值带宽有了显着改进，HBM 行业却忽略了随机访问（不规则）带宽，从而限制了许多实际应用中的性能。由于功率受限的激活和粗粒度的长距离数据移动，提高有效 HBM 带宽具有挑战性。硬件供应商没有直接解决这些问题，而是选择渐进式更改，在两代产品中实现了顺序访问带宽 6.4 倍的增长，同时留下了未解决的不规则带宽挑战。

为了解决这个问题，我们引入了折叠组 (FB-HBM)，这是一种新颖的 3D 组设计，可在多个芯片上重新分配组子阵列（“折叠”），并将命令、控制和全局感测放大器重新定位到额外的基础层。通过在新的基础层中实现此逻辑，我们消除了先前设计中固有的 DRAM 芯片开销。该架构支持通过薄间距硅通孔 (TSV) 和混合键对组内线路（列选择线 (CSL) 和主数据线 (MDL)）进行垂直布线，从而显着降低 RC 功率损耗。通过采用自定时读出放大器，我们消除了先前参考电压所需的昂贵的虚拟子阵列。此外，我们的分布式 TSV 架构最大限度地减少了存储体间的数据移动，并且我们通过有选择地禁用存储体内的内存阵列 (MAT) 来减少 HBM 行大小和激活能量。

与预计的 HBM4 设计相比，FB-HBM 采用保守的 5 µm TSV 间距，随机存取性能提高了 6.7 倍。这种架构优势可在高性能计算 (HPC) 和稀疏机器学习应用程序中实现 2.28 倍的加速。

papers.title: Forest: Access-aware GPU UVM Management.
papers.abstract: With GPU unified virtual memory (UVM), CPU and GPU can share a flat virtual address space. UVM enables the GPUs to utilize the larger CPU system memory as an expanded memory space. However, UVM’s on-demand page migration is accompanied by expensive page fault handling overhead. To mitigate such overhead, tree-based neighboring prefetcher (TBNp) has been used by GPUs. TBNp effectively reduces page faults by exploiting locality at multiple levels. However, we observe its access-pattern oblivious design leads to excessive page thrashing and unnecessary migrations. In this paper, we tackle the inefficiencies with a novel access-aware UVM management, Forest . Forest uses a software-hardware codesign to configure the optimal tree prefetchers at runtime based on each data object’s access patterns. With the heterogeneous tree-based prefetching, Forest provides 1.86 × and 1.39 × speedups over the baseline TBNp and state-of-the-art optimization solutions, respectively. Forest also shows a 1.51 × speedup for real-world deep learning models, including CNNs and Transformers.
papers.abstract_zh: 借助 GPU 统一虚拟内存 (UVM)，CPU 和 GPU 可以共享平坦的虚拟地址空间。 UVM 使 GPU 能够利用更大的 CPU 系统内存作为扩展的内存空间。然而，UVM 的按需页面迁移伴随着昂贵的页面错误处理开销。为了减轻此类开销，GPU 使用了基于树的相邻预取器 (TBNp)。 TBNp 通过利用多个级别的局部性有效减少页面错误。然而，我们观察到其访问模式的不经意设计会导致过度的页面抖动和不必要的迁移。在本文中，我们通过一种新颖的访问感知 UVM 管理 Forest 来解决效率低下的问题。 Forest 使用软件-硬件协同设计，根据每个数据对象的访问模式在运行时配置最佳树预取器。通过基于异构树的预取，Forest 分别比基线 TBNp 和最先进的优化解决方案提供 1.86 × 和 1.39 × 的加速。 Forest 还展示了现实世界深度学习模型（包括 CNN 和 Transformer）的 1.51 倍加速。

papers.title: FRED: A Wafer-scale Fabric for 3D Parallel DNN Training.
papers.abstract: Wafer-scale systems are an emerging technology that tightly integrates high-end accelerator chiplets with high-speed wafer-scale interconnects, enabling low-latency and high-bandwidth connectivity. This makes them a promising platform for deep neural network (DNN) training. However, current network-on-wafer topologies, such as 2D Meshes, lack the flexibility needed to support various parallelization strategies effectively. In this paper, we propose Fred , a wafer-scale fabric architecture tailored to the unique communication needs of DNN training. Fred creates a distributed on-wafer topology with tiny microswitches, providing nonblocking connectivity for collective communications between arbitrary groups of accelerators and enabling in-switch collective support. Our results show that for sample parallelization strategies, Fred can improve the average end-to-end training time of ResNet-152, Transformer-17B, GPT-3, and Transformer-1T by 1.76 ×, 1.87 ×, 1.34 ×, and 1.4 ×, respectively, compared to a baseline wafer-scale Mesh.
papers.abstract_zh: 晶圆级系统是一项新兴技术，它将高端加速器小芯片与高速晶圆级互连紧密集成，从而实现低延迟和高带宽连接。这使它们成为深度神经网络（DNN）训练的有前途的平台。然而，当前的晶圆上网络拓扑（例如 2D 网格）缺乏有效支持各种并行化策略所需的灵活性。在本文中，我们提出了 Fred，这是一种针对 DNN 训练的独特通信需求量身定制的晶圆级结构架构。 Fred 创建了带有微型微开关的分布式晶圆上拓扑，为任意加速器组之间的集体通信提供无阻塞连接，并实现交换机内集体支持。我们的结果表明，对于样本并行化策略，与基准晶圆级网格相比，Fred 可以将 ResNet-152、Transformer-17B、GPT-3 和 Transformer-1T 的平均端到端训练时间分别提高 1.76 ×、1.87 ×、1.34 × 和 1.4 ×。

papers.title: Garibaldi: A Pairwise Instruction-Data Management for Enhancing Shared Last-Level Cache Performance in Server Workloads.
papers.abstract:
Modern CPUs suffer from the frontend bottleneck because the instruction footprint of server workloads exceeds the private cache capacity. Prior works have examined the CPU components or private cache to improve the instruction hit rate. The large footprint leads to significant cache misses not only in the core and faster-level cache but also in the last-level cache (LLC). We observe that even with an advanced branch predictor and instruction prefetching techniques, a considerable amount of instruction accesses descend to the LLC. However, state-of-the-art LLC designs with elaborate data management overlook handling the instruction misses that precede corresponding data accesses. Specifically, when an instruction requiring numerous data accesses is missed, the frontend of a CPU should wait for the instruction fetch, regardless of how much data are present in the LLC.

To preserve hot instructions in the LLC, we propose Garibaldi , a novel pairwise instruction-data management scheme. Garibaldi tracks the hotness of instruction accesses by coupling it with that of data accesses and adopts management techniques. On the one hand, this scheme includes a selective protection mechanism that prevents the cache evictions of high-cost instruction cachelines. On the other hand, in the case of unprotected instruction line misses, Garibaldi conservatively issues prefetch requests of the paired data lines while handling those misses. In our experiments, we evaluate Garibaldi with 16 server workloads on a 40-core machine. We also implement Garibaldi on top of a modern LLC design, including Mockingjay. Garibaldi improves 13.2% and 6.1% of CPU performance on baseline LLC design and Mockingjay, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代 CPU 遭受前端瓶颈的困扰，因为服务器工作负载的指令占用量超出了专用缓存容量。之前的工作已经检查了CPU组件或私有缓存以提高指令命中率。较大的占用空间不仅会导致核心和更快级高速缓存中出现严重的高速缓存未命中，还会导致末级高速缓存 (LLC) 中出现严重的高速缓存未命中。我们观察到，即使使用先进的分支预测器和指令预取技术，大量的指令访问也会下降到 LLC。然而，具有精细数据管理的最先进的 LLC 设计忽略了对相应数据访问之前的指令缺失的处理。具体来说，当需要大量数据访问的指令丢失时，无论 LLC 中存在多少数据，CPU 的前端都应该等待指令获取。

为了在 LLC 中保留热指令，我们提出了 Garibaldi，一种新颖的成对指令数据管理方案。 Garibaldi 通过将指令访问与数据访问的热度耦合来跟踪指令访问的热度并采用管理技术。一方面，该方案包括选择性保护机制，可防止高成本指令高速缓存行的高速缓存逐出。另一方面，在未受保护的指令线未命中的情况下，Garibaldi 在处理这些未命中时保守地发出成对数据线的预取请求。在我们的实验中，我们在 40 核机器上使用 16 个服务器工作负载来评估 Garibaldi。我们还在现代 LLC 设计（包括 Mockingjay）之上实施 Garibaldi。 Garibaldi 在基线 LLC 设计和 Mockingjay 上分别提高了 13.2% 和 6.1% 的 CPU 性能。

papers.title: GCStack+GCScaler: Fast and Accurate GPU Performance Analyses Using Fine-Grained Stall Cycle Accounting and Interval Analysis.
papers.abstract:
To design next-generation Graphics Processing Units (GPUs), GPU architects rely on GPU performance analyses to identify key GPU performance bottlenecks and explore GPU design spaces. Unfortunately, the existing GPU performance analysis mechanisms make it difficult for GPU architects to conduct fast and accurate GPU performance analyses. The existing mechanisms can provide misleading insights into GPU performance bottlenecks. They characterize the performance-degrading stall events of a GPU using coarse-grained, issue-stage-centric, and priority-based cycle stacks which tend to exaggerate memory-side stall events and hide concurrently occurring stall events. The existing mechanisms also incur high GPU design space exploration overhead, as they involve repetitive cycle-level timing simulations for evaluating alternative GPU designs.

In this paper, we propose two GPU performance analysis mechanisms, namely GCStack and GCScaler . The two mechanisms enable fast and accurate GPU performance analyses by (1) accurately characterizing the performance bottlenecks of a baseline GPU using fine-grained stall cycle accounting, and (2) accurately scaling the stall cycles of the baseline GPU using interval analysis and analytical scaling models. GCStack captures all the concurrently occurring stall events within each stall cycle, and characterizes the performance as a fine-grained cycle stack. Using the fine-grained cycle stack, GCScaler leverages the existing GPU interval analysis techniques’ accurate stall cycle scaling capability to estimate the cycle stack for an alternative GPU design. GCScaler further employs analytical scaling models designed to scale the idle and synchronization stall cycles accurately. Our evaluation using 47 benchmarks shows that GCStack and GCScaler accelerate an exploration of 1,000 GPU designs by 32.7× over repetitive timing simulations while achieving a low mean absolute performance estimation error rate of 6.37%.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了设计下一代图形处理单元 (GPU)，GPU 架构师依靠 GPU 性能分析来识别关键 GPU 性能瓶颈并探索 GPU 设计空间。不幸的是，现有的GPU性能分析机制使得GPU架构师很难进行快速、准确的GPU性能分析。现有机制可能会对 GPU 性能瓶颈提供误导性的见解。他们使用粗粒度、以问题阶段为中心和基于优先级的循环堆栈来描述 GPU 性能下降的停顿事件，这些循环堆栈往往会夸大内存端停顿事件并隐藏同时发生的停顿事件。现有机制还会带来较高的 GPU 设计空间探索开销，因为它们涉及用于评估替代 GPU 设计的重复周期级时序模拟。

在本文中，我们提出了两种GPU性能分析机制，即GCStack和GCScaler。这两种机制通过以下方式实现快速、准确的 GPU 性能分析：(1) 使用细粒度停顿周期计算准确表征基线 GPU 的性能瓶颈，以及 (2) 使用区间分析和分析缩放模型准确缩放基线 GPU 的停顿周期。 GCStack 捕获每个停顿周期内所有同时发生的停顿事件，并将性能描述为细粒度的周期堆栈。使用细粒度的周期堆栈，GCScaler 利用现有 GPU 间隔分析技术的精确停顿周期缩放功能来估计替代 GPU 设计的周期堆栈。 GCScaler 进一步采用分析缩放模型，旨在准确缩放空闲和同步停顿周期。我们使用 47 个基准测试进行的评估表明，GCStack 和 GCScaler 对 1,000 个 GPU 设计的探索速度比重复时序模拟提高了 32.7 倍，同时实现了 6.37% 的低平均绝对性能估计错误率。

papers.title: Genesis: A Compiler for Hamiltonian Simulation on Hybrid CV-DV Quantum Computers.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Genesis, the first compiler designed to support Hamiltonian Simulation on hybrid continuous-variable (CV) and discrete-variable (DV) quantum computing systems. Genesis is a two-level compilation system. At the first level, it decomposes an input Hamiltonian into basis gates using the native instruction set of the target hybrid CV-DV quantum computer. At the second level, it tackles the mapping and routing of qumodes/qubits to implement long-range interactions for the gates decomposed from the first level. Rather than a typical implementation that relies on SWAP primitives similar to qubit-based (or DV-only) systems, we propose an integrated design of connectivity-aware gate synthesis and beamsplitter SWAP insertion tailored for hybrid CV-DV systems. We also introduce an OpenQASM-like domain-specific language (DSL) named CVDV-QASM to represent Hamiltonian in terms of Pauli-exponentials and basic gate sequences from the hybrid CV-DV gate set. Genesis has successfully compiled several important Hamiltonians, including the Bose-Hubbard model, \(\mathbb {Z}_2-\) Higgs model, Hubbard-Holstein model, Heisenberg model and Electron-vibration coupling Hamiltonians, which are critical in domains like quantum field theory, condensed matter physics, and quantum chemistry. Our implementation is available at Genesis-CVDV-Compiler https://github.com/ruadapt/Genesis-CVDV-Compiler.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Genesis，这是第一个旨在支持混合连续变量 (CV) 和离散变量 (DV) 量子计算系统上的哈密顿模拟的编译器。 Genesis 是一个两级编译系统。在第一级，它使用目标混合 CV-DV 量子计算机的本机指令集将输入哈密顿量分解为基门。在第二层，它处理量子模式/量子位的映射和路由，以实现从第一层分解的门的远程交互。我们提出了一种针对混合 CV-DV 系统量身定制的连接感知门合成和分束器 SWAP 插入的集成设计，而不是依赖于类似于基于量子位（或仅 DV）系统的 SWAP 原语的典型实现。我们还引入了一种名为 CVDV-QASM 的类似 OpenQASM 的领域特定语言 (DSL)，以泡利指数和混合 CV-DV 门集中的基本门序列来表示哈密顿量。 Genesis已成功编译了多个重要的哈密顿量，包括Bose-Hubbard模型、\(\mathbb {Z}_2-\) Higgs模型、Hubbard-Holstein模型、海森堡模型和电子振动耦合哈密顿量，这些在量子场论、凝聚态物理和量子化学等领域至关重要。我们的实现可以在 Genesis-CVDV-Compiler https://github.com/ruadapt/Genesis-CVDV-Compiler 上找到。

papers.title: GPUs All Grown-Up: Fully Device-Driven SpMV Using GPU Work Graphs.
papers.abstract: Sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) is a key operation across high-performance computing, graph analytics, and many more applications. In these applications, the matrix characteristics, notably non-zero elements per row, can vary widely and impact which algorithm performs best. Thus, Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) SpMV algorithms often rely on costly preprocessing to determine what per-row algorithm to select to achieve high performance. In this work we combine SpMV preprocessing and the subsequent per-row processing on the GPU by leveraging the novel “Work Graphs” GPU programming model—initially designed for graphics applications—for dynamic on-device self-scheduling. Work Graphs allow for fine-grain dataflow execution of individual workgroups using emerging hardware and firmware support. As soon as preprocessing has generated sufficient work, workgroups of individual processing kernels are self-scheduled and executed, interleaved with those of other kernels. This improves cache locality and eliminates host interaction altogether. Across a suite of 59 sparse matrices, the best of various novel Work Graphs SpMV implementations outperforms state-of-the-art rocSPARSE “LRB” for a single SpMV by up to 7.19 × (mean: 3.35 ×, SD: 1.89). Furthermore, it achieves much more stable performance across various sparsity patterns than the rocSPARSE CSR-General algorithm, and even beats the advanced rocSPARSE CSR-Adaptive algorithm for up to 92 consecutive SpMV calculations. In addition, compared to rocSPARSE LRB, it reduces code complexity by 75%. Its memory footprint for supporting data structures is a fixed ∼ 25 MiB independent of matrix size, compared to rocSPARSE LRB’s data structures that scale with matrix size to hundreds of megabytes. Overall, this work showcases the performance potential of emerging dynamic on-device scheduling techniques for GPU compute applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 是高性能计算、图形分析和许多其他应用程序的关键运算。在这些应用中，矩阵特征（尤其是每行的非零元素）可能变化很大，并影响哪种算法表现最佳。因此，图形处理单元 (GPU) SpMV 算法通常依赖于成本高昂的预处理来确定选择哪种每行算法来实现高性能。在这项工作中，我们利用新颖的“工作图”GPU 编程模型（最初为图形应用程序设计）将 SpMV 预处理和随后在 GPU 上的每行处理相结合，以实现动态设备上自调度。工作图允许使用新兴硬件和固件支持对各个工作组进行细粒度数据流执行。一旦预处理产生了足够的工作，各个处理内核的工作组就会自我调度和执行，并与其他内核的工作组交错。这提高了缓存局部性并完全消除了主机交互。在一组 59 个稀疏矩阵中，各种新颖的 Work Graphs SpMV 实现的最佳性能比单个 SpMV 的最先进的 rocSPARSE“LRB”高出 7.19 ×（平均值：3.35 ×，SD：1.89）。此外，它在各种稀疏模式下实现了比 rocSPARSE CSR-General 算法更稳定的性能，甚至在多达 92 个连续 SpMV 计算上击败了先进的 rocSPARSE CSR-Adaptive 算法。此外，与rocSPARSE LRB相比，它降低了75%的代码复杂度。与 rocSPARSE LRB 的数据结构（随矩阵大小扩展至数百兆字节）相比，其用于支持数据结构的内存占用量是固定的 ∼ 25 MiB，与矩阵大小无关。总体而言，这项工作展示了 GPU 计算应用程序的新兴动态设备上调度技术的性能潜力。

papers.title: H2-LLM: Hardware-Dataflow Co-Exploration for Heterogeneous Hybrid-Bonding-based Low-Batch LLM Inference.
papers.abstract:
Low-batch large language model (LLM) inference has been extensively applied to edge-side generative tasks, such as personal chat helper, virtual assistant, reception bot, private edge server, etc. To efficiently handle both prefill and decoding stages in LLM inference, near-memory processing (NMP) enabled heterogeneous computation paradigm has been proposed. However, existing NMP designs typically embed processing engines into DRAM dies, resulting in limited computation capacity, which in turn restricts their ability to accelerate edge-side low-batch LLM inference.

To tackle this problem, we propose H \(^\text{2}\) -LLM, a Hybrid-bonding-based Heterogeneous accelerator for edge-side low-batch LLM inference. To balance the trade-off between computation capacity and bandwidth intrinsic to hybrid-bonding technology, we propose H \(^\text{2}\) -LLM’s architecture and extract its architecture design space. We further propose a data-centric dataflow abstraction to fully exploit the heterogeneous architecture’s acceleration opportunities in low-batch LLM inference. Based on the whole design space, we propose a design space exploration (DSE) framework to automatically find out the optimal design. Compared with existing in-die NMP-based heterogeneous accelerators, H \(^\text{2}\) -LLM achieves 2.72 × geomean speedup and 1.48 × geomean better energy efficiency. H \(^\text{2}\) -LLM’s data-centric dataflow exploration framework is open-sourced at https://github.com/leesou/H2-LLM-ISCA-2025.
papers.abstract_zh:
小批量大语言模型 (LLM) 推理已广泛应用于边缘生成任务，例如个人聊天助手、虚拟助理、接待机器人、私有边缘服务器等。为了有效处理 LLM 推理中的预填充和解码阶段，提出了支持近内存处理 (NMP) 的异构计算范式。然而，现有的 NMP 设计通常将处理引擎嵌入到 DRAM 芯片中，导致计算能力有限，进而限制了它们加速边缘侧小批量 LLM 推理的能力。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 H \(^\text{2}\) -LLM，一种基于混合键合的异构加速器，用于边缘侧低批量 LLM 推理。为了平衡混合键合技术固有的计算能力和带宽之间的权衡，我们提出了 H \(^\text{2}\) -LLM 的架构并提取了其架构设计空间。我们进一步提出了一种以数据为中心的数据流抽象，以充分利用异构架构在低批量 LLM 推理中的加速机会。基于整个设计空间，我们提出了一个设计空间探索（DSE）框架来自动找出最优设计。与现有的基于 NMP 的芯片内异构加速器相比，H \(^\text{2}\) -LLM 实现了 2.72 × geomean 的加速比和 1.48 × geomean 更好的能源效率。 H \(^\text{2}\) -LLM 以数据为中心的数据流探索框架开源于 https://github.com/leesou/H2-LLM-ISCA-2025。

papers.title: HardHarvest: Hardware-Supported Core Harvesting for Microservices.
papers.abstract:
In microservice environments, users size their virtual machines (VMs) for peak loads, leaving cores idle much of the time. To improve core utilization and overall throughput, it is instructive to consider a recently-introduced software technique for environments with relatively long-running monolithic applications: Core Harvesting. With this technique, Harvest VMs running batch applications temporarily steal idle cores allocated by Primary VMs running latency-critical applications, and return them on demand. Unfortunately, re-assigning cores across VMs has substantial overhead, resulting from hypervisor calls, context switching, and flushing TLBs/caches. While such overhead is acceptable in monolithic application environments, it would be prohibitive in environments with sub-millisecond microservices.

To address this problem, this paper proposes, for the first time, an architecture for core harvesting in hardware . The architecture, called HardHarvest , targets microservices. It aims to: 1) maximize core utilization, 2) minimize impact on Primary VM tail latency, and 3) boost Harvest VM throughput. HardHarvest eliminates software overheads by using in-hardware request scheduling and partitioning TLBs/caches with a smart replacement algorithm. On average, compared to state-of-the-art software core harvesting, HardHarvest increases core utilization by 1.5 ×, increases Harvest VM throughput by 1.8 ×, and reduces Primary VM tail latency by 6.0 ×.
papers.abstract_zh:
在微服务环境中，用户根据峰值负载调整虚拟机 (VM) 大小，从而使核心在大部分时间处于闲置状态。为了提高核心利用率和整体吞吐量，考虑最近为具有相对长时间运行的整体应用程序的环境引入的软件技术：核心收获（Core Harvesting）是有启发性的。通过这种技术，运行批处理应用程序的 Harvest VM 会暂时窃取运行延迟关键型应用程序的主 VM 分配的空闲核心，并根据需要返回它们。不幸的是，跨虚拟机重新分配核心会产生大量开销，这是由管理程序调用、上下文切换和刷新 TLB/缓存造成的。虽然这样的开销在单体应用程序环境中是可以接受的，但在亚毫秒级微服务的环境中却是令人望而却步的。

为了解决这个问题，本文首次提出了一种硬件核心采集架构。该架构称为 HardHarvest，面向微服务。其目标是：1) 最大化核心利用率，2) 最小化对主虚拟机尾部延迟的影响，以及 3) 提高 Harvest VM 吞吐量。 HardHarvest 通过使用硬件内请求调度和通过智能替换算法对 TLB/缓存进行分区来消除软件开销。平均而言，与最先进的软件核心收获相比，HardHarvest 将核心利用率提高了 1.5 倍，将 Harvest VM 吞吐量提高了 1.8 倍，并将主 VM 尾延迟降低了 6.0 倍。

papers.title: Hardware-aware Calibration Protocol for Quantum Computers.
papers.abstract: Calibration of a quantum computer is the process of optimizing its control parameters to ensure the accurate implementation of quantum gates. It remains a critical challenge in scaling quantum computers. Existing calibration methods take a generalized approach that focuses on the trade-off between calibration time and fidelity. However, these methods lack the awareness of hardware differences among physical qubits and an elaborate design of parallel calibration. In this paper, we introduce a fine-grained calibration protocol that contains three calibration policies for hardware differences and a method to enable parallel calibration. We begin by profiling qubit pairs to evaluate their responses to different waveform candidates. Based on profiling results, we determine the best calibration policy for the quantum computer, which is the first part of the calibration protocol. The second part of our protocol is to use graph traverse to enable parallel calibration by identifying compatible calibration operations. We validate our protocol through intensive experiments on real quantum machines with up to 127 qubits. Our experimental results demonstrate a 1.84 × reduction in terms of the medium of the two-qubit gate error rate, 1.26 × reduction in pulse duration, an 8 × to 25 × reduction in total calibration overhead compared with sequential calibration, an average of 2.12 × further reduction in total calibration overhead owing to profiling policy, double of the quantum volume, and a 2.0 × to 2.3 × reduction in error per layered gate. The proposed protocol emphasizes the importance of hardware-aware and parallel calibration and advances current quantum computers towards fault-tolerant quantum computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算机的标定是优化其控制参数以确保量子门准确实现的过程。这仍然是扩展量子计算机的一个关键挑战。现有的校准方法采用通用方法，重点关注校准时间和保真度之间的权衡。然而，这些方法缺乏对物理量子位之间的硬件差异的认识以及并行校准的精心设计。 In this paper, we introduce a fine-grained calibration protocol that contains three calibration policies for hardware differences and a method to enable parallel calibration.我们首先分析量子位对，以评估它们对不同候选波形的响应。 Based on profiling results, we determine the best calibration policy for the quantum computer, which is the first part of the calibration protocol.我们协议的第二部分是使用图形遍历通过识别兼容的校准操作来实现并行校准。我们通过在多达 127 个量子位的真实量子机器上进行大量实验来验证我们的协议。 Our experimental results demonstrate a 1.84 × reduction in terms of the medium of the two-qubit gate error rate, 1.26 × reduction in pulse duration, an 8 × to 25 × reduction in total calibration overhead compared with sequential calibration, an average of 2.12 × further reduction in total calibration overhead owing to profiling policy, double of the quantum volume, and a 2.0 × to 2.3 × reduction in error per layered gate. The proposed protocol emphasizes the importance of hardware-aware and parallel calibration and advances current quantum computers towards fault-tolerant quantum computing.

papers.title: Heliostat: Harnessing Ray Tracing Accelerators for Page Table Walks.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Heliostat, which enhances page translation bandwidth on GPUs by harnessing underutilized ray tracing accelerators (RTAs). While most existing studies focused on better utilizing the provided translation bandwidth, this paper introduces a new opportunity to fundamentally increase the translation bandwidth. Instead of overprovisioning the GPU memory management unit (GMMU), Heliostat repurposes the existing RTAs by leveraging the operational similarities between ray tracing and page table walks. Unlike earlier studies that utilized RTAs for certain workloads, Heliostat democratizes RTA for supporting any workloads by improving virtual memory performance. Heliostat+ optimizes Heliostat by handling predicted future address translations proactively. Heliostat outperforms baseline and two state-of-the-arts by 1.93 ×, 1.92 ×, and 1.66 ×. Heliostat+ further speeds up Heliostat by 1.23 ×. Compared to an overprovisioned comparable solution, Heliostat occupies only 1.53% of the area and consumes 5.8% of the power.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Heliostat，它通过利用未充分利用的光线追踪加速器 (RTA) 来增强 GPU 上的页面转换带宽。虽然大多数现有研究侧重于更好地利用所提供的翻译带宽，但本文引入了从根本上增加翻译带宽的新机会。 Heliostat 没有过度配置 GPU 内存管理单元 (GMMU)，而是利用光线追踪和页表遍历之间的操作相似性来重新利用现有的 RTA。与早期使用 RTA 处理某些工作负载的研究不同，Heliostat 通过提高虚拟内存性能使 RTA 民主化，以支持任何工作负载。 Heliostat+ 通过主动处理预测的未来地址转换来优化定日镜。定日镜的性能优于基线和两种最先进的技术 1.93 ×、1.92 × 和 1.66 ×。 Heliostat+ 进一步将 Heliostat 速度提高了 1.23 倍。与过度配置的同类解决方案相比，定日镜仅占用 1.53% 的面积并消耗 5.8% 的功率。

papers.title: Hermes: Algorithm-System Co-design for Efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation At-Scale.
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) as well as the constantly expanding amount of data make keeping the latest models constantly up-to-date a challenge. The high computational cost required to constantly retrain models to handle evolving data has led to the development of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). RAG presents a promising solution that enables LLMs to access and incorporate real-time information from external datastores, thus minimizing the need for retraining to update the information available to an LLM. However, as the RAG datastores used to augment information expand into the range of trillions of tokens, retrieval overheads become significant, impacting latency, throughput, and energy efficiency. To address this, we propose Hermes, an algorithm-systems co-design framework that addresses the unique bottlenecks of large-scale RAG systems. Hermes mitigates retrieval latency by partitioning and distributing datastores across multiple nodes, while also enhancing throughput and energy efficiency through an intelligent hierarchical search that dynamically directs queries to optimized subsets of the datastore. On open-source RAG datastores and models, we demonstrate Hermes optimizes end-to-end latency and energy by up to 9.33 × and 2.10 ×, without sacrificing retrieval quality for at-scale trillion token retrieval datastores.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速发展以及不断增加的数据量使得保持最新模型不断更新成为一项挑战。不断重新训练模型以处理不断变化的数据所需的高计算成本导致了检索增强生成（RAG）的发展。 RAG 提供了一种很有前途的解决方案，使法学硕士能够访问和合并来自外部数据存储的实时信息，从而最大限度地减少重新培训以更新法学硕士可用信息的需要。然而，随着用于增强信息的 RAG 数据存储扩展到数万亿个令牌的范围，检索开销变得巨大，影响延迟、吞吐量和能源效率。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Hermes，一种算法系统协同设计框架，可以解决大规模 RAG 系统的独特瓶颈。 Hermes 通过跨多个节点分区和分布数据存储来减少检索延迟，同时还通过智能分层搜索动态地将查询定向到数据存储的优化子集来提高吞吐量和能源效率。在开源 RAG 数据存储和模型上，我们证明 Hermes 将端到端延迟和能耗优化高达 9.33 × 和 2.10 ×，且不会牺牲万亿级令牌检索数据存储的检索质量。

papers.title: HeterRAG: Heterogeneous Processing-in-Memory Acceleration for Retrieval-augmented Generation.
papers.abstract: By integrating external knowledge bases, Retrieval-augmented Generation (RAG) enhances natural language generation for knowledge-intensive scenarios and specialized domains, producing content that is both more informative and personalized. RAG systems typically consist of two fundamental stages: retrieval and generation. The retrieval stage experiences low bandwidth utilization due to its random and irregular memory access patterns. Meanwhile, the generation stage is also constrained by memory bandwidth limitations, which arise from involving a significant number of General Matrix-Vector Multiplications (GEMV) operations. These two stages collectively lead to memory bottlenecks within RAG systems. Recent efforts leverage HBM-based Processing-in-Memory (PIM) to accelerate conventional Large Language Models (LLMs). However, the retrieval stage incurs substantial storage overhead due to the need to maintain large-scale knowledge bases, resulting in a capacity bottleneck. Solely relying on HBM-based PIM in RAG is both costly and insufficient to meet the capacity demands. Fortunately, DIMM-based PIM provides a low-cost, high-capacity alternative that complements HBM. In this work, we propose HeterRAG, a novel heterogeneous PIM acceleration system for RAG. It combines HBM-based PIM and DIMM-based PIM to achieve high performance, energy efficiency, and low hardware cost. HeterRAG uses HBM-based PIM for the generation stage to meet bandwidth needs and DIMM-based PIM for the retrieval stage to satisfy memory capacity requirements. To further improve performance, HeterRAG incorporates three software–hardware co-optimization techniques: locality-aware retrieval, locality-aware generation, and fine-grained parallel pipelining. Experimental results demonstrate that, compared to RAG systems deployed on Intel Xeon CPUs and NVIDIA GPUs, HeterRAG achieves up to 26.5 × higher throughput, up to 27.6 × lower latency, and up to 2.8 × greater energy efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过集成外部知识库，检索增强生成（RAG）增强了知识密集型场景和专业领域的自然语言生成，生成信息量更大、个性化的内容。 RAG 系统通常由两个基本阶段组成：检索和生成。由于其随机和不规则的内存访问模式，检索阶段的带宽利用率较低。同时，生成阶段还受到内存带宽限制的限制，这是由于涉及大量通用矩阵向量乘法（GEMV）运算而产生的。这两个阶段共同导致 RAG 系统内出现内存瓶颈。最近的努力利用基于 HBM 的内存处理 (PIM) 来加速传统的大型语言模型 (LLM)。然而，由于需要维护大规模的知识库，检索阶段会产生大量的存储开销，从而导致容量瓶颈。 RAG 中仅依赖基于 HBM 的 PIM 成本高昂且不足以满足容量需求。幸运的是，基于 DIMM 的 PIM 提供了一种低成本、高容量的替代方案，可以补充 HBM。在这项工作中，我们提出了 HeterRAG，一种用于 RAG 的新型异构 PIM 加速系统。它结合了基于HBM的PIM和基于DIMM的PIM，以实现高性能、高能效和低硬件成本。 HeterRAG 在生成阶段使用基于 HBM 的 PIM 以满足带宽需求，在检索阶段使用基于 DIMM 的 PIM 以满足内存容量要求。为了进一步提高性能，HeterRAG 结合了三种软硬件协同优化技术：局部感知检索、局部感知生成和细粒度并行流水线。实验结果表明，与部署在 Intel Xeon CPU 和 NVIDIA GPU 上的 RAG 系统相比，HeterRAG 的吞吐量提高了 26.5 倍，延迟降低了 27.6 倍，能效提高了 2.8 倍。

papers.title: HiPER: Hierarchically-Composed Processing for Efficient Robot Learning-Based Control.
papers.abstract: Learning-Based Model Predictive Control (LMPC) is a class of algorithms that enhances Model Predictive Control (MPC) by including machine learning methods, improving robot navigation in complex environments. However, the combination of machine learning and MPC computation in LMPC creates a unique workload that cannot be efficiently handled by a simple GPU and CPU integration. We present HiPER, a hierarchically-composed processing array that provides temporal and spatial mapping capabilities, allowing efficient adaptation to workload changes at runtime. To simplify control, HiPER employs a pointer queue hierarchy to compose and orchestrate program execution. Additionally, HiPER utilizes a fractal interconnect topology that combines local systolic interconnects and their hierarchical extensions to efficiently support the workload’s traffic characteristics. To evaluate the performance and efficiency of HiPER, we synthesized a 16.37 mm 2 design in 16nm CMOS. The design consists of 6 pointer queue levels and 1024 PEs. The prototype was assessed using a representative LMPC workload, demonstrating 10.75 × improvement in performance compared to a GTX 1080 GPU, 12.80 × improvement in energy efficiency compared to a Jetson Orin Nano embedded GPU, and 11.6 × /22.2 × improvement in performance compared to the RoboX/Plasticine accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于学习的模型预测控制 (LMPC) 是一类算法，通过包含机器学习方法来增强模型预测控制 (MPC)，改善复杂环境中的机器人导航。然而，LMPC 中机器学习和 MPC 计算的结合产生了独特的工作负载，无法通过简单的 GPU 和 CPU 集成来有效处理。我们推出了 HiPER，这是一种分层组成的处理阵列，它提供时间和空间映射功能，允许在运行时有效适应工作负载变化。为了简化控制，HiPER 采用指针队列层次结构来组合和编排程序执行。此外，HiPER 利用分形互连拓扑，将本地脉动互连及其分层扩展相结合，以有效支持工作负载的流量特征。为了评估 HiPER 的性能和效率，我们在 16nm CMOS 中合成了 16.37 mm 2 设计。该设计由 6 个指针队列级别和 1024 个 PE 组成。使用代表性 LMPC 工作负载对原型进行了评估，结果表明，与 GTX 1080 GPU 相比，性能提高了 10.75 倍；与 Jetson Orin Nano 嵌入式 GPU 相比，能效提高了 12.80 倍；与 RoboX/Plasticine 加速器相比，性能提高了 11.6 × /22.2 倍。

papers.title: HPVM-HDC: A Heterogeneous Programming System for Accelerating Hyperdimensional Computing.
papers.abstract:
Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC), a technique inspired by cognitive models of computation, has been proposed as an efficient and robust alternative basis for machine learning. HDC programs are often manually written in low-level and target specific languages targeting CPUs, GPUs, and FPGAs—these codes cannot be easily retargeted onto HDC-specific accelerators. No previous programming system enables productive development of HDC programs and generates efficient code for several hardware targets.

We propose a heterogeneous programming system for HDC: a novel programming language, HDC++, for writing applications using a unified programming model, including HDC-specific primitives to improve programmability, and a heterogeneous compiler, HPVM-HDC, that provides an intermediate representation for compiling HDC programs to many hardware targets. We implement two tuning optimizations, automatic binarization and reduction perforation, that exploit the error resilient nature of HDC. Our evaluation shows that HPVM-HDC generates performance-competitive code for CPUs and GPUs, achieving a geomean speed-up of 1.17x over optimized baseline CUDA implementations with a geomean reduction in total lines of code of 1.6x across CPUs and GPUs. Additionally, HPVM-HDC targets an HDC Digital ASIC and an HDC ReRAM accelerator simulator, enabling the first execution of HDC applications on these devices.
papers.abstract_zh:
超维计算（HDC）是一种受计算认知模型启发的技术，已被提议作为机器学习的高效且强大的替代基础。 HDC 程序通常是用针对 CPU、GPU 和 FPGA 的低级和目标特定语言手动编写的，这些代码无法轻松地重新定位到 HDC 特定的加速器上。以前的编程系统都无法实现 HDC 程序的高效开发并为多个硬件目标生成高效的代码。

我们提出了一种 HDC 异构编程系统：一种新颖的编程语言 HDC++，用于使用统一编程模型编写应用程序，包括用于提高可编程性的 HDC 特定原语；以及异构编译器 HPVM-HDC，它提供用于将 HDC 程序编译到许多硬件目标的中间表示。我们实现了两种调整优化，即自动二值化和缩减穿孔，利用 HDC 的错误弹性特性。我们的评估表明，HPVM-HDC 为 CPU 和 GPU 生成具有性能竞争力的代码，与优化的基准 CUDA 实现相比，几何平均速度提高了 1.17 倍，CPU 和 GPU 的代码总行数几何平均减少了 1.6 倍。此外，HPVM-HDC 针对 HDC 数字 ASIC 和 HDC ReRAM 加速器模拟器，支持在这些设备上首次执行 HDC 应用程序。

papers.title: Hybe: GPU-NPU Hybrid System for Efficient LLM Inference with Million-Token Context Window.
papers.abstract: The growth of context window size in large language model (LLM) inference poses a very distinct computational challenge of hardware inefficiency. The inefficiency arises from the computational imbalance during LLM inference between the compute-intensive prefill stage, and memory-intensive decode stage. The predominant inference hardware, GPU, boasts large number of cores to excel in the prefill stage, which processes the entire input context at once, but suffers from hardware underutilization in the decode stage, which iteratively generates one output token at a time. In conventional LLM, batching has been able to alleviate the underutilization by generating multiple tokens of different requests. However, batching becomes infeasible in models with large context windows over 100K tokens because the Key-Value (KV) activations dominate the physical memory capacity, surpassing the entire model size. In this paper, we propose Hybe, a GPU-NPU hybrid system for efficient LLM inference with a million-token context window. Hybe utilizes the preexisting GPU for the prefill stage and employs lightweight NPUs during the decode stage. Each NPU includes only the necessary computing resources to fully utilize the given memory bandwidth, thereby achieving maximum hardware efficiency. Furthermore, Hybe introduces fine-grained KV transmission , a kernel scheduling method that immediately offloads partial KV produced from the GPU to the NPU, which significantly reduces the KV memory required in the GPU. Lastly, Hybe scheduler applies stage-wise pipelining that dynamically assigns queued requests to idle hardware to minimize stalls. Hybe utilizes NVIDIA H100 GPU with inference-optimized vLLM library and implement Hybe NPU in 4nm process with equal HBM specification. Hybe achieves 2.1 × speedup for Phi-3 with 100K-token context window and 3.9 × energy efficiency for Llama-3 with 1M-token context window, over H100 GPUs with equal total device count.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理中上下文窗口大小的增长对硬件效率低下提出了非常明显的计算挑战。效率低下是由于 LLM 推理过程中计算密集型预填充阶段和内存密集型解码阶段之间的计算不平衡造成的。主要的推理硬件 GPU 拥有大量核心，在预填充阶段表现出色，可一次性处理整个输入上下文，但在解码阶段却存在硬件利用率不足的问题，该阶段一次迭代地生成一个输出令牌。在传统的 LLM 中，批处理能够通过生成不同请求的多个令牌来缓解利用率不足的情况。然而，在具有超过 100K token 的大上下文窗口的模型中，批处理变得不可行，因为键值 (KV) 激活占据了物理内存容量，超过了整个模型的大小。在本文中，我们提出了 Hybe，这是一种 GPU-NPU 混合系统，用于通过百万个令牌上下文窗口进行高效的 LLM 推理。 Hybe 在预填充阶段使用预先存在的 GPU，并在解码阶段使用轻量级 NPU。每个NPU仅包含充分利用给定内存带宽所需的计算资源，从而实现最大的硬件效率。此外，Hybe还引入了细粒度KV传输，这是一种内核调度方法，可以立即将GPU产生的部分KV卸载到NPU，从而显着减少GPU中所需的KV内存。最后，Hybe 调度程序应用分阶段流水线技术，将排队的请求动态分配给空闲硬件，以最大限度地减少停顿。 Hybe 利用 NVIDIA H100 GPU 和推理优化的 vLLM 库，并在 4nm 工艺中实现具有相同 HBM 规格的 Hybe NPU。与具有相同总设备数量的 H100 GPU 相比，Hybe 使具有 100K 令牌上下文窗口的 Phi-3 实现了 2.1 倍的加速，为具有 1M 令牌上下文窗口的 Llama-3 实现了 3.9 倍的能效。

papers.title: Hybrid SLC-MLC RRAM Mixed-Signal Processing-in-Memory Architecture for Transformer Acceleration via Gradient Redistribution.
papers.abstract: Transformers, while revolutionary, face challenges due to their demanding computational cost and large data movement. To address this, we propose HyFlexPIM, a novel mixed-signal processing-in-memory (PIM) accelerator for inference that flexibly utilizes both single-level cell (SLC) and multi-level cell (MLC) RRAM technologies to trade-off accuracy and efficiency. HyFlexPIM achieves efficient dual-mode operation by utilizing digital PIM for high-precision and write-intensive operations while analog PIM for high parallel and low-precision computations. The analog PIM further distributes tasks between SLC and MLC PIM operations, where a single analog PIM module can be reconfigured to switch between two operations (SLC/MLC) with minimal overhead (<1% for area & energy). Critical weights are allocated to SLC RRAM for high accuracy, while less critical weights are assigned to MLC RRAM to maximize capacity, power, and latency efficiency. However, despite employing such a hybrid mechanism, brute-force mapping on hardware fails to deliver significant benefits due to the limited proportion of weights accelerated by the MLC and the noticeable degradation in accuracy. To maximize the potential of our hybrid hardware architecture, we propose an algorithm co-optimization technique, called gradient redistribution , which uses Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to decompose and truncate matrices based on their importance, then fine-tune them to concentrate significance into a small subset of weights. By doing so, only 5-10% of the weights have dominantly large gradients, making it favorable for HyFlexPIM by minimizing the use of expensive SLC RRAM while maximizing the efficient MLC RRAM. Our evaluation shows that HyFlexPIM significantly enhances computational throughput and energy efficiency, achieving maximum 1.86 × and 1.45 × higher than state-of-the-art methods.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 虽然是革命性的，但由于其苛刻的计算成本和大量数据移动而面临挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 HyFlexPIM，这是一种用于推理的新型混合信号内存处理 (PIM) 加速器，它灵活地利用单级单元 (SLC) 和多级单元 (MLC) RRAM 技术来权衡准确性和效率。 HyFlexPIM利用数字PIM进行高精度和写入密集型操作，同时利用模拟PIM进行高并行和低精度计算，从而实现高效的双模式操作。模拟 PIM 进一步在 SLC 和 MLC PIM 操作之间分配任务，其中单个模拟 PIM 模块可以重新配置为以最小的开销（面积和能量 <1%）在两种操作 (SLC/MLC) 之间切换。关键权重被分配给 SLC RRAM 以实现高精度，而不太关键的权重被分配给 MLC RRAM 以最大限度地提高容量、功耗和延迟效率。然而，尽管采用了这种混合机制，但由于 MLC 加速的权重比例有限且精度明显下降，硬件上的强力映射未能带来显着的好处。为了最大限度地发挥混合硬件架构的潜力，我们提出了一种称为梯度重新分配的算法协同优化技术，该技术使用奇异值分解（SVD）根据矩阵的重要性来分解和截断矩阵，然后对其进行微调以将重要性集中到权重的一个小子集中。通过这样做，只有 5-10% 的权重具有显着的大梯度，通过最大限度地减少昂贵的 SLC RRAM 的使用，同时最大限度地提高高效的 MLC RRAM，使其对 HyFlexPIM 有利。我们的评估表明，HyFlexPIM 显着提高了计算吞吐量和能源效率，分别比最先进的方法高出 1.86 倍和 1.45 倍。

papers.title: HYTE: Flexible Tiling for Sparse Accelerators via Hybrid Static-Dynamic Approaches.
papers.abstract: Specialized hardware accelerators are widely used for sparse tensor computations. For very large tensors that do not fit in on-chip buffers, tiling is a promising solution to improve data reuse on these sparse accelerators. Nevertheless, existing tiling strategies on sparse accelerators are either purely dynamic and suffering from high design complexity, or purely static and using simple heuristics with insufficient adaptivity. In addition, they have not extensively explored the full design space of tiling to identify the optimal schemes, nor have they supported efficient management of the non-negligible metadata needed for tiling. We propose HYTE, a hybrid static-dynamic framework to enable flexible and efficient tiling on sparse accelerators. HYTE relies on a static offline scheduler to first identify a near-optimal initial tiling scheme through effective and lightweight sampling. The tile size and shape, the dimension iteration order across different tiles, and the buffer allocation policies can all be flexibly configured to adapt to the specific data sparsity patterns. Then at runtime, HYTE supports efficient management of the tiling metadata in both the off-chip memory and the on-chip buffer, as well as a technique of dynamic tuning on the tile shape to ensure high buffer utilization in the presence of highly varying local data patterns. Our evaluation shows that HYTE outperforms state-of-the-art sparse tiling strategies by 3.3 × to 6.2 × on average for diverse sparse matrices.
papers.abstract_zh: 专用硬件加速器广泛用于稀疏张量计算。对于不适合片上缓冲区的非常大的张量，平铺是一种很有前途的解决方案，可以改善这些稀疏加速器上的数据重用。然而，稀疏加速器上现有的平铺策略要么是纯动态的且设计复杂度高，要么是纯静态的并使用简单的启发式但适应性不足。此外，他们没有广泛探索平铺的完整设计空间来确定最佳方案，也没有支持对平铺所需的不可忽略的元数据进行有效管理。我们提出了 HYTE，一种混合​​静态动态框架，可在稀疏加速器上实现灵活高效的平铺。 HYTE 依靠静态离线调度程序首先通过有效且轻量级的采样来识别接近最优的初始切片方案。切片大小和形状、不同切片之间的维度迭代顺序以及缓冲区分配策略都可以灵活配置以适应特定的数据稀疏模式。然后在运行时，HYTE 支持对片外存储器和片上缓冲区中的切片元数据进行高效管理，以及动态调整切片形状的技术，以确保在存在高度变化的本地数据模式的情况下实现高缓冲区利用率。我们的评估表明，对于不同的稀疏矩阵，HYTE 的性能平均优于最先进的稀疏平铺策略 3.3 到 6.2 倍。

papers.title: IDEA-GP: Instruction-Driven Architecture with Efficient Online Workload Allocation for Geometric Perception.
papers.abstract:
The algorithmic complexity of robotic systems presents significant challenges to achieving generalized acceleration in robot applications. On the one hand, the diversity of operators and computational flows within similar task categories prevents the reuse of specialized computational units. On the other hand, task variations and environmental dynamics can cause workload fluctuations, leading to inefficient resource utilization.

This paper focuses on the geometric perception capability of robots, taking localization and mapping as the basic applications, and proposes IDEA-GP, an I nstruction- D riven Architecture with E fficient online workload A llocation for G eometric P erception. Built around an array of general computational units designed for spatial positioning representations, IDEA-GP supports a wide range of robot pose-related computational tasks. IDEA-GP employs a compiler to perform online workload analysis and resource allocation. It generates instructions tailored to processing elements (PEs) to schedule computations, thereby accelerating optimization problems and enhancing geometric perception performance. Deployed on the ZCU102 evaluation board, IDEA-GP demonstrates an average speedup of 7.5 × over the Intel CPU and 19.7 × over the ARM CPU in Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) tasks, and a 16.4 × speedup over the Intel CPU and 41.6 × over the ARM CPU in Structure from Motion (SfM) tasks.
papers.abstract_zh:
机器人系统的算法复杂性对在机器人应用中实现广义加速提出了重大挑战。一方面，相似任务类别中运算符和计算流的多样性阻碍了专用计算单元的重用。另一方面，任务变化和环境动态可能会导致工作负载波动，导致资源利用效率低下。

本文关注机器人的几何感知能力，以定位和建图为基础应用，提出了一种用于几何感知的高效在线工作负载分配的指令驱动架构IDEA-GP。 IDEA-GP 围绕一系列专为空间定位表示而设计的通用计算单元构建，支持各种与机器人姿态相关的计算任务。 IDEA-GP使用编译器来执行在线工作负载分析和资源分配。它生成针对处理元件 (PE) 定制的指令来调度计算，从而加速优化问题并增强几何感知性能。部署在 ZCU102 评估板上时，IDEA-GP 在同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 任务中比 Intel CPU 平均加速 7.5 倍，比 ARM CPU 平均加速 19.7 倍；在运动结构 (SfM) 任务中比 Intel CPU 平均加速 16.4 倍，比 ARM CPU 平均加速 41.6 倍。

papers.title: In-Storage Acceleration of Retrieval Augmented Generation as a Service.
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) services are rapidly gaining adoption in enterprise settings as they combine information retrieval systems (e.g., databases) with large language models (LLMs) to enhance response generation and reduce hallucinations. By augmenting an LLM’s fixed pre-trained knowledge with real-time information retrieval, RAG enables models to effectively extend their context to large knowledge bases by selectively retrieving only the most relevant information. As a result, RAG provides the effect of dynamic updates to the LLM’s knowledge without requiring expensive and time-consuming retraining. While some deployments keep the entire database in memory, RAG services are increasingly shifting toward persistent storage to accommodate ever-growing knowledge bases, enhance utility, and improve cost-efficiency. However, this transition fundamentally reshapes the system’s performance profile: empirical analysis reveals that the Search & Retrieval phase emerges as the dominant contributor to end-to-end latency. This phase typically involves (1) running a smaller language model to generate query embeddings, (2) executing similarity and relevance checks over varying data structures, and (3) performing frequent, long-latency accesses to persistent storage. To address this triad of challenges, we propose a metamorphic in-storage accelerator architecture that provides the necessary programmability to support diverse RAG algorithms, dynamic data structures, and varying computational patterns. The architecture also supports in-storage execution of smaller language models for query embedding generation while final LLM generation is executed on DGX A100 systems. Experimental results show up to 4.3 × and 1.5 × improvement in end-to-end throughput compared to conventional retrieval pipelines using Xeon CPUs with NVMe storage and A100 GPUs with DRAM, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 检索增强生成 (RAG) 服务正在企业环境中迅速得到采用，因为它们将信息检索系统（例如数据库）与大型语言模型 (LLM) 相结合，以增强响应生成并减少幻觉。通过实时信息检索增强法学硕士的固定预训练知识，RAG 使模型能够通过有选择地仅检索最相关的信息来有效地将其上下文扩展到大型知识库。因此，RAG 提供了法学硕士知识动态更新的效果，而不需要昂贵且耗时的再培训。虽然某些部署将整个数据库保留在内存中，但 RAG 服务越来越多地转向持久存储，以适应不断增长的知识库、增强实用性并提高成本效率。然而，这种转变从根本上重塑了系统的性能概况：实证分析表明，搜索和检索阶段是端到端延迟的主要贡献者。此阶段通常涉及 (1) 运行较小的语言模型来生成查询嵌入，(2) 对不同的数据结构执行相似性和相关性检查，以及 (3) 对持久存储执行频繁、长延迟的访问。为了解决这三大挑战，我们提出了一种变形的存储内加速器架构，它提供必要的可编程性来支持不同的 RAG 算法、动态数据结构和不同的计算模式。该架构还支持在存储中执行较小的语言模型，以生成查询嵌入，而最终的 LLM 生成则在 DGX A100 系统上执行。实验结果显示，与使用配备 NVMe 存储的 Xeon CPU 和配备 DRAM 的 A100 GPU 的传统检索管道相比，端到端吞吐量分别提高了 4.3 倍和 1.5 倍。

papers.title: InfiniMind: A Learning-Optimized Large-Scale Brain-Computer Interface.
papers.abstract:
Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) provide an interactive closed-loop connection between the brain and a computer. By employing signal processors implanted within the brain, BCIs are driving innovations across various fields in neuroscience and medicine. Recent studies highlight the need to integrate non-volatile memories (NVMs) into the implanted system for large-scale applications. At the same time, they emphasize the importance of continual learning within the system to address non-stationarities in the recorded signals.

This work is the first to address the performance and lifetime issues of deploying learning on NVM-assisted BCI systems. To reduce excessive write overhead associated with learning support, we propose four optimization schemes tailored for BCI workloads. First, update filtering minimizes unnecessary writes by leveraging the sparse and recurring nature of BCI signals. Second, delta buffering exploits temporal locality inherent in BCI signals to minimize NVM writes. Third, out-of-place flushing reduces write amplification by packing multiple sub-page updates into a single page write. Fourth, waveform compression decreases the volume of written data by exploiting the structural characteristics of neural signals. We implement these optimizations in a memory controller and integrate it into the state-of-the-art NVM-assisted BCI system, realizing an end-to-end learning-optimized system. Evaluation results show that our system improves performance and lifetime by 5.39 × and 23.52 ×, respectively, on representative continual learning algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh:
脑机接口（BCI）提供大脑和计算机之间的交互式闭环连接。通过使用植入大脑的信号处理器，脑机接口正在推动神经科学和医学各个领域的创新。最近的研究强调需要将非易失性存储器（NVM）集成到植入系统中以实现大规模应用。同时，他们强调系统内持续学习以解决记录信号中的非平稳性的重要性。

这项工作首次解决了在 NVM 辅助 BCI 系统上部署学习的性能和生命周期问题。为了减少与学习支持相关的过多写入开销，我们提出了四种针对 BCI 工作负载量身定制的优化方案。首先，更新过滤利用 BCI 信号的稀疏性和重复性，最大限度地减少不必要的写入。其次，增量缓冲利用 BCI 信号固有的时间局部性来最大限度地减少 NVM 写入。第三，异地刷新通过将多个子页面更新打包到单个页面写入中来减少写入放大。第四，波形压缩通过利用神经信号的结构特征来减少写入数据的量。我们在内存控制器中实现这些优化，并将其集成到最先进的 NVM 辅助 BCI 系统中，实现端到端的学习优化系统。评估结果表明，我们的系统在代表性的持续学习算法上，性能和寿命分别提高了 5.39 倍和 23.52 倍。

papers.title: Insights into DeepSeek-V3: Scaling Challenges and Reflections on Hardware for AI Architectures.
papers.abstract: The rapid scaling of large language models (LLMs) has unveiled critical limitations in current hardware architectures, including constraints in memory capacity, computational efficiency, and interconnection bandwidth. DeepSeek-V3, trained on 2,048 NVIDIA H800 GPUs, demonstrates how hardware-aware model co-design can effectively address these challenges, enabling cost-efficient training and inference at scale. This paper presents an in-depth analysis of the DeepSeek-V3/R1 model architecture and its AI infrastructure, highlighting key innovations such as Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) for enhanced memory efficiency, Mixture of Experts (MoE) architectures for optimized computation-communication trade-offs, FP8 mixed-precision training to unlock the full potential of hardware capabilities, and a Multi-Plane Network Topology to minimize cluster-level network overhead. Building on the hardware bottlenecks encountered during DeepSeek-V3’s development, we engage in a broader discussion with academic and industry peers on potential future hardware directions, including precise low-precision computation units, scale-up and scale-out convergence, and innovations in low-latency communication fabrics. These insights underscore the critical role of hardware and model co-design in meeting the escalating demands of AI workloads, offering a practical blueprint for innovation in next-generation AI systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 大语言模型 (LLM) 的快速扩展揭示了当前硬件架构的关键限制，包括内存容量、计算效率和互连带宽的限制。 DeepSeek-V3 在 2,048 个 NVIDIA H800 GPU 上进行训练，展示了硬件感知模型协同设计如何有效应对这些挑战，从而实现经济高效的大规模训练和推理。本文深入分析了 DeepSeek-V3/R1 模型架构及其 AI 基础设施，重点介绍了关键创新，例如用于提高内存效率的多头潜在注意力 (MLA)、用于优化计算通信权衡的专家混合 (MoE) 架构、用于释放硬件功能全部潜力的 FP8 混合精度训练，以及用于最小化集群级网络开销的多平面网络拓扑。基于DeepSeek-V3开发过程中遇到的硬件瓶颈，我们与学术界和业界同行就未来潜在的硬件方向进行了更广泛的讨论，包括精确的低精度计算单元、纵向扩展和横向扩展融合以及低延迟通信结构的创新。这些见解强调了硬件和模型协同设计在满足人工智能工作负载不断增长的需求方面的关键作用，为下一代人工智能系统的创新提供了实用的蓝图。

papers.title: Leveraging control-flow similarity to reduce branch predictor cold effects in microservices.
papers.abstract:
Modern datacenter applications commonly adopt a microservice software architecture, where an application is decomposed into smaller interconnected microservices communicating via the network. These microservices often operate under strict latency requirements, rendering them particularly vulnerable to microarchitectural cold effects that may arise from the interleaved execution of services on cores or power-gating cores between invocations.

Previous analyses of microservices find branch mispredictions due to cold predictor resources to be a significant contributor to performance degradation, indicating that the dynamic control flow must be very similar in the set and order of executed instructions across different requests. Our analysis of control-flow similarity across requests, using static and dynamic control flow information to determine dynamic control flow reconvergence, confirms that, indeed, a large portion of requests follow similar paths.

Motivated by the above findings, we propose Similarity-based Branch Prediction (SBP), a hybrid predictor architecture that enhances conventional predictors with a similarity component. SBP leverages the control-flow similarity across microservice requests to predict control flow (branch direction and target) by utilizing the control flow of past executions encoded in a reference execution trace. We realize a specific instantiation of SBP, called CHESS, which combines a conventional history-based fetch predictor, a static-hint predictor, and a similarity predictor. CHESS judiciously applies similarity prediction for branches identified as hard-to-predict through conventional prediction techniques, effectively mitigating branch predictor cold-start effects while keeping the length of the reference trace practical. Evaluation through a suite of microservices shows that CHESS reduces branch MPKI by 94% over a cold fetch predictor and 78% over a state-of-the-art predictor, while requiring a modest 18.1KB of additional storage space. This enables CHESS to deliver performance that is, on average, within 95% of a warm baseline system.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代数据中心应用程序通常采用微服务软件架构，其中应用程序被分解为通过网络进行通信的更小的互连微服务。这些微服务通常在严格的延迟要求下运行，这使得它们特别容易受到微架构冷效应的影响，这种效应可能是由于内核上的服务交错执行或调用之间的电源门控内核而引起的。

之前对微服务的分析发现，由于冷预测器资源而导致的分支错误预测是导致性能下降的一个重要因素，这表明动态控制流在跨不同请求的执行指令集和顺序上必须非常相似。我们使用静态和动态控制流信息来确定动态控制流重新收敛，对请求之间的控制流相似性进行分析，证实大部分请求确实遵循相似的路径。

受上述发现的启发，我们提出了基于相似性的分支预测（SBP），这是一种混合预测器架构，可通过相似性组件增强传统预测器。 SBP 利用微服务请求之间的控制流相似性，通过参考执行跟踪中编码的过去执行的控制流来预测控制流（分支方向和目标）。我们实现了 SBP 的一个具体实例，称为 CHESS，它结合了传统的基于历史的获取预测器、静态提示预测器和相似性预测器。 CHESS 明智地对通过传统预测技术识别为难以预测的分支应用相似性预测，有效减轻分支预测器冷启动效应，同时保持参考迹线的长度实用。通过一套微服务进行的评估表明，CHESS 比冷获取预测器减少了 94% 的分支 MPKI，比最先进的预测器减少了 78%，同时只需要 18.1KB 的额外存储空间。这使得 CHESS 能够提供平均在热基线系统 95% 以内的性能。

papers.title: LIA: A Single-GPU LLM Inference Acceleration with Cooperative AMX-Enabled CPU-GPU Computation and CXL Offloading.
papers.abstract: The limited memory capacity of single GPUs constrains large language model (LLM) inference, necessitating cost-prohibitive multi-GPU deployments or frequent performance-limiting CPU-GPU transfers over slow PCIe. In this work, we first benchmark recent Intel CPUs with Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), including 4th generation (Sapphire Rapids) and 6th generation (Granite Rapids) Xeon Scalable Processors, demonstrating matrix multiplication throughput of 20 TFLOPS and 40 TFLOPS, respectively— comparable to some recent GPUs. These findings unlock more extensive computation offloading to CPUs, reducing CPU-GPU transfers and alleviating throughput bottlenecks compared to prior-generation CPUs. Building on these insights, we design LIA , a single-GPU LLM inference acceleration framework leveraging cooperative AMX-enabled CPU-GPU computation and CXL offloading. LIA systematically offloads computation to CPUs, optimizing both latency and throughput. The framework also introduces a memory-offloading policy that seamlessly integrates affordable CXL memory with DDR memory to enhance performance in throughput-driven tasks. On Saphhire Rapids (Granite Rapids) systems with a single H100 GPU, LIA achieves up to 5.1 × (19 ×) lower latency and 3.7 × (5.1 ×) higher throughput compared to the latest single-GPU offloading framework. Furthermore, LIA deploying CXL offloading yields an additional 1.5 × throughput improvement over LIA using only DDR memory with a 1.8 × increase in maximum batch size (900 → 1.6K).
papers.abstract_zh: 单个 GPU 的有限内存容量限制了大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理，需要成本高昂的多 GPU 部署或通过慢速 PCIe 频繁进行性能限制的 CPU-GPU 传输。在这项工作中，我们首先对具有高级矩阵扩展 (AMX) 的最新 Intel CPU 进行基准测试，包括第四代 (Sapphire Rapids) 和第六代 (Granite Rapids) Xeon 可扩展处理器，展示了分别为 20 TFLOPS 和 40 TFLOPS 的矩阵乘法吞吐量，与一些最新的 GPU 相当。与上一代 CPU 相比，这些发现可以将更广泛的计算卸载到 CPU，从而减少 CPU-GPU 传输并缓解吞吐量瓶颈。基于这些见解，我们设计了 LIA，这是一个单 GPU LLM 推理加速框架，利用支持 AMX 的 CPU-GPU 协作计算和 CXL 卸载。 LIA 系统地将计算卸载到 CPU，从而优化延迟和吞吐量。该框架还引入了内存卸载策略，将经济实惠的 CXL 内存与 DDR 内存无缝集成，以提高吞吐量驱动型任务的性能。在具有单个 H100 GPU 的 Saphhire Rapids (Granite Rapids) 系统上，与最新的单 GPU 卸载框架相比，LIA 实现了高达 5.1 × (19 ×) 的延迟降低和 3.7 × (5.1 ×) 的吞吐量提高。此外，与仅使用 DDR 内存的 LIA 相比，部署 CXL 卸载的 LIA 吞吐量提高了 1.5 倍，最大批量大小增加了 1.8 倍（900 → 1.6K）。

papers.title: Light-weight Cache Replacement for Instruction Heavy Workloads.
papers.abstract: The last-level cache (LLC) is the last chance for memory accesses from the processor to avoid the costly latency of accessing the main memory. In recent years, an increasing number of instruction heavy workloads have put pressure on the last-level cache. We find that, for instruction heavy workloads, a simple replacement policy with minimal overhead provides at least the same benefit as a state-of-the-art, high-overhead replacement policy in the presence of aggressive prefetching. Our proposal is based on specifying insertion and promotion vectors (IPVs) as a generalization of re-reference interval prediction (RRIP) in such a way that the space of feasible policies may be searched exhaustively to find the best policy for the training set of workloads. The policies are formulated to deliver the best performance taking into account demand and prefetch accesses. We show that our technique, Prefetch Aware Coarse-grained Insertion and Promotion Vectors (PACIPV), improves performance over a state-of-the-art LLC replacement policy (Mockingjay) for instruction heavy workloads, and remains competitive for data heavy workloads with significantly less hardware overhead. We show that RRIP-based IPVs are very easy to implement but outperform far more complex replacement policies. PACIPV achieves a speedup of 3.3% over the baseline of LRU, outperforming SRRIP by 1.1% and the much more hardware intensive Mockingjay by 0.1%.
papers.abstract_zh: 末级缓存 (LLC) 是处理器访问内存的最后机会，以避免访问主内存时出现代价高昂的延迟。近年来，越来越多的指令繁重工作负载给末级缓存带来了压力。我们发现，对于指令繁重的工作负载，具有最小开销的简单替换策略至少可以在存在积极预取的情况下提供与最先进的高开销替换策略相同的好处。我们的建议基于将插入和提升向量（IPV）指定为重新参考区间预测（RRIP）的概括，这样可以彻底搜索可行策略的空间，以找到工作负载训练集的最佳策略。这些策略的制定是为了提供最佳性能，同时考虑到需求和预取访问。我们表明，我们的技术预取感知粗粒度插入和提升向量 (PACIPV) 比最先进的 LLC 替换策略 (Mockingjay) 提高了指令繁重工作负载的性能，并且在数据繁重工作负载方面保持竞争力，同时硬件开销显着减少。我们表明，基于 RRIP 的 IPV 非常容易实施，但性能优于复杂得多的替代政策。 PACIPV 在 LRU 的基础上实现了 3.3% 的加速，比 SRRIP 快 1.1%，比硬件密集程度更高的 Mockingjay 快 0.1%。

papers.title: LightML: A Photonic Accelerator for Efficient General Purpose Machine Learning.
papers.abstract:
The rapid integration of AI technologies into everyday life across sectors such as healthcare, autonomous driving, and smart home applications requires extensive computational resources, placing strain on server infrastructure and incurring significant costs.

We present LightML, the first system-level photonic crossbar design, optimized for high-performance machine learning applications. This work provides the first complete memory and buffer architecture carefully designed to support the high-speed photonic crossbar, achieving over 80% utilization. LightML also introduces solutions for key ML functions, including large-scale matrix multiplication (MMM), element-wise operations, non-linear functions, and convolutional layers. Delivering 325 TOP/s at only 3 watts, LightML offers significant improvements in speed and power efficiency, making it ideal for both edge devices and dense data center workloads.
papers.abstract_zh:
人工智能技术快速融入医疗保健、自动驾驶和智能家居应用等领域的日常生活需要大量的计算资源，这给服务器基础设施带来了压力并产生了巨大的成本。

我们推出 LightML，这是第一个系统级光子交叉开关设计，针对高性能机器学习应用进行了优化。这项工作提供了第一个经过精心设计的完整内存和缓冲区架构，以支持高速光子交叉开关，实现了超过 80% 的利用率。 LightML 还引入了关键 ML 功能的解决方案，包括大规模矩阵乘法 (MMM)、逐元素运算、非线性函数和卷积层。 LightML 以仅 3 瓦的功率提供 325 TOP/s，显着提高了速度和能效，使其成为边缘设备和密集数据中心工作负载的理想选择。

papers.title: LightNobel: Improving Sequence Length Limitation in Protein Structure Prediction Model via Adaptive Activation Quantization.
papers.abstract:
