Recent advances in Protein Structure Prediction Models (PPMs), such as AlphaFold2 and ESMFold, have revolutionized computational biology by achieving unprecedented accuracy in predicting three-dimensional protein folding structures. However, these models face significant scalability challenges, particularly when processing proteins with long amino acid sequences (e.g., sequence length > 1,000). The primary bottleneck that arises from the exponential growth in activation sizes is driven by the unique data structure in PPM, which introduces an additional dimension that leads to substantial memory and computational demands. These limitations have hindered the effective scaling of PPM for real-world applications, such as analyzing large proteins or complex multimers with critical biological and pharmaceutical relevance.

In this paper, we present LightNobel, the first hardware-software co-designed accelerator developed to overcome scalability limitations on the sequence length in PPM. At the software level, we propose Token-wise Adaptive Activation Quantization (AAQ), which leverages unique token-wise characteristics, such as distogram patterns in PPM activations, to enable fine-grained quantization techniques without compromising accuracy. At the hardware level, LightNobel integrates the multi-precision reconfigurable matrix processing unit (RMPU) and versatile vector processing unit (VVPU) to enable the efficient execution of AAQ. Through these innovations, LightNobel achieves up to 8.44 ×, 8.41 × speedup and 37.29 ×, 43.35 × higher power efficiency over the latest NVIDIA A100 and H100 GPUs, respectively, while maintaining negligible accuracy loss. It also reduces the peak memory requirement up to 120.05 × in PPM, enabling scalable processing for proteins with long sequences.
papers.abstract_zh:
AlphaFold2 和 ESMFold 等蛋白质结构预测模型 (PPM) 的最新进展通过在预测三维蛋白质折叠结构方面实现前所未有的准确性，彻底改变了计算生物学。然而，这些模型面临着巨大的可扩展性挑战，特别是在处理具有长氨基酸序列（例如序列长度> 1,000）的蛋白质时。激活大小呈指数增长所产生的主要瓶颈是由 PPM 中独特的数据结构驱动的，它引入了一个额外的维度，导致大量的内存和计算需求。这些限制阻碍了 PPM 在实际应用中的有效扩展，例如分析具有关键生物和制药相关性的大型蛋白质或复杂多聚体。

在本文中，我们介绍了 LightNobel，这是第一个硬件-软件共同设计的加速器，旨在克服 PPM 中序列长度的可扩展性限制。在软件层面，我们提出了 Token-wise 自适应激活量化（AAQ），它利用独特的 token-wise 特征（例如 PPM 激活中的直方图模式）来实现细粒度量化技术，而不会影响准确性。在硬件层面，LightNobel集成了多精度可重构矩阵处理单元（RMPU）和通用向量处理单元（VVPU），以实现AAQ的高效执行。通过这些创新，LightNobel 与最新的 NVIDIA A100 和 H100 GPU 相比，分别实现了高达 8.44 倍、8.41 倍的加速和 37.29 倍、43.35 倍的能效，同时保持了可忽略不计的精度损失。它还将峰值内存需求降低高达 120.05 ×（以 PPM 为单位），从而实现对长序列蛋白质的可扩展处理。

papers.title: Lumina: Real-Time Neural Rendering by Exploiting Computational Redundancy.
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has vastly advanced the pace of neural rendering, but it remains computationally demanding on today’s mobile SoCs. To address this challenge, we propose Lumina , a hardware-algorithm co-designed system, which integrates two principal optimizations: a novel algorithm, \({\mathcal {S}}^2\) , and a radiance caching mechanism, \({\mathcal {RC}}\) , to improve the efficiency of neural rendering. \({\mathcal {S}}^2\) algorithm exploits temporal coherence in rendering to reduce the computational overhead, while \({\mathcal {RC}}\) leverages the color integration process of 3DGS to decrease the frequency of intensive rasterization computations. Coupled with these techniques, we propose an accelerator architecture, LuminCore , to further accelerate cache lookup and address the fundamental inefficiencies in Rasterization. We show that Lumina achieves 4.5 × speedup and 5.3 × energy reduction against a mobile Volta GPU, with a marginal quality loss (< 0.2 dB peak signal-to-noise ratio reduction) across synthetic and real-world datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 3D 高斯泼溅 (3DGS) 极大地提高了神经渲染的速度，但它对当今的移动 SoC 的计算要求仍然很高。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 Lumina，一个硬件算法共同设计的系统，它集成了两个主要优化：一种新颖的算法 \({\mathcal {S}}^2\) 和一个辐射缓存机制 \({\mathcal {RC}}\) ，以提高神经渲染的效率。 \({\mathcal {S}}^2\) 算法利用渲染中的时间一致性来减少计算开销，而 \({\mathcal {RC}}\) 则利用 3DGS 的颜色集成过程来降低密集光栅化计算的频率。与这些技术相结合，我们提出了一种加速器架构 LuminCore，以进一步加速缓存查找并解决光栅化中基本的低效率问题。我们表明，与移动 Volta GPU 相比，Lumina 实现了 4.5 倍的加速和 5.3 倍的能耗降低，并且在合成数据集和真实数据集上具有边际质量损失（峰值信噪比降低 < 0.2 dB）。

papers.title: LUT Tensor Core: A Software-Hardware Co-Design for LUT-Based Low-Bit LLM Inference.
papers.abstract:
Large Language Model (LLM) inference becomes resource-intensive, prompting a shift toward low-bit model weights to reduce the memory footprint and improve efficiency. Such low-bit LLMs necessitate the mixed-precision matrix multiplication (mpGEMM), an important yet underexplored operation involving the multiplication of lower-precision weights with higher-precision activations. Off-the-shelf hardware does not support this operation natively, leading to indirect, thus inefficient, dequantization-based implementations.

In this paper, we study the lookup table (LUT)-based approach for mpGEMM and find that a conventional LUT implementation fails to achieve the promised gains. To unlock the full potential of LUT-based mpGEMM, we propose LUT Tensor Core , a software-hardware co-design for low-bit LLM inference. LUT Tensor Core differentiates itself from conventional LUT designs through: 1) software-based optimizations to minimize table precompute overhead and weight reinterpretation to reduce table storage; 2) a LUT-based Tensor Core hardware design with an elongated tiling shape to maximize table reuse and a bit-serial design to support diverse precision combinations in mpGEMM; 3) a new instruction set and compilation optimizations for LUT-based mpGEMM. LUT Tensor Core significantly outperforms existing pure software LUT implementations and achieves a 1.44 × improvement in compute density and energy efficiency compared to previous state-of-the-art LUT-based accelerators.
papers.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理变得资源密集型，促使转向低位模型权重，以减少内存占用并提高效率。这种低位 LLM 需要混合精度矩阵乘法 (mpGEMM)，这是一种重要但尚未充分研究的运算，涉及较低精度权重与较高精度激活的乘法。现成的硬件本身并不支持此操作，从而导致间接的、低效的、基于反量化的实现。

在本文中，我们研究了基于查找表 (LUT) 的 mpGEMM 方法，发现传统的 LUT 实现无法实现预期的收益。为了释放基于 LUT 的 mpGEMM 的全部潜力，我们提出了 LUT Tensor Core，这是一种用于低位 LLM 推理的软硬件协同设计。 LUT Tensor Core 与传统 LUT 设计的区别在于：1）基于软件的优化，最大限度地减少表预计算开销和权重重新解释，以减少表存储； 2) 基于 LUT 的 Tensor Core 硬件设计，具有细长的平铺形状，以最大限度地提高表的重用性，并采用位串行设计，以支持 mpGEMM 中的多种精度组合； 3）基于LUT的mpGEMM的新指令集和编译优化。 LUT Tensor Core 的性能显着优于现有的纯软件 LUT 实现，与之前最先进的基于 LUT 的加速器相比，计算密度和能源效率提高了 1.44 倍。

papers.title: Magellan: A High-Performance Loop-Guided Prefetcher for Indirect Memory Access.
papers.abstract:
Graph analytics and sparse linear algebra applications heavily rely on indirect memory access (IMA). IMAs are characterized by poor temporal and spatial locality, which causes frequent high-latency DRAM accesses. While dedicated hardware prefetchers for IMA have been explored, they target narrow access patterns and tend to introduce significant hardware complexity. Software prefetching offers a promising alternative, leveraging compiler analysis to prefetch indirection patterns. However, existing software prefetchers struggle with sparse applications due to limited loop iterations and complex IMA patterns across nested loops.

We propose Magellan , a novel loop-guided software prefetcher designed to detect and schedule IMA prefetches efficiently. Magellan introduces two key innovations: (1) extracting dependence graphs across loop levels to detect complex IMA patterns and (2) capturing inner-outer loop semantics to prefetch for both current and future iterations. We evaluate Magellan on 14 memory-intensive benchmarks using real-world datasets from social networks and web graphs. Compared to the best existing IMA software prefetcher, Magellan reduces cache misses by 25% and dynamic instruction counts by 14% on average. This results in a 1.14 × average speedup, with performance gains of up to 1.41 ×.
papers.abstract_zh:
图分析和稀疏线性代数应用严重依赖间接内存访问 (IMA)。 IMA 的特点是时间和空间局部性较差，这会导致频繁的高延迟 DRAM 访问。虽然已经探索了 IMA 的专用硬件预取器，但它们的目标是狭窄的访问模式，并且往往会引入显着的硬件复杂性。软件预取提供了一种有前途的替代方案，利用编译器分析来预取间接模式。然而，由于有限的循环迭代和跨嵌套循环的复杂 IMA 模式，现有的软件预取器难以应对稀疏应用程序。

我们提出了 Magellan，一种新颖的循环引导软件预取器，旨在有效地检测和调度 IMA 预取。 Magellan 引入了两项关键创新：(1) 跨循环级别提取依赖图以检测复杂的 IMA 模式；(2) 捕获内外循环语义以预取当前和未来的迭代。我们使用来自社交网络和网络图的真实数据集在 14 个内存密集型基准上评估 Magellan。与现有最好的 IMA 软件预取器相比，Magellan 平均将缓存缺失减少 25%，将动态指令计数减少 14%。这导致平均加速 1.14 倍，性能提升高达 1.41 倍。

papers.title: MagiCache: A Virtual In-Cache Computing Engine.
papers.abstract:
The rise of data-parallel applications poses a significant challenge to the energy consumption of computing architectures. In-cache computation is a promising solution for achieving high parallelism and energy efficiency because it can eliminate data movement between the cache and the processor. Existing in-cache computing architectures transform a portion of cache arrays into computing arrays, with all rows of these arrays serving as computing lines. The remaining cache arrays are used as cachelines to store the data required by computing arrays or processors. However, in these array-level in-cache computing architectures, only a few computing lines in each computing array are active at runtime while the others are idle, which incurs severe cache capacity loss and space under-utilization. In addition, bursty memory accesses of data-parallel applications also cause significant in-cache data movement latency.

To address these problems, we propose MagiCache, a virtual in-cache computing engine. First, we design a novel cacheline-level in-cache computing architecture in which each cache array can configure some rows as computing lines and the other rows as cachelines with negligible overhead. Second, a virtual engine is further designed on this novel architecture to dynamically allocate different rows of each array as computing lines or cachelines based on runtime computation and storage requirements, thus realizing efficient cacheline-level space management. Finally, we present an instruction chaining technique to overlap the bursty access latency by enabling asynchronous execution of computing arrays. Evaluation results show that MagiCache achieves a 1.19x-1.61x speedup over the state-of-the-art in-cache computing architectures with 6.5 KB of additional storage. Our cacheline-level space management improves cache utilization by 42% and reduces cache miss rate by 10%-40% over various memory access patterns. The instruction chaining technique also reduces the memory access time by 2%-27%.
papers.abstract_zh:
数据并行应用的兴起对计算架构的能耗提出了重大挑战。缓存内计算是实现高并行性和能源效率的有前途的解决方案，因为它可以消除缓存和处理器之间的数据移动。现有的缓存内计算架构将部分缓存阵列转变为计算阵列，这些阵列的所有行都作为计算线。其余的缓存阵列用作缓存行，用于存储计算阵列或处理器所需的数据。然而，在这些阵列级缓存内计算架构中，每个计算阵列中只有少数计算线在运行时处于活动状态，而其他计算线则处于空闲状态，这会导致严重的缓存容量损失和空间利用率不足。此外，数据并行应用程序的突发内存访问也会导致显着的缓存内数据移动延迟。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 MagiCache，一种虚拟缓存内计算引擎。首先，我们设计了一种新颖的缓存行级缓存内计算架构，其中每个缓存阵列可以将一些行配置为计算行，将其他行配置为缓存行，而开销可以忽略不计。其次，在这种新颖的架构上进一步设计了虚拟引擎，根据运行时计算和存储需求动态地将每个阵列的不同行分配为计算线或缓存线，从而实现高效的缓存线级空间管理。最后，我们提出了一种指令链接技术，通过启用计算阵列的异步执行来重叠突发访问延迟。评估结果表明，MagiCache 在 6.5 KB 额外存储的情况下，比最先进的缓存内计算架构实现了 1.19 倍至 1.61 倍的加速。与各种内存访问模式相比，我们的缓存行级空间管理将缓存利用率提高了 42%，并将缓存未命中率降低了 10%-40%。指令链技术还将内存访问时间减少了2%-27%。

papers.title: MD-pipe: A Strong Scaling Enhanced Pipeline Architecture for Ab Initio Accuracy Molecular Dynamics.
papers.abstract: Molecular Dynamics (MD) simulations with first-principles accuracy are widely applied in various fields, including materials science and molecular pharmacology. Current research focus on reducing the solution time of ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) from both algorithmic and software perspectives. However, these optimizations are still far from meeting the ever-increasing performance demands for AIMD. In this paper, a fine-grained pipeline architecture is proposed to further optimize the solution time of MD. We design a high-utilization systolic line that eliminates the injection and evacuation time during each matrix operation. Besides, in conjunction with the MD dataflow, a computation migration strategy is introduced to reduce the storage overhead. Furthermore, we leverage dataflow rearrangement and preloading to eliminate the matrix transpose costs. The MD-pipe architecture has been implemented and verified using AMD VPK180 FPGA and ASIC synthesis tools. Evaluation results show that our work on FPGA and ASIC outperforms the NVIDIA A100 GPU by 2.97 × and 23.77 × respectively. Moreover, the ASIC implementation achieves a simulation speed of 67.6 μs / day , outperforming state-of-the-art work on Fugaku supercomputer by 454 times under extremely strong scaling deployment (one-atom-per-core).
papers.abstract_zh: 具有第一性原理精度的分子动力学（MD）模拟广泛应用于材料科学和分子药理学等各个领域。目前的研究重点是从算法和软件角度减少从头算分子动力学（AIMD）的求解时间。然而这些优化还远远不能满足AIMD不断增长的性能需求。本文提出了一种细粒度的管道架构来进一步优化MD的求解时间。我们设计了一条高利用率的收缩管路，消除了每次矩阵操作期间的注射和排空时间。此外，结合MD数据流，引入计算迁移策略以减少存储开销。此外，我们利用数据流重新排列和预加载来消除矩阵转置成本。 MD-pipe 架构已使用 AMD VPK180 FPGA 和 ASIC 综合工具实现和验证。评估结果表明，我们在 FPGA 和 ASIC 上的工作分别优于 NVIDIA A100 GPU 2.97 × 和 23.77 ×。此外，ASIC实现的模拟速度达到了67.6μs/天，在极强的扩展部署（每个核心一个原子）下，性能比Fugaku超级计算机上最先进的工作高出454倍。

papers.title: MeshSlice: Efficient 2D Tensor Parallelism for Distributed DNN Training.
papers.abstract: In distributed training of large DNN models, the scalability of one-dimensional (1D) tensor parallelism (TP) is limited because of its high communication cost. 2D TP attains extra scalability and efficiency because it reduces communication relative to 1D TP. Unfortunately, existing algorithms for general matrix multiplication (GeMM) in 2D TP suffer from inefficiencies. Indeed, Cannon’s algorithm incurs high traffic, SUMMA suffers from high synchronization overhead, and a 2D GeMM with collective communication operations does not overlap communication with computation. In addition, it is difficult to optimize the numerous parameters of 2D TP, including the dataflow, mesh shape, and sharding. As a result, human experts are needed to find efficient configurations of 2D TP. To address these problems, this paper proposes MeshSlice , a novel 2D GeMM algorithm for efficient 2D TP in distributed DNN training. The MeshSlice algorithm slices the collective communications into multiple partial collectives that allow overlapping communication with computation. As a result, MeshSlice hides most of the communication latency. We also present the MeshSlice LLM autotuner , which automates finding an efficient 2D GeMM dataflow configuration, mesh shape, and communication granularity for Large Language Model (LLM) training using analytical cost models. To evaluate MeshSlice, we simulate TPUv4 clusters training LLM models. We show that MeshSlice maintains good efficiency up to at least 256-way 2D TP. In a cluster of 256 TPUs, MeshSlice trains the GPT-3 and Megatron-NLG models 12.0% and 23.4% faster, respectively, than the state-of-the-art algorithm.
papers.abstract_zh: 在大型 DNN 模型的分布式训练中，一维（1D）张量并行（TP）的可扩展性由于其高通信成本而受到限制。 2D TP 获得了额外的可扩展性和效率，因为它相对于 1D TP 减少了通信。不幸的是，现有的 2D TP 通用矩阵乘法 (GeMM) 算法效率低下。事实上，Cannon 的算法会产生高流量，SUMMA 会遭受高同步开销，而具有集体通信操作的 2D GeMM 不会将通信与计算重叠。此外，2D TP 的众多参数（包括数据流、网格形状和分片）难以优化。因此，人类专家需要找到有效的 2D TP 配置。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了 MeshSlice，一种新颖的 2D GeMM 算法，用于在分布式 DNN 训练中实现高效的 2D TP。 MeshSlice 算法将集合通信分割成多个部分集合，允许重叠通信与计算。因此，MeshSlice 隐藏了大部分通信延迟。我们还推出了 MeshSlice LLM 自动调谐器，它可以使用分析成本模型自动寻找高效的 2D GeMM 数据流配置、网格形状和通信粒度，以进行大型语言模型 (LLM) 训练。为了评估 MeshSlice，我们模拟了训练 LLM 模型的 TPUv4 集群。我们表明，MeshSlice 在至少 256 路 2D TP 下仍保持良好的效率。在 256 个 TPU 的集群中，MeshSlice 训练 GPT-3 和 Megatron-NLG 模型的速度分别比最先进的算法快 12.0% 和 23.4%。

papers.title: Meta's Second Generation AI Chip: Model-Chip Co-Design and Productionization Experiences.
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of AI workloads at Meta has motivated our in-house development of AI chips, aiming to significantly reduce the total cost of ownership and mitigate risks posed by unpredictable GPU supplies. At ISCA’23, we presented Meta’s first-generation AI chip, MTIA 1. This paper describes its successor, MTIA 2i, now deployed at scale and serving billions of users. MTIA 2i significantly improves upon MTIA 1, reducing total cost of ownership by 44% compared to GPUs while delivering competitive performance per watt. A key differentiator is its memory hierarchy: instead of costly HBM, it uses large SRAM alongside LPDDR. Although there has been a proliferation of publications on AI chips, they often focus on architectural design and overlook three critical aspects: (1) co-designing and optimizing ML models to work effectively with the AI chip; (2) demonstrating sufficient flexibility to support a wide range of models; and (3) during the productionization process, addressing challenges unanticipated or decisions deferred at design time, such as dealing with memory errors, safe overclocking, reducing provisioned power, and implementing real-time firmware updates to mitigate silicon design defects. A key contribution of this paper is sharing our experience with these aspects, based on our journey of productionizing MTIA 2i at scale.
papers.abstract_zh: Meta 人工智能工作负载的快速增长激励了我们内部开发人工智能芯片，旨在显着降低总拥有成本并减轻不可预测的 GPU 供应带来的风险。在 ISCA’23 上，我们展示了 Meta 的第一代人工智能芯片 MTIA 1。本文介绍了其后继产品 MTIA 2i，现已大规模部署并为数十亿用户提供服务。 MTIA 2i 显着改进了 MTIA 1，与 GPU 相比，总体拥有成本降低了 44%，同时提供具有竞争力的每瓦性能。一个关键的区别在于它的内存层次结构：它使用大型 SRAM 和 LPDDR，而不是昂贵的 HBM。尽管有关人工智能芯片的出版物数量不断增加，但它们往往专注于架构设计，而忽视了三个关键方面：（1）共同设计和优化机器学习模型以与人工智能芯片有效配合； (2) 表现出足够的灵活性来支持广泛的模型； (3) 在生产过程中，解决设计时未预料到的挑战或推迟的决策，例如处理内存错误、安全超频、降低配置功率以及实施实时固件更新以减轻芯片设计缺陷。本文的一个关键贡献是基于我们大规模生产 MTIA 2i 的历程，分享我们在这些方面的经验。

papers.title: MicroScopiQ: Accelerating Foundational Models through Outlier-Aware Microscaling Quantization.
papers.abstract: Quantization of foundational models (FMs) is significantly more challenging than traditional DNNs due to the emergence of large magnitude values called outliers. Existing outlier-aware algorithm-architecture co-design techniques either use mixed-precision, retaining outliers at high precision but compromise hardware efficiency, or quantize inliers and outliers at the same precision, improving hardware efficiency at the cost of accuracy. To address this mutual exclusivity, we propose MicroScopiQ, a novel co-design technique that leverages pruning to complement outlier-aware quantization. MicroScopiQ retains outliers at higher precision while pruning a certain fraction of least important weights to distribute the additional outlier bits; ensuring high accuracy, aligned memory and hardware efficiency. We design a high-throughput, low overhead accelerator architecture composed of multi-precision INT processing elements and a network-on-chip called ReCoN that efficiently abstracts the complexity of supporting high-precision outliers. Additionally, unlike prior techniques, MicroScopiQ does not assume any locality of outlier weights, enabling applicability to a broad range of FMs. Extensive experiments across diverse quantization settings demonstrate that MicroScopiQ achieves state-of-the-art quantization accuracy, while delivering up to 3 × faster inference and 2 × lower energy consumption compared to existing alternatives. Code is available at: MicroScopiQ-LLM-Quantization.git
papers.abstract_zh: 由于出现了称为异常值的大幅值，基础模型 (FM) 的量化比传统 DNN 更具挑战性。现有的异常值感知算法架构协同设计技术要么使用混合精度，以高精度保留异常值，但会损害硬件效率，要么以相同的精度量化内部值和异常值，以牺牲准确性为代价提高硬件效率。为了解决这种相互排他性，我们提出了 MicroScopiQ，这是一种新颖的协同设计技术，利用修剪来补充异常​​值感知量化。 MicroScopiQ 以更高的精度保留异常值，同时修剪最不重要的权重的某一部分以分配额外的异常值位；确保高精度、一致的内存和硬件效率。我们设计了一种高吞吐量、低开销的加速器架构，由多精度 INT 处理元件和名为 ReCoN 的片上网络组成，可有效抽象支持高精度异常值的复杂性。此外，与现有技术不同，MicroScopiQ 不假设任何异常权重的局部性，从而能够适用于广泛的 FM。跨不同量化设置的大量实验表明，MicroScopiQ 实现了最先进的量化精度，同时与现有替代方案相比，推理速度提高了 3 倍，能耗降低了 2 倍。代码可在以下位置获取：MicroScopiQ-LLM-Quantization.git

papers.title: MoPAC: Efficiently Mitigating Rowhammer with Probabilistic Activation Counting.
papers.abstract:
Rowhammer has worsened over the last decade. Existing in-DRAM solutions, such as TRR, were broken with simple patterns. In response, the recent DDR5 JEDEC standards modify the DRAM array to enable Per-Row Activation Counters (PRAC) for tracking aggressor rows. They also extend the DRAM timings to support the operations required to update the PRAC counters. Unfortunately, the increased memory timings cause significant performance overheads (on average 10%) even for benign applications and even at current Rowhammer thresholds. The goal of this paper is to minimize the slowdown of PRAC while retaining the security benefits of PRAC.

This paper proposes Mitigating Rowhammer with Probabilistic Activation Counts (MoPAC) , which reduces the slowdown of updating the PRAC counters by performing the updates probabilistically, thereby incurring the latency overhead of counter updates for only a small subset of activations. To ensure security in the presence of probabilistic counters, MOPAC adjusts the threshold at which the row undergoes mitigation. We propose two variants of MoPAC: MoPAC-C (Memory-Controller Side) and MoPAC-D (DRAM Side).

MoPAC-C relies on having two types of precharge commands: one that incurs normal latency and does not do counter updates, and the other that incurs higher latency and performs counter updates. MoPAC-C probabilistically chooses when the longer precharge must be used to perform update of the PRAC counter. MoPAC-D is a completely in-DRAM solution that probabilistically selects which activations will be selected for performing counter updates and obtains the time required for counter-updates using ALERT or REF. Our evaluations show that, for a Rowhammer threshold of 500 (10 × lower than current thresholds), MoPAC-C and MoPAC-D incur an average slowdown of only \(1.7\%\) and \(0.7\%\) , much less than the 10% incurred by PRAC. MoPAC removes one of the major obstacles to the commercial adoption of PRAC.
papers.abstract_zh:
Rowhammer 的情况在过去十年中不断恶化。现有的 DRAM 解决方案（例如 TRR）被简单的模式所打破。作为回应，最近的 DDR5 JEDEC 标准修改了 DRAM 阵列，以启用每行激活计数器 (PRAC) 来跟踪攻击者行。它们还扩展了 DRAM 时序以支持更新 PRAC 计数器所需的操作。不幸的是，即使对于良性应用程序，甚至在当前的 Rowhammer 阈值下，增加的内存计时也会导致显着的性能开销（平均 10%）。本文的目标是最大限度地减少 PRAC 的速度下降，同时保留 PRAC 的安全优势。

本文提出了使用概率激活计数缓解 Rowhammer (MoPAC)，它通过概率执行更新来减少更新 PRAC 计数器的速度，从而仅针对一小部分激活产生计数器更新的延迟开销。为了确保存在概率计数器时的安全性，MOPAC 调整行进行缓解的阈值。我们提出了 MoPAC 的两种变体：MoPAC-C（内存控制器端）和 MoPAC-D（DRAM 端）。

MoPAC-C 依赖于两种类型的预充电命令：一种会产生正常延迟且不执行计数器更新，另一种会产生较高延迟并执行计数器更新。 MoPAC-C 根据概率选择何时必须使用较长的预充电来执行 PRAC 计数器的更新。 MoPAC-D 是一个完全在 DRAM 中的解决方案，它以概率方式选择将选择哪些激活来执行计数器更新，并使用 ALERT 或 REF 获取计数器更新所需的时间。我们的评估表明，对于 500 的 Rowhammer 阈值（比当前阈值低 10 倍），MoPAC-C 和 MoPAC-D 的平均减速仅为 \(1.7\%\) 和 \(0.7\%\) ，远低于 PRAC 造成的 10%。 MoPAC 消除了 PRAC 商业应用的主要障碍之一。

papers.title: Need for zkSpeed: Accelerating HyperPlonk for Zero-Knowledge Proofs.
papers.abstract: Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZKPs) are a rapidly growing technique for privacy-preserving and verifiable computation. ZKPs enable one party (a prover: \(\mathcal {P}\) ) to prove to another (a verifier: \(\mathcal {V}\) ) that a statement is true or correct without revealing any additional information. This powerful capability has led to ZKPs being applied and proposed for application in blockchain technologies, verifiable machine learning, and electronic voting. However, ZKPs have yet to see widespread, ubiquitous adoption due to the exceptionally high computational complexity of the proving process. Naturally, there has been recent work to accelerate ZKP primitives and protocols using GPUs and ASICs. However, the protocols considered so far face one of two challenges: they require a trusted setup for each new application or generate large proofs with high verification costs, limiting their applicability in scenarios with numerous verifiers or strict verification time constraints. HyperPlonk is a state-of-the-art ZKP protocol that supports both one-time, universal setup and small proof sizes/verification costs expected by publicly verifiable, consensus-based systems (e.g., blockchain). While HyperPlonk’s setup and verifier properties are highly desirable, the proving phase is costly. A HyperPlonk prover must compute on large bitwidths (e.g., 255-381b) and polynomials (e.g., of degree 2 24 ), employs computationally (e.g., MSM) and bandwidth (e.g., SumCheck) intensive kernels, and the complete protocol comprises many steps, each constituting distinct kernels. We present an accelerator, zkSpeed , to address these challenges and effectively accelerate HyperPlonk. zkSpeed provides hardware support for all major primitives (e.g., SumCheck and Multi-Scalar Multiplications (MSMs)) and judiciously schedules each protocol phase onto the allocated hardware. We leverage high-level synthesis to thoroughly explore and optimize the hardware design tradeoffs of each unit. These are then input into a full-chip simulator for large-scale design space exploration to optimize all aspects of the architecture in unison. Our Pareto analysis demonstrates that with a 366mm 2 chip and 2 TB/s of off-chip bandwidth, zkSpeed is able to accelerate the entire proof generation by 801 × (geomean) over a CPU baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 零知识证明（ZKP）是一种快速发展的隐私保护和可验证计算技术。 ZKP 使一方（证明者： \(\mathcal {P}\) ）能够向另一方（验证者： \(\mathcal {V}\) ）证明某个陈述是真实或正确的，而无需透露任何其他信息。这种强大的功能导致 ZKP 被应用并被提议应用于区块链技术、可验证的机器学习和电子投票。然而，由于证明过程的计算复杂性极高，ZKP 尚未得到广泛、普遍的采用。当然，最近出现了使用 GPU 和 ASIC 加速 ZKP 原语和协议的工作。然而，到目前为止所考虑的协议面临两个挑战之一：它们需要为每个新应用程序进行可信设置，或者生成具有高验证成本的大型证明，从而限制了它们在具有大量验证者或严格验证时间限制的场景中的适用性。 HyperPlonk 是一种最先进的 ZKP 协议，支持一次性、通用设置和可公开验证、基于共识的系统（例如区块链）所期望的小证明大小/验证成本。虽然 HyperPlonk 的设置和验证器属性非常理想，但证明阶段的成本很高。 HyperPlonk 证明者必须计算大位宽（例如 255-381b）和多项式（例如 2 24 次），采用计算（例如 MSM）和带宽（例如 SumCheck）密集型内核，并且完整的协议包含许多步骤，每个步骤构成不同的内核。我们提出了一个加速器 zkSpeed 来应对这些挑战并有效加速 HyperPlonk。 zkSpeed 为所有主要原语（例如 SumCheck 和多标量乘法 (MSM)）提供硬件支持，并明智地将每个协议阶段安排到分配的硬件上。我们利用高级综合来彻底探索和优化每个单元的硬件设计权衡。然后将这些输入到全芯片模拟器中，进行大规模设计空间探索，以一致优化架构的各个方面。我们的 Pareto 分析表明，凭借 366mm 2 芯片和 2 TB/s 的片外带宽，zkSpeed 能够将整个证明生成速度比 CPU 基线提高 801 ×（几何均值）。

papers.title: Neo: Towards Efficient Fully Homomorphic Encryption Acceleration using Tensor Core.
papers.abstract:
Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) is an emerging cryptographic technique for privacy-preserving computation, which enables computations on the encrypted data. Nonetheless, the massive computational demands of FHE prevent its further application to real-world workloads. To tackle this problem, several studies focus on the ASIC-based acceleration for FHE. However, the rapid evolution of FHE algorithms poses challenges to the generality of ASIC accelerator design. By contrast, a number of works rely on GPGPUs for FHE accelerations, due to the high parallelism and flexibility provided by GPGPUs.

In this work, we propose a GPGPU-based acceleration solution that supports the Cheon-Kim-Kim-Song (CKKS) scheme by further exploiting Tensor Core(TCU) capabilities. In our study, we first analyze the FHE applications based on GPGPUs and emphasize the poor data reuse of some FHE kernels. Subsequently, we highlight the inefficient usage of TCUs due to the unused FP64 components. To address these issues, we propose a novel FHE acceleration solution based on GPGPU named Neo, which features: 1) algorithmic optimizations that transform scalar multiplication and element-wise multiplication into matrix multiplication; 2) data layout optimizations for FHE kernels to optimize for matrix multiplications; 3) Accelerating matrix multiplication with the floating-point components in TCUs to leverage the strengths of various components within the GPU. Experimental results demonstrate that within NVIDIA A100 GPGPU, Neo outperforms TensorFHE by 3.28 ×.
papers.abstract_zh:
全同态加密（FHE）是一种新兴的隐私保护计算密码技术，可以对加密数据进行计算。尽管如此，FHE 的大量计算需求阻碍了其进一步应用于现实世界的工作负载。为了解决这个问题，一些研究重点关注基于 ASIC 的 FHE 加速。然而，FHE算法的快速发展对ASIC加速器设计的通用性提出了挑战。相比之下，由于 GPGPU 提供的高并行性和灵活性，许多工作依赖 GPGPU 进行 FHE 加速。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 GPGPU 的加速解决方案，通过进一步利用 Tensor Core（TCU）功能来支持 Cheon-Kim-Kim-Song（CKKS）方案。在我们的研究中，我们首先分析了基于 GPGPU 的 FHE 应用，并强调了一些 FHE 内核的数据重用性较差。随后，我们强调由于未使用 FP64 组件而导致 TCU 使用效率低下。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于 GPGPU 的新型 FHE 加速解决方案 Neo，其特点是：1）算法优化，将标量乘法和逐元素乘法转换为矩阵乘法； 2) FHE 内核的数据布局优化，以优化矩阵乘法； 3) 利用 TCU 中的浮点组件加速矩阵乘法，以充分利用 GPU 中各种组件的优势。实验结果表明，在 NVIDIA A100 GPGPU 中，Neo 的性能优于 TensorFHE 3.28 倍。

papers.title: Neoscope: How Resilient Is My SoC to Workload Churn?
papers.abstract:
The lifetime of hardware is increasing, but the lifetime of software is not. This leads to devices that, while performant when released, have fall-off due to changing workload suitability. To ensure that performance is maintained, computer architects must begin considering the effects of evolving workloads early in the design process. The ways that workloads can change, i.e., churn, over time profoundly affect hardware’s ability to maintain performance.

To better understand churn, we introduce the concepts Magnitude and Disruption , which enable how workloads change to be quantitatively described. By leveraging these terms, we present churn as a span, where the churn of a given workload can be categorized as either Minimal , Perturbing , Escalating , or Volatile . To account for how churn affects performance, we propose Neoscope, the first multi-objective pre-silicon design space exploration tool for investigating System-on-Chip (SoC) architectures that are resilient to workload churn. Neoscope uses integer linear programming and concepts from job-shop scheduling to construct near-optimal SoCs for a given workload. Unlike previous methods, Neoscope approaches (and often finds) the globally optimal SoC with a single invocation, instead of needing to parameter sweep. Neoscope is also multi-objective, i.e., it can optimize for many kinds of metrics other than absolute performance, including area, energy, cost, and carbon efficiencies. Using Neoscope, we explore near-optimal SoCs for many workload-churn configurations, and investigate how changing the objective function changes the ideal SoC. Neoscope shows that small SoCs need high levels of specialization, but that this is risky, as it increases susceptibility to churn.
papers.abstract_zh:
硬件的寿命在增加，但软件的寿命却没有。这导致设备虽然在发布时性能良好，但由于工作负载适用性的变化而性能下降。为了确保保持性能，计算机架构师必须在设计过程的早期就开始考虑不断变化的工作负载的影响。随着时间的推移，工作负载的变化方式（即流失）会深刻影响硬件维持性能的能力。

为了更好地理解流失，我们引入了“幅度”和“中断”这两个概念，它们可以定量描述工作负载的变化情况。通过利用这些术语，我们将流失率呈现为一个跨度，其中给定工作负载的流失率可以分为“最小”、“扰动”、“升级”或“易失”。为了解释流失对性能的影响，我们提出了 Nescope，这是第一个多目标投片前设计空间探索工具，用于研究对工作负载流失有弹性的片上系统 (SoC) 架构。 Neoscope 使用整数线性编程和作业车间调度的概念来为给定的工作负载构建近乎最佳的 SoC。与以前的方法不同，Nescope 通过一次调用即可接近（并且经常找到）全局最优 SoC，而不需要进行参数扫描。 Neoscope 也是多目标的，即它可以针对绝对性能以外的多种指标进行优化，包括面积、能源、成本和碳效率。使用 Nescope，我们探索了许多工作负载流失配置的近乎最佳的 SoC，并研究了改变目标函数如何改变理想的 SoC。 Neoscope 表明，小型 SoC 需要高水平的专业化，但这是有风险的，因为它会增加流失的可能性。

papers.title: NetCrafter: Tailoring Network Traffic for Non-Uniform Bandwidth Multi-GPU Systems.
papers.abstract: Multiple Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) are being integrated into systems to meet the computing demands of emerging workloads. To continuously support more GPUs in a system, it is important to connect them efficiently and effectively. To this end, emerging multi-GPU systems are adopting a hierarchical approach – a group of GPUs with high affinity are connected with higher-bandwidth networks, while multiple groups of GPUs are connected with lower-bandwidth networks to support the scaling of GPUs. Unfortunately, such a non-uniform bandwidth configuration leads to significant performance bottlenecks, especially across lower-bandwidth networks. We present NetCrafter , a combination of novel approaches to deal with the network traffic. NetCrafter is based on three observations: a) not all flits in the network fully utilize the network bandwidth, b) not all requested flits are even necessary – they are requested in the hope that their data might be useful later, c) some flits are more latency-sensitive than others and must be prioritized in the network. NetCrafter leverages these observations to reduce the network traffic by stitching compatible flits that are partly filled, and trimming the number of flits by not fetching flits that are unnecessary. NetCrafter also effectively manages network traffic by sequencing flits such that latency-sensitive flits reach their destinations faster. Although our proposed techniques are generic and can be applied to any network, they are especially useful in alleviating the bottlenecks presented by lower-bandwidth networks connecting multiple groups of GPUs. Overall, NetCrafter significantly improves multi-GPU performance, thereby contributing to efficient scaling of GPU-based systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 多个图形处理单元 (GPU) 正在集成到系统中，以满足新兴工作负载的计算需求。为了在系统中持续支持更多 GPU，高效且有效地连接它们非常重要。为此，新兴的多GPU系统正在采用分层方法——一组具有高亲和力的GPU与较高带宽的网络连接，而多组GPU与较低带宽的网络连接以支持GPU的扩展。不幸的是，这种不均匀的带宽配置会导致严重的性能瓶颈，尤其是在较低带宽的网络上。我们推出 NetCrafter，它是处理网络流量的新颖方法的组合。 NetCrafter 基于三个观察结果：a) 并非网络中的所有 flits 都充分利用网络带宽，b) 并非所有请求的 flits 都是必需的 – 请求它们是希望其数据稍后有用，c) 某些 flits 比其他 flits 对延迟更敏感，必须在网络中优先考虑。 NetCrafter 利用这些观察结果，通过缝合部分填充的兼容 flits 来减少网络流量，并通过不获取不必要的 flits 来减少 flits 数量。 NetCrafter 还可以通过对微流进行排序来有效管理网络流量，以便对延迟敏感的微流更快地到达目的地。尽管我们提出的技术是通用的并且可以应用于任何网络，但它们对于缓解连接多组 GPU 的较低带宽网络所带来的瓶颈特别有用。总体而言，NetCrafter 显着提高了多 GPU 性能，从而有助于高效扩展基于 GPU 的系统。

papers.title: NMP-PaK: Near-Memory Processing Acceleration of Scalable De Novo Genome Assembly.
papers.abstract:
De novo assembly enables investigations of unknown genomes, paving the way for personalized medicine and disease management. However, it faces immense computational challenges arising from the excessive data volumes and algorithmic complexity.

While state-of-the-art de novo assemblers utilize distributed systems for extreme-scale genome assembly, they demand substantial computational and memory resources. They also fail to address the inherent challenges of de novo assembly, including a large memory footprint, memory-bound behavior, and irregular data patterns stemming from complex, interdependent data structures. Given these challenges, de novo assembly merits a custom hardware solution, though existing approaches have not fully addressed the limitations.

We propose NMP-PaK, a hardware-software co-designed system that accelerates scalable de novo genome assembly through near-memory processing (NMP). Our channel-level NMP architecture addresses memory bottlenecks while providing sufficient scratchpad space for processing elements. Customized processing elements maximize parallelism while efficiently handling large data structures that are both dynamic and interdependent. Software optimizations include customized batch processing to reduce the memory footprint and hybrid CPU-NMP processing to address hardware underutilization caused by irregular data patterns.

NMP-PaK conducts the same genome assembly while incurring a 14 × smaller memory footprint compared to the state-of-the-art de novo assembly. Moreover, NMP-PaK delivers 16 × and 5.7 × performance improvements over the CPU and GPU baselines, respectively, with a 2.4 × reduction in memory operations. Consequently, NMP-PaK achieves 8.3 × greater throughput than state-of-the-art de novo assembly under the same resource constraints, showcasing its superior computational efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh:
从头组装能够研究未知基因组，为个性化医疗和疾病管理铺平道路。然而，由于数据量过多和算法复杂性，它面临着巨大的计算挑战。

虽然最先进的从头组装机利用分布式系统进行超大规模基因组组装，但它们需要大量的计算和内存资源。它们还无法解决从头组装的固有挑战，包括大的内存占用、内存限制行为以及复杂、相互依赖的数据结构产生的不规则数据模式。考虑到这些挑战，从头组装值得定制硬件解决方案，尽管现有方法尚未完全解决这些限制。

我们提出了 NMP-PaK，这是一种硬件-软件共同设计的系统，可通过近内存处理 (NMP) 加速可扩展的从头基因组组装。我们的通道级 NMP 架构解决了内存瓶颈，同时为处理元素提供了足够的暂存器空间。定制的处理元素最大限度地提高并行性，同时有效地处理动态且相互依赖的大型数据结构。软件优化包括定制批处理以减少内存占用，以及混合 CPU-NMP 处理以解决由不规则数据模式导致的硬件利用率不足的问题。

与最先进的从头组装相比，NMP-PaK 进行相同的基因组组装，同时内存占用减少 14 倍。此外，NMP-PaK 的性能比 CPU 和 GPU 基准分别提高了 16 倍和 5.7 倍，同时内存操作减少了 2.4 倍。因此，在相同的资源限制下，NMP-PaK 的吞吐量比最先进的从头组装高出 8.3 倍，展示了其卓越的计算效率。

papers.title: NUPEA: Optimizing Critical Loads on Spatial Dataflow Architectures via Non-Uniform Processing-Element Access.
papers.abstract:
Data movement is the dominant energy, performance, and scalability bottleneck in modern architectures. Systems have tackled data movement by distributing data, e.g., via non-uniform memory access (NUMA) architectures. However, to reduce data movement, these architectures must identify critical data and place it closer to compute. Clever data placement is complex and often ineffective.

Spatial dataflow architectures (SDAs) present a new opportunity to tackle data movement. SDAs distribute program instructions across a spatial fabric of processing elements (PEs). On large SDAs, some PEs are necessarily closer to memory than others, giving rise to non-uniform processing-element access (NUPEA). Clever instruction placement can thus reduce data movement by, e.g., placing critical loads close to memory.

This paper introduces NUPEA and contrasts it with prior data-centric approaches to scaling data movement. We find that it is often easier for the compiler to identify critical loads than the data they access, making NUPEA applicable where NUMA is not. We present simple architecture and compiler optimizations for NUPEA and implement them on the Monaco SDA architecture and effcc compiler, both industry products by Efficient Computer. On Monaco, across a range of important kernels, NUPEA yields an avg 28% speedup over a uniform-PE-access (UPEA) SDA and an avg 20% speed over a UPEA SDA with NUMA.
papers.abstract_zh:
数据移动是现代架构中主要的能源、性能和可扩展性瓶颈。系统通过分发数据来解决数据移动问题，例如通过非均匀内存访问（NUMA）架构。然而，为了减少数据移动，这些架构必须识别关键数据并将其放置在更靠近计算的位置。巧妙的数据放置很复杂而且通常效率低下。

空间数据流架构（SDAs）为处理数据移动提供了新的机会。 SDA 在处理元件 (PE) 的空间结构中分发程序指令。在大型 SDA 上，某些 PE 必然比其他 PE 更靠近内存，从而导致非均匀处理元素访问 (NUPEA)。因此，巧妙的指令放置可以通过例如将关键负载放置在内存附近来减少数据移动。

本文介绍了 NUPEA，并将其与之前以数据为中心的扩展数据移动的方法进行了对比。我们发现，编译器识别关键负载通常比它们访问的数据更容易，这使得 NUPEA 适用于 NUMA 不适用的情况。我们为 NUPEA 提供简单的架构和编译器优化，并在 Monaco SDA 架构和 effcc 编译器（Efficient Computer 的行业产品）上实现它们。在 Monaco 上，跨一系列重要内核，NUPEA 比统一 PE 访问 (UPEA) SDA 平均加速 28%，比具有 NUMA 的 UPEA SDA 平均加速 20%。

papers.title: Nyx: Virtualizing dataflow execution on shared FPGA platforms.
papers.abstract:
As FPGAs become more widespread for improving computing performance within cloud infrastructure, researchers aim to equip them with virtualization features to enable resource sharing in both temporal and spatial domains, thereby improving hardware utilization. Existing multi-tenant solutions focus on task-parallel models, where tasks are assigned to distinct regions to process separate sets of data. However, this model introduces waiting times between dependent and pipelined tasks, leading to longer response times for applications. The root cause is the lack of support for dataflow execution -a key potential of FPGAs and a crucial optimization for applications. Dataflow allows direct data streaming between operators, forming a task-pipelined model that reduces application latency by overlapping task operations within its workflow.

This paper presents Nyx, the first system to enable dataflow execution in a task-based virtualized and shared FPGA environment. Nyx enables efficient resource sharing by dividing the FPGA into distinct reconfigurable regions. At its core, Nyx employs virtual FIFOs, independent channels that allow seamless communication between pipelined tasks. Its approach ensures smooth task operation even when the predecessor or successor tasks are not simultaneously scheduled in the FPGA, making them agnostic to their dependencies, communication channels or data locations. An FPGA hypervisor is designed to handle all data dependencies and efficiently dispatch pipelined tasks across regions at high throughput. Nyx outperforms existing state of the art virtualized task-parallel approaches by 1.26x - 8.87x across a series of real-world benchmarks. Furthermore, it reduces response times by 2.8x - 3.28x during low-demand periods, decreasing also deadline violations by up to 76.5%. Under high-demand conditions, Nyx delivers 2x - 2.75x reduction, 34.5% fewer violations, and up to 1.9x reduced tail response time.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着 FPGA 在云基础设施中提高计算性能的应用越来越广泛，研究人员的目标是为其配备虚拟化功能，以实现时域和空间域的资源共享，从而提高硬件利用率。现有的多租户解决方案侧重于任务并行模型，其中任务被分配到不同的区域来处理单独的数据集。但是，此模型在相关任务和管道任务之间引入了等待时间，导致应用程序的响应时间更长。根本原因是缺乏对数据流执行的支持——这是 FPGA 的关键潜力，也是应用程序的关键优化。数据流允许操作员之间直接进行数据流，形成任务流水线模型，通过在工作流程中重叠任务操作来减少应用程序延迟。

本文介绍了 Nyx，这是第一个在基于任务的虚拟化和共享 FPGA 环境中支持数据流执行的系统。 Nyx 通过将 FPGA 划分为不同的可重新配置区域来实现高效的资源共享。 Nyx 的核心采用虚拟 FIFO、独立通道，允许管道任务之间的无缝通信。即使前驱任务或后继任务未在 FPGA 中同时调度，其方法也能确保任务顺利运行，从而使它们对其依赖性、通信通道或数据位置不可知。 FPGA 虚拟机管理程序旨在处理所有数据依赖性，并以高吞吐量跨区域高效地分派流水线任务。在一系列现实世界基准测试中，Nyx 的性能比现有最先进的虚拟化任务并行方法高出 1.26 倍 - 8.87 倍。此外，它在低需求期间将响应时间缩短了 2.8 倍 - 3.28 倍，同时将截止日期违规率减少了高达 76.5%。在高需求条件下，Nyx 的减少量减少了 2 倍 - 2.75 倍，违规行为减少了 34.5%，尾部响应时间缩短了 1.9 倍。

papers.title: Oaken: Fast and Efficient LLM Serving with Online-Offline Hybrid KV Cache Quantization.
papers.abstract:
Modern Large Language Model (LLM) serving system batches multiple requests to achieve high throughput, while batching attention operations is challenging, rendering memory bandwidth a critical bottleneck. Today, to mitigate this issue, the community relies on high-end GPUs with multiple high-bandwidth memory (HBM) channels. Unfortunately, HBM’s high bandwidth often comes at the expense of limited memory capacity , necessitating systems to scale, which reduces core utilization and increases costs. Moreover, recent advancements enabling longer contexts for LLMs have substantially increased the key-value (KV) cache size, further intensifying the pressures on memory capacity. To lower the pressure, the literature has explored KV cache quantization techniques, which commonly use low bitwidth (e.g., INT4) for most values, selectively using higher bitwidth (e.g., FP16) for outlier values. While this approach helps achieve high accuracy and low bitwidth simultaneously, it comes with the limitation that the cost for online outlier detection is excessively high, negating the advantages of quantization.

Inspired by these insights, we propose Oaken, an acceleration solution that achieves high accuracy and high performance simultaneously through co-designing algorithm and hardware. To effectively find a sweet spot in the accuracy-performance trade-off space of KV cache quantization, Oaken employs an online-offline hybrid approach, setting outlier thresholds offline, which are then used to determine the quantization scale online. To translate the proposed algorithmic technique into tangible performance gains, Oaken also comes with custom quantization/dequantization engines and memory management units that can be integrated with any LLM accelerators. We built an Oaken accelerator on top of an LLM accelerator, LPU, and conducted a comprehensive evaluation. Our experiments show that for a batch size of 256, Oaken achieves up to 1.58 × throughput improvement over NVIDIA A100 GPU, incurring a minimal accuracy loss of only 0.54% on average, compared to state-of-the-art KV cache quantization techniques.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代大型语言模型（LLM）服务系统批处理多个请求以实现高吞吐量，而批处理注意力操作具有挑战性，使内存带宽成为关键瓶颈。如今，为了缓解这一问题，社区依赖具有多个高带宽内存 (HBM) 通道的高端 GPU。不幸的是，HBM 的高带宽通常是以有限的内存容量为代价的，从而需要系统进行扩展，从而降低了核心利用率并增加了成本。此外，最近为 LLM 提供更长上下文的进展大大增加了键值 (KV) 缓存大小，进一步加剧了内存容量的压力。为了降低压力，文献探索了 KV 缓存量化技术，通常对大多数值使用低位宽（例如 INT4），选择性地对异常值使用较高位宽（例如 FP16）。虽然这种方法有助于同时实现高精度和低位宽，但其局限性在于在线异常值检测的成本过高，从而抵消了量化的优势。

受这些见解的启发，我们提出了 Oaken，一种通过共同设计算法和硬件同时实现高精度和高性能的加速解决方案。为了有效地找到 KV 缓存量化的准确性与性能权衡空间中的最佳点，Oaken 采用了在线-离线混合方法，离线设置异常值阈值，然后用于确定在线量化规模。为了将所提出的算法技术转化为切实的性能提升，Oaken 还配备了可与任何 LLM 加速器集成的自定义量化/反量化引擎和内存管理单元。我们在LLM加速器LPU的基础上构建了Oaken加速器，并进行了全面评估。我们的实验表明，对于 256 的批量大小，Oaken 的吞吐量比 NVIDIA A100 GPU 提高了 1.58 倍，与最先进的 KV 缓存量化技术相比，平均精度损失最小，仅为 0.54%。

papers.title: OptiPIM: Optimizing Processing-in-Memory Acceleration Using Integer Linear Programming.
papers.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) accelerators provide superior performance and energy efficiency to conventional architectures by minimizing off-chip data movement and exploiting extensive internal memory bandwidth for computation. However, efficient PIM acceleration requires careful software-hardware mapping that transforms application algorithms into PIM operations and data layout. Unfortunately, existing PIM accelerators adopt manually tuned heuristics or exhaustive search to determine the mappings on PIM accelerators, leading to under-optimized performance and/or long optimization time. In this work, we propose OptiPIM, a novel optimization framework based on Integer Linear Programming (ILP) to efficiently generate the optimal mapping for data-intensive applications on PIM accelerators. The proposed framework adopts a PIM-friendly mapping representation with accurate cost modeling and a concise description of the entire design space, allowing us to formulate an efficient and effective ILP problem and optimize the mapping on PIM architectures. We implement OptiPIM in the open-source MLIR framework, enabling OptiPIM to generate optimized mappings for PyTorch workloads on PIM accelerators. We evaluate widely used machine learning workloads on two state-of-the-art PIM accelerators. Our experiments show that OptiPIM can generate optimal mappings within 4 minutes. Mappings generated by OptiPIM are at least 1.9 × faster than those generated by heuristics.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 加速器通过最大限度地减少片外数据移动并利用广泛的内部内存带宽进行计算，为传统架构提供卓越的性能和能源效率。然而，高效的 PIM 加速需要仔细的软件-硬件映射，将应用算法转换为 PIM 操作和数据布局。不幸的是，现有的PIM加速器采用手动调整的启发式或穷举搜索来确定PIM加速器上的映射，导致性能优化不足和/或优化时间长。在这项工作中，我们提出了 OptiPIM，这是一种基于整数线性规划 (ILP) 的新型优化框架，可以有效地为 PIM 加速器上的数据密集型应用生成最佳映射。所提出的框架采用了 PIM 友好的映射表示，具有准确的成本建模和整个设计空间的简洁描述，使我们能够制定高效且有效的 ILP 问题并优化 PIM 架构上的映射。我们在开源 MLIR 框架中实现 OptiPIM，使 OptiPIM 能够为 PIM 加速器上的 PyTorch 工作负载生成优化的映射。我们在两个最先进的 PIM 加速器上评估广泛使用的机器学习工作负载。我们的实验表明 OptiPIM 可以在 4 分钟内生成最佳映射。 OptiPIM 生成的映射比启发式生成的映射至少快 1.9 倍。

papers.title: PD Constraint-aware Physical/Logical Topology Co-Design for Network on Wafer.
papers.abstract:
As cluster scales for LLM training expand, waferscale chips, characterized by the high integration density and bandwidth, emerge as a promising approach to enhancing training performance. The role of Network on Wafer (NoW) is becoming increasingly significant, which puts an emphasis on two facts: physical and logical topology. However, existing networks fail to co-design both aspects. Additionally, physical topology typically focuses on optimizing communication or computation separately, neglecting opportunities to improve overall training performance.

In this paper, we propose a physical design (PD) constraint-aware joint optimization strategy, developing mesh-switch physical topology and a dual-granularity logical topology. Mesh-switch leverages the high integration density of mesh and the efficient communication performance of fat tree, optimizing the allocation of on-chip communication and computation resources thoroughly considering the physical constraints of waferscale chips. Furthermore, we conduct a DSE algorithm to search for the optimal mesh-switch configuration. Based on the proposed physical topology, we design the most appropriate logical topology, and further enhance bandwidth utilization through a fine-grained overlap strategy. Evaluation results demonstrate that our NoW design achieves nearly a 2.39 × performance improvement in LLM training compared to existing networks. Our comprehensive design approach, which integrates physical and logical topologies with constraint considerations, can also be applied to network designs in other contexts.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着LLM培训集群规模的扩大，以高集成密度和带宽为特征的晶圆级芯片成为提高培训性能的有前途的方法。晶圆上网络 (NoW) 的作用变得越来越重要，它强调两个事实：物理和逻辑拓扑。然而，现有网络无法共同设计这两个方面。此外，物理拓扑通常侧重于分别优化通信或计算，而忽略了提高整体训练性能的机会。

在本文中，我们提出了一种物理设计（PD）约束感知联合优化策略，开发了网状交换机物理拓扑和双粒度逻辑拓扑。 Mesh-switch利用Mesh的高集成度和胖树的高效通信性能，充分考虑晶圆级芯片的物理约束，优化片上通信和计算资源的分配。此外，我们还使用 DSE 算法来搜索最佳网状交换机配置。基于所提出的物理拓扑，我们设计了最合适的逻辑拓扑，并通过细粒度的重叠策略进一步提高带宽利用率。评估结果表明，与现有网络相比，我们的 NoW 设计在 LLM 训练中实现了近 2.39 倍的性能提升。我们的综合设计方法将物理和逻辑拓扑与约束考虑相结合，也可以应用于其他环境中的网络设计。

papers.title: Phi: Leveraging Pattern-based Hierarchical Sparsity for High-Efficiency Spiking Neural Networks.
papers.abstract:
Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are gaining attention for their energy efficiency and biological plausibility, utilizing 0-1 activation sparsity through spike-driven computation. While existing SNN accelerators exploit this sparsity to skip zero computations, they often overlook the unique distribution patterns inherent in binary activations. In this work, we observe that particular patterns exist in spike activations, which we can utilize to reduce the substantial computation of SNN models. Based on these findings, we propose a novel pattern-based hierarchical sparsity framework, termed Phi , to optimize computation.

Phi introduces a two-level sparsity hierarchy: Level 1 exhibits vector-wise sparsity by representing activations with pre-defined patterns, allowing for offline pre-computation with weights and significantly reducing most runtime computation. Level 2 features element-wise sparsity by complementing the Level 1 matrix, using a highly sparse matrix to further reduce computation while maintaining accuracy. We present an algorithm-hardware co-design approach. Algorithmically, we employ a k-means-based pattern selection method to identify representative patterns and introduce a pattern-aware fine-tuning technique to enhance Level 2 sparsity. Architecturally, we design Phi , a dedicated hardware architecture that efficiently processes the two levels of Phi sparsity on the fly. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Phi achieves a 3.45 × speedup and a 4.93 × improvement in energy efficiency compared to state-of-the-art SNN accelerators, showcasing the effectiveness of our framework in optimizing SNN computation.
papers.abstract_zh:
尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 因其能源效率和生物合理性而受到关注，通过尖峰驱动计算利用 0-1 激活稀疏性。虽然现有的 SNN 加速器利用这种稀疏性来跳过零计算，但它们经常忽略二进制激活中固有的独特分布模式。在这项工作中，我们观察到尖峰激活中存在特定模式，我们可以利用它来减少 SNN 模型的大量计算。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种新颖的基于模式的分层稀疏框架（称为 Phi ）来优化计算。

Phi 引入了两级稀疏性层次结构：第 1 级通过使用预定义模式表示激活来展示向量稀疏性，允许使用权重进行离线预计算，并显着减少大多数运行时计算。 Level 2 通过补充 Level 1 矩阵来实现逐元素稀疏性，使用高度稀疏矩阵进一步减少计算，同时保持精度。我们提出了一种算法-硬件协同设计方法。在算法上，我们采用基于 k 均值的模式选择方法来识别代表性模式，并引入模式感知微调技术来增强 2 级稀疏性。在架构上，我们设计了 Phi ，这是一种专用硬件架构，可以动态高效处理两个级别的 Phi 稀疏性。大量实验表明，与最先进的 SNN 加速器相比，Phi 实现了 3.45 倍的加速和 4.93 倍的能源效率改进，展示了我们的框架在优化 SNN 计算方面的有效性。

papers.title: Precise exceptions in relaxed architectures.
papers.abstract:
To manage exceptions, software relies on a key architectural guarantee, precision : that exceptions appear to execute between instructions. However, this definition, dating back over 60 years, fundamentally assumes a sequential programmers model. Modern architectures such as Arm-A with programmer-observable relaxed behaviour make such a naive definition inadequate, and it is unclear exactly what guarantees programmers have on exception entry and exit.

In this paper, we clarify the concepts needed to discuss exceptions in the relaxed-memory setting – a key aspect of precisely specifying the architectural interface between hardware and software. We explore the basic relaxed behaviour across exception boundaries, and the semantics of external aborts, using Arm-A as a representative modern architecture. We identify an important problem, present yet unexplored for decades: pinning down what it means for exceptions to be precise in a relaxed setting. We describe key phenomena that any definition should account for. We develop an axiomatic model for Arm-A precise exceptions, tooling for axiomatic model execution, and a library of tests. Finally we explore the relaxed semantics of software-generated interrupts, as used in sophisticated programming patterns, and sketch how they too could be modelled.
papers.abstract_zh:
为了管理异常，软件依赖于关键的架构保证，即精度：异常似乎在指令之间执行。然而，这个定义可以追溯到 60 多年前，从根本上假设了一个顺序程序员模型。现代架构（例如具有程序员可观察的宽松行为的 Arm-A）使得这种幼稚的定义不够充分，而且尚不清楚程序员在异常进入和退出方面到底有什么保证。

在本文中，我们阐明了讨论宽松内存设置中的异常所需的概念——这是精确指定硬件和软件之间的架构接口的一个关键方面。我们使用 Arm-A 作为代表性的现代架构，探索跨异常边界的基本宽松行为以及外部中止的语义。我们发现了一个几十年来尚未探索的重要问题：确定在轻松的环境中精确例外意味着什么。我们描述了任何定义都应该考虑的关键现象。我们为 Arm-A 精确异常开发了一个公理模型、用于公理模型执行的工具以及一个测试库。最后，我们探讨了软件生成的中断的宽松语义（如复杂的编程模式中所使用的那样），并概述了如何对它们进行建模。

papers.title: Process Only Where You Look: Hardware and Algorithm Co-optimization for Efficient Gaze-Tracked Foveated Rendering in Virtual Reality.
papers.abstract:
Virtual reality (VR) plays a crucial role in advancing immersive, interactive experiences that transform learning, work, and entertainment by enhancing user engagement and expanding possibilities across various fields. Image rendering is one of the most crucial application in VR, as it produces high-quality, realistic visuals that are vital for maintaining immersive user experiences and preventing visual discomfort or motion sickness. However, the cost of image rendering in VR environment is considerable, primarily due to the demands of high-quality visual experiences from users. This challenge is even greater in real-time applications, where maintaining low latency further increases the complexity of the rendering process. On the other hand, VR devices, such as head-mounted displays (HMDs), are intrinsically linked to human behavior, using insights from perception and cognition to enhance user experience.

In this work, we aim to reduce the high computational costs of the rendering process in VR by leveraging natural human eye dynamics and focusing on processing only where you look (POLO). This involves co-optimizing AI algorithms with underlying hardware for greater efficiency. We introduce POLONet, an efficient multitask deep learning framework designed to track human eye movements with minimal latency. Integrated with the POLO accelerator as a plug-in for VR HMD SoCs, this approach significantly lowers image rendering costs, achieving up to a 3.9 × reduction in end-to-end latency compared to the latest gaze tracking methods.
papers.abstract_zh:
虚拟现实 (VR) 在推进沉浸式互动体验方面发挥着至关重要的作用，通过增强用户参与度和扩展各个领域的可能性来改变学习、工作和娱乐。图像渲染是 VR 中最重要的应用之一，因为它可以产生高质量、逼真的视觉效果，这对于维持沉浸式用户体验和防止视觉不适或晕动病至关重要。然而，VR环境中图像渲染的成本相当高，这主要是由于用户对高质量视觉体验的需求。在实时应用程序中，这一挑战甚至更大，其中保持低延迟进一步增加了渲染过程的复杂性。另一方面，头戴式显示器 (HMD) 等 VR 设备与人类行为有着内在的联系，利用感知和认知的洞察来增强用户体验。

在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过利用自然的人眼动力学并专注于仅在您看到的地方进行处理（POLO）来降低 VR 渲染过程的高计算成本。这涉及到人工智能算法与底层硬件的共同优化，以提高效率。我们推出 POLONet，这是一种高效的多任务深度学习框架，旨在以最小的延迟跟踪人眼运动。这种方法与 POLO 加速器集成作为 VR HMD SoC 的插件，可显着降低图像渲染成本，与最新的视线跟踪方法相比，端到端延迟最多可减少 3.9 倍。

papers.title: Profile-Guided Temporal Prefetching.
papers.abstract:
Temporal prefetching shows promise for handling irregular memory access patterns, which are common in data-dependent and pointer-based data structures. Recent studies introduced on-chip metadata storage to reduce the memory traffic caused by accessing metadata from off-chip DRAM. However, existing prefetching schemes struggle to efficiently utilize the limited on-chip storage. An alternative solution, software indirect access prefetching, remains ineffective for optimizing temporal prefetching.

In this work, we propose Prophet—a hardware-software co-designed framework that leverages profile-guided methods to optimize metadata storage management. Prophet profiles programs using counters instead of traces, injects hints into programs to guide metadata storage management, and dynamically tunes these hints to enable the optimized binary to adapt to different program inputs. Prophet is designed to coexist with existing hardware temporal prefetchers, delivering efficient, high-performance solutions for frequently executed workloads while preserving the original runtime scheme for less frequently executed workloads. Prophet outperforms the state-of-the-art temporal prefetcher, Triangel, by 14.23% , effectively addressing complex temporal patterns where prior profile-guided solutions fall short (only achieving 0.1% performance gain). Prophet delivers superior performance across all evaluated workload inputs, introducing negligible profiling, analysis, and instruction overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
时间预取有望处理不规则的内存访问模式，这在数据相关和基于指针的数据结构中很常见。最近的研究引入了片上元数据存储，以减少从片外 DRAM 访问元数据所造成的内存流量。然而，现有的预取方案很难有效地利用有限的片上存储。另一种解决方案，即软件间接访问预取，对于优化时间预取仍然无效。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 Prophet——一种硬件-软件共同设计的框架，利用配置文件引导的方法来优化元数据存储管理。 Prophet 使用计数器而不是跟踪来分析程序，将提示注入程序以指导元数据存储管理，并动态调整这些提示以使优化的二进制文件适应不同的程序输入。 Prophet 旨在与现有硬件临时预取器共存，为频繁执行的工作负载提供高效、高性能的解决方案，同时为不频繁执行的工作负载保留原始运行时方案。 Prophet 的性能优于最先进的时间预取器 Triangel 14.23%，有效解决了先前的配置文件引导解决方案无法满足的复杂时间模式（仅实现了 0.1% 的性能增益）。 Prophet 在所有评估的工作负载输入中提供卓越的性能，引入的分析、分析和指令开销可以忽略不计。

papers.title: PuDHammer: Experimental Analysis of Read Disturbance Effects of Processing-using-DRAM in Real DRAM Chips.
papers.abstract:
Processing-using-DRAM (PuD) is a promising paradigm for alleviating the data movement bottleneck using a DRAM array’s massive internal parallelism and bandwidth to execute very wide data-parallel operations. Performing a PuD operation involves activating multiple DRAM rows in quick succession or simultaneously, i.e., multiple-row activation. Multiple-row activation is fundamentally different from conventional memory access patterns that activate one DRAM row at a time. However, repeatedly activating even one DRAM row (e.g., RowHammer) can induce bitflips in unaccessed DRAM rows because modern DRAM is subject to read disturbance, a worsening safety, security, and reliability issue. Unfortunately, no prior work investigates the effects of multiple-row activation, as commonly used by PuD operations, on DRAM read disturbance.

In this paper, we present the first characterization study of read disturbance effects of multiple-row activation-based PuD (which we call PuDHammer) using 316 real DDR4 DRAM chips from four major DRAM manufacturers. Our detailed characterization results covering various operational conditions and parameters (i.e., temperature, data patterns, access patterns, timing parameters, and spatial variation) show that 1) PuDHammer significantly exacerbates the read disturbance vulnerability, causing up to 158.58 × reduction in the minimum hammer count required to induce the first bitflip ( HC first ), compared to RowHammer , 2) PuDHammer is affected by various operational conditions and parameters, 3) combining RowHammer with PuDHammer is more effective than using RowHammer alone to induce read disturbance errors (e.g., compared to RowHammer, doing so reduces HC first by 1.66 × on average across all tested rows ), and 4) PuDHammer bypasses an in-DRAM RowHammer mitigation mechanism called Target Row Refresh and induces more bitflips than RowHammer.

To develop future robust PuD-enabled systems in the presence of PuDHammer , we 1) develop three countermeasures and 2) adapt and evaluate the effectiveness of state-of-the-art RowHammer mitigation standardized by industry, called Per Row Activation Count ing (PRAC). We show that the adapted PRAC incur s large performance overheads to mitigate PuDHammer (e.g., an average performance overhead of 48.26% across 60 five-core multiprogrammed workloads). We hope and expect that our findings motivate and guide system-level and architectural solutions to enable read-disturbance-resilient future PuD systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
使用 DRAM 进行处理 (PuD) 是一种很有前途的范例，可以使用 DRAM 阵列的大规模内部并行性和带宽来执行非常广泛的数据并行操作，从而缓解数据移动瓶颈。执行 PuD 操作涉及快速连续或同时激活多个 DRAM 行，即多行激活。多行激活与一次激活一个 DRAM 行的传统内存访问模式有着根本的不同。然而，重复激活即使是一个 DRAM 行（例如 RowHammer）也可能会导致未访问的 DRAM 行发生位翻转，因为现代 DRAM 容易受到读取干扰，这是一个日益恶化的安全性和可靠性问题。遗憾的是，之前没有研究过 PuD 操作常用的多行激活对 DRAM 读取干扰的影响。

在本文中，我们使用来自四大 DRAM 制造商的 316 个真实 DDR4 DRAM 芯片，首次对基于多行激活的 PuD（我们称为 PuDHammer）的读取干扰效应进行了表征研究。我们涵盖各种操作条件和参数（即温度、数据模式、访问模式、时序参数和空间变化）的详细表征结果表明，1) PuDHammer 显着加剧了读干扰漏洞，与 RowHammer 相比，导致引发第一次位翻转（HC 首先）所需的最小锤数减少高达 158.58 倍，2) PuDHammer 受到各种操作条件和参数的影响，3) 将 RowHammer 与PuDHammer 比单独使用 RowHammer 更有效地引发读取干扰错误（例如，与 RowHammer 相比，这样做首先将所有测试行的 HC 平均降低 1.66 ×），并且 4) PuDHammer 绕过了 DRAM 内的 RowHammer 缓解机制（称为“目标行刷新”），并比 RowHammer 引发更多的位翻转。

为了在 PuDHammer 存在的情况下开发未来强大的支持 PuD 的系统，我们 1) 开发三种对策，2) 采用并评估行业标准化的最先进的 RowHammer 缓解措施的有效性，称为每行激活计数 (PRAC)。我们表明，经过调整的 PRAC 会产生大量性能开销来减轻 PuDHammer 的影响（例如，在 60 个五核多道程序工作负载中，平均性能开销为 48.26%）。我们希望并期望我们的研究结果能够激励和指导系统级和架构解决方案，以实现未来的抗读取干扰的 PuD 系统。

papers.title: QPlacer: Frequency-Aware Component Placement for Superconducting Quantum Computers.
papers.abstract:
Quantum Computers face a critical limitation in qubit numbers, hindering their progression towards large-scale and fault-tolerant quantum computing. A significant challenge impeding scaling is crosstalk, characterized by unwanted interactions among neighboring components on quantum chips, including qubits, resonators, and substrates. We motivate a general approach to systematically resolving multifaceted crosstalks in a limited substrate area. We propose QPlacer, a frequency-aware electrostatic-based placement framework tailored for superconducting quantum computers, to alleviate crosstalk by isolating these components in spatial and frequency domains alongside compact substrate design.

QPlacer commences with a frequency assigner that ensures frequency domain isolation for qubits and resonators. It then incorporates a padding strategy and resonator partitioning for layout flexibility. Central to our approach is the conceptualization of quantum components as charged particles, enabling strategic spatial isolation through a ‘frequency repulsive force’ concept. Our results demonstrate that QPlacer carefully crafts the physical component layout in mitigating various crosstalk impacts while maintaining a compact substrate size. On various device topologies and NISQ benchmarks, QPlacer improves fidelity by an average of 37.5 × and reduces spatial violations (susceptible to crosstalk) by an average of 12.76 ×, compared to classical placement engines. Regarding area optimization, compared to manual designs, QPlacer can reduce the required layout area by 2.14 × on average.
papers.abstract_zh:
量子计算机面临着量子比特数量的严重限制，阻碍了它们向大规模和容错量子计算的发展。阻碍扩展的一个重大挑战是串扰，其特征是量子芯片上相邻组件（包括量子位、谐振器和基板）之间不必要的相互作用。我们提出了一种通用方法来系统地解决有限基板区域内的多方面串扰。我们提出了 QPlacer，一种专为超导量子计算机而设计的频率感知静电放置框架，通过在空间和频域中隔离这些组件以及紧凑的基板设计来减轻串扰。

QPlacer 从频率分配器开始，确保量子位和谐振器的频域隔离。然后，它结合了填充策略和谐振器分区，以实现布局灵活性。我们方法的核心是将量子成分概念化为带电粒子，通过“频率排斥力”概念实现战略空间隔离。我们的结果表明，QPlacer 精心设计了物理组件布局，以减轻各种串扰影响，同时保持紧凑的基板尺寸。与传统布局引擎相比，在各种设备拓扑和 NISQ 基准测试中，QPlacer 的保真度平均提高了 37.5 倍，空间违规（易受串扰影响）平均降低了 12.76 倍。在面积优化方面，与手工设计相比，QPlacer平均可以减少所需布局面积2.14倍。

papers.title: QR-Map: A Map-Based Approach to Quantum Circuit Abstraction for Qubit Reuse Optimization.
papers.abstract: Recent advances in quantum computing introduce the ability to reuse qubits through mid-circuit measurements, thereby enhancing the efficiency of quantum devices with limited computational resources. However, identifying optimal reuse opportunities in quantum circuits remains challenging due to the intricate dependencies between quantum gates. Existing frameworks address this by either directly searching for reuse opportunities or converting circuits into directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). Unfortunately, these frameworks may require exponential search complexity or may not always ensure optimal results due to their non-deterministic property. To overcome these challenges, we propose QR-Map ( Q ubit R euse Map ), a map-based framework that abstracts computational dependencies for efficient qubit reuse. By extracting and aligning two-qubit gates, QR-Map facilitates dependency detection and ensures qubit savings without incurring excessive idle time. This approach achieves an optimal balance between gate serialization depth and crosstalk reduction. Evaluations with various quantum circuit benchmarks demonstrate that quantum circuits optimized with QR-Map achieve average reductions of 20% in qubit usage, 25% in circuit depth, and 22% in SWAP insertions compared to those optimized with the state-of-the-art framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算的最新进展引入了通过中间电路测量重用量子位的能力，从而提高了计算资源有限的量子设备的效率。然而，由于量子门之间复杂的依赖性，确定量子电路中的最佳重用机会仍然具有挑战性。现有框架通过直接搜索重用机会或将电路转换为有向无环图（DAG）来解决这个问题。不幸的是，这些框架可能需要指数级的搜索复杂性，或者由于其不确定性属性，可能无法始终确保最佳结果。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了 QR-Map（Q ubit Reuse Map），这是一种基于映射的框架，它抽象了计算依赖性以实现高效的量子位重用。通过提取和对齐两个量子位门，QR-Map 有助于依赖性检测并确保节省量子位，而不会产生过多的空闲时间。这种方法实现了门串行化深度和串扰减少之间的最佳平衡。对各种量子电路基准的评估表明，与使用最先进的框架优化的量子电路相比，使用 QR-Map 优化的量子电路的量子位使用量平均减少 20%，电路深度平均减少 25%，SWAP 插入平均减少 22%。

papers.title: Qtenon: Towards Low-Latency Architecture Integration for Accelerating Hybrid Quantum-Classical Computing.
papers.abstract:
Hybrid quantum-classical algorithms have shown great promise in leveraging the computational potential of quantum systems. However, the efficiency of these algorithms is severely constrained by the limitations of current quantum hardware architectures. These architectures, which typically feature a decoupled design, lack both hardware support for low-latency communication and software support for fine-grained optimization.

In this paper, we propose Qtenon, a tightly coupled system for efficient hybrid quantum-classical algorithm acceleration. Qtenon is composed of both hardware part and software part. To enable efficient communication and computation, the hardware part provides a unified memory hierarchy, an efficient quantum controller, as well as a multi-stage processing pipeline. The unified memory hierarchy functions as a communication buffer between host and quantum accelerators, with dedicated data paths and interfaces provided by the quantum controller. The multi-stage pipeline leverages hardware pipelines to fully exploit parallelism. To program hybrid quantum-classical algorithms on the hardware, our software part provides a set of instructions for data communication and computation. The instructions also enable fine-grained synchronization and efficient scheduling for quantum-host interaction. We design Qtenon as a RISC-V extended chip and implement it using Chisel. In evaluation, we achieve up to 14.9 × end-to-end speedup compared to state-of-the-art work for hybrid quantum-classical algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh:
混合量子经典算法在利用量子系统的计算潜力方面显示出了巨大的前景。然而，这些算法的效率受到当前量子硬件架构的限制的严重限制。这些架构通常采用解耦设计，缺乏对低延迟通信的硬件支持和对细粒度优化的软件支持。

在本文中，我们提出了 Qtenon，一种用于高效混合量子经典算法加速的紧耦合系统。 Qtenon由硬件部分和软件部分组成。为了实现高效的通信和计算，硬件部分提供了统一的内存层次结构、高效的量子控制器以及多级处理管道。统一的存储器层次结构充当主机和量子加速器之间的通信缓冲区，具有由量子控制器提供的专用数据路径和接口。多级管道利用硬件管道来充分利用并行性。为了在硬件上对混合量子经典算法进行编程，我们的软件部分提供了一组用于数据通信和计算的指令。这些指令还可以实现量子主机交互的细粒度同步和高效调度。我们将Qtenon设计为RISC-V扩展芯片并使用Chisel实现。在评估中，与混合量子经典算法的最先进工作相比，我们实现了高达 14.9 倍的端到端加速。

papers.title: RAGO: Systematic Performance Optimization for Retrieval-Augmented Generation Serving.
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is emerging as a popular approach for reliable LLM serving. However, efficient RAG serving remains an open challenge due to the rapid emergence of many RAG variants and the substantial differences in workload characteristics across them. This paper makes three fundamental contributions to advancing RAG serving. First, we introduce RAGSchema , a structured abstraction that captures the wide range of RAG algorithms, serving as a foundation for performance optimization. Second, we analyze several representative RAG workloads with distinct RAGSchema , revealing significant performance variability across these workloads. Third, to address this variability and meet diverse performance requirements, we propose RAGO ( R etrieval- A ugmented G eneration O ptimizer), a system optimization framework for efficient RAG serving. RAGO achieves up to a 2 × increase in QPS per chip and a 55% reduction in time-to-first-token latency compared to RAG systems built on LLM-system extensions.
papers.abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）正在成为可靠的法学硕士服务的流行方法。然而，由于许多 RAG 变体的迅速出现以及它们之间工作负载特征的巨大差异，高效的 RAG 服务仍然是一个开放的挑战。本文对推进 RAG 服务做出了三项基本贡献。首先，我们介绍 RAGSchema ，这是一种结构化抽象，它捕获了广泛的 RAG 算法，作为性能优化的基础。其次，我们分析了具有不同 RAGSchema 的几个代表性 RAG 工作负载，揭示了这些工作负载之间显着的性能差异。第三，为了解决这种可变性并满足不同的性能要求，我们提出了 RAGO（检索增强生成优化器），这是一种用于高效 RAG 服务的系统优化框架。与基于 LLM 系统扩展构建的 RAG 系统相比，RAGO 将每个芯片的 QPS 提高了 2 倍，并将首次令牌延迟时间缩短了 55%。

papers.title: RAP: Reconfigurable Automata Processor.
papers.abstract: Regular pattern matching is essential for applications such as text processing, malware detection, network security, and bioinformatics. Recent in-memory automata processors have significantly advanced the energy and memory efficiency over conventional computing platforms. However, these processors are typically optimized only for one type of automata, limiting their capability to efficiently support regex processing under diverse real-world workloads. This paper presents RAP, the first reconfigurable in-memory automata processor for efficient regular pattern matching across diverse workloads. It supports Nondeterministic Finite Automata (NFA), Nondeterministic Bit Vector Automata (NBVA), and Linear NFA (LNFA) through reconfigurable architecture and circuit designs, and a compiler for translation. RAP is evaluated in 28nm CMOS PDK, achieving 1.2-1.5 × higher energy efficiency and 1.3-2.5 × higher compute density compared to SotA automata processors for NFA (CA and CAMA) over diverse real-world benchmarks. It also achieves 1.6 × higher compute density and similar energy efficiency as BVAP, a SotA optimized for bounded repetitions. Finally, RAP is >100 × and >1000 × more energy efficient than SotA GPU and CPU solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 常规模式匹配对于文本处理、恶意软件检测、网络安全和生物信息学等应用至关重要。最近的内存自动机处理器比传统计算平台显着提高了能源和内存效率。然而，这些处理器通常仅针对一种类型的自动机进行优化，限制了它们在不同的实际工作负载下有效支持正则表达式处理的能力。本文介绍了 RAP，这是第一个可重新配置的内存自动机处理器，用于跨不同工作负载进行高效的常规模式匹配。它通过可重新配置的架构和电路设计以及用于翻译的编译器支持非确定性有限自动机 (NFA)、非确定性位向量自动机 (NBVA) 和线性 NFA (LNFA)。 RAP 在 28nm CMOS PDK 中进行评估，与 NFA（CA 和 CAMA）的 SotA 自动机处理器相比，在各种实际基准中实现了 1.2-1.5 倍的能效和 1.3-2.5 倍的计算密度。它还实现了 1.6 倍高的计算密度和与 BVAP（针对有限重复优化的 SotA）类似的能源效率。最后，RAP 的能效比 SotA GPU 和 CPU 解决方案高 >100 倍和 >1000 倍。

papers.title: Reconfigurable Stream Network Architecture.
papers.abstract:
As AI systems grow increasingly specialized and complex, managing hardware heterogeneity becomes a pressing challenge. How can we efficiently coordinate and synchronize heterogeneous hardware resources to achieve high utilization? How can we minimize the friction of transitioning between diverse computation phases, reducing costly stalls from initialization, pipeline setup, or drain? Our insight is that a network abstraction at the ISA level naturally unifies heterogeneous resource orchestration and phase transitions.

This paper presents a Reconfigurable Stream Network Architecture (RSN), a novel ISA abstraction designed for the DNN domain. RSN models the datapath as a circuit-switched network with stateful functional units as nodes and data streaming on the edges. Programming a computation corresponds to triggering a path. Software is explicitly exposed to the compute and communication latency of each functional unit, enabling precise control over data movement for optimizations such as compute-communication overlap and layer fusion. As nodes in a network naturally differ, the RSN abstraction can efficiently virtualize heterogeneous hardware resources by separating control from the data plane, enabling low instruction-level intervention.

We build a proof-of-concept design RSN-XNN on VCK190, a heterogeneous platform with FPGA fabric and AI engines. Compared to the SOTA solution on this platform, it reduces latency by 6.1x and improves throughput by 2.4x–3.2x. Compared to the T4 GPU with the same FP32 performance, it matches latency with only 18% of the memory bandwidth. Compared to the A100 GPU at the same 7nm process node, it achieves 2.1x higher energy efficiency in FP32.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着人工智能系统变得越来越专业和复杂，管理硬件异构性成为一个紧迫的挑战。如何高效协调、同步异构硬件资源，实现高利用率？我们如何才能最大限度地减少不同计算阶段之间转换的摩擦，减少初始化、管道设置或耗尽造成的代价高昂的停顿？我们的见解是，ISA 级别的网络抽象自然地统一了异构资源编排和阶段转换。

本文提出了可重构流网络架构 (RSN)，这是一种专为 DNN 领域设计的新型 ISA 抽象。 RSN 将数据路径建模为电路交换网络，其中有状态功能单元作为节点，数据在边缘流动。对计算进行编程相当于触发路径。软件明确暴露于每个功能单元的计算和通信延迟，从而能够精确控制数据移动，以实现计算通信重叠和层融合等优化。由于网络中的节点自然不同，RSN 抽象可以通过将控制与数据平面分离来有效地虚拟化异构硬件资源，从而实现低指令级干预。

我们在 VCK190 上构建了概念验证设计 RSN-XNN，VCK190 是一个具有 FPGA 结构和 AI 引擎的异构平台。与该平台上的SOTA解决方案相比，延迟降低了6.1倍，吞吐量提高了2.4倍至3.2倍。与具有相同 FP32 性能的 T4 GPU 相比，它仅以 18% 的内存带宽匹配延迟。与相同7nm工艺节点的A100 GPU相比，它在FP32中实现了2.1倍的能效提升。

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning-Guided Graph State Generation in Photonic Quantum Computers.
papers.abstract: The photonic quantum computer (PQC) is an emerging and promising quantum computing paradigm that has gained momentum in recent years. In PQC, computations are executed by performing measurements on photons in graph states (i.e., a collection of entangled photons). The graph state generation process is fulfilled by applying a sequence of quantum gates to quantum emitters, referred to as the “generation sequence”. In a generation sequence, i) the time required to complete the generation sequence, ii) the number of quantum emitters used, and iii) the number of CZ gates performed between emitters greatly affect the fidelity of the generated graph state. In this paper, we propose RLGS ( R einforcement L earning-guided G raph S tate generation), a novel compilation framework to identify optimal generation sequences that optimize the three fidelity metrics. Experimental results show that RLGS achieves an average reduction in generation time of 31.1%, 49.6%, and 57.5% for small, medium, and large graph states compared to the baseline. Additionally, the reductions in the number of quantum emitters are 13.9%, 16.7%, and 17.5%, whereas the reductions in the number of CZ gates are 37.7%, 53.4%, and 57.8%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 光子量子计算机（PQC）是一种新兴且有前途的量子计算范式，近年来发展势头强劲。在 PQC 中，通过对图状态的光子（即纠缠光子的集合）进行测量来执行计算。图状态生成过程是通过将一系列量子门应用于量子发射器来实现的，称为“生成序列”。在生成序列中，i) 完成生成序列所需的时间，ii) 使用的量子发射器的数量，以及 iii) 发射器之间执行的 CZ 门的数量极大地影响生成的图状态的保真度。在本文中，我们提出了 RLGS（强化收益引导图状态生成），这是一种新颖的编译框架，用于识别优化三个保真度指标的最佳生成序列。实验结果表明，与基线相比，RLGS 在小型、中型和大型图状态的生成时间平均减少了 31.1%、49.6% 和 57.5%。此外，量子发射器的数量分别减少了13.9%、16.7%和17.5%，而CZ门的数量分别减少了37.7%、53.4%和57.8%。

papers.title: REIS: A High-Performance and Energy-Efficient Retrieval System with In-Storage Processing.
papers.abstract:
Large Language Models (LLMs) face an inherent challenge: their knowledge is confined to the data that they have been trained on. This limitation, combined with the significant cost of retraining renders them incapable of providing up-to-date responses. To overcome these issues, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) complements the static training-derived knowledge of LLMs with an external knowledge repository. RAG consists of three stages: (i) indexing, which creates a database that facilitates similarity search on text embeddings, (ii) retrieval, which, given a user query, searches and retrieves relevant data from the database and (iii) generation, which uses the user query and the retrieved data to generate a response.

The retrieval stage of RAG in particular becomes a significant performance bottleneck in inference pipelines. In this stage, (i) a given user query is mapped to an embedding vector and (ii) an Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANNS) algorithm searches for the most semantically similar embedding vectors in the database to identify relevant items. Due to the large database sizes, ANNS incurs significant data movement overheads between the host and the storage system. To alleviate these overheads, prior works propose In-Storage Processing (ISP) techniques that accelerate ANNS workloads by performing computations inside the storage system. However, existing works that leverage ISP for ANNS (i) employ algorithms that are not tailored to ISP systems, (ii) do not accelerate data retrieval operations for data selected by ANNS, and (iii) introduce significant hardware modifications to the storage system, limiting performance and hindering their adoption.

We propose REIS , the first Re trieval system tailored for RAG with I n- S torage processing that addresses the limitations of existing implementations with three key mechanisms. First, REIS employs a database layout that links database embedding vectors to their associated documents, enabling efficient retrieval. Second, it enables efficient ANNS by introducing an ISP-tailored algorithm and data placement technique that: (i) distributes embeddings across all planes of the storage system to exploit parallelism, and (ii) employs a lightweight Flash Translation Layer (FTL) to improve performance. Third, REIS leverages an ANNS engine that uses the existing computational resources inside the storage system, without requiring hardware modifications. The three key mechanisms form a cohesive framework that largely enhances both the performance and energy efficiency of RAG pipelines. Compared to a high-end server-grade system, REIS improves the performance (energy efficiency) of the retrieval stage by an average of 13 × (55 ×). REIS offers improved performance against existing ISP-based ANNS accelerators, without introducing any hardware modifications, enabling easier adoption for RAG pipelines.
papers.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 面临着一个固有的挑战：他们的知识仅限于他们接受过训练的数据。这种限制，再加上再培训的巨大成本，使他们无法提供最新的响应。为了克服这些问题，检索增强生成（RAG）通过外部知识库补充了法学硕士的静态训练衍生知识。 RAG 包含三个阶段：(i) 索引，创建一个有助于文本嵌入相似性搜索的数据库；(ii) 检索，根据用户查询，从数据库中搜索和检索相关数据；(iii) 生成，使用用户查询和检索到的数据生成响应。

RAG 的检索阶段尤其成为推理管道中的一个重要性能瓶颈。在此阶段，(i) 给定的用户查询映射到嵌入向量，(ii) 近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 算法在数据库中搜索语义最相似的嵌入向量以识别相关项目。由于数据库规模较大，ANNS 在主机和存储系统之间产生大量数据移动开销。为了减轻这些开销，先前的工作提出了存储内处理（ISP）技术，通过在存储系统内部执行计算来加速 ANNS 工作负载。然而，利用 ISP 进行 ANNS 的现有工作（i）采用不适合 ISP 系统的算法，（ii）不加速 ANNS 选择的数据的数据检索操作，以及（iii）对存储系统进行重大硬件修改，限制性能并阻碍其采用。

我们提出 REIS，这是第一个为 RAG 定制的检索系统，具有存储处理功能，通过三个关键机制解决了现有实现的局限性。首先，REIS 采用数据库布局，将数据库嵌入向量链接到其相关文档，从而实现高效检索。其次，它通过引入 ISP 定制的算法和数据放置技术来实现高效的 ANNS：(i) 在存储系统的所有平面上分布嵌入以利用并行性，以及 (ii) 采用轻量级闪存转换层 (FTL) 来提高性能。第三，REIS 利用 ANNS 引擎，该引擎使用存储系统内现有的计算资源，无需修改硬件。这三个关键机制形成了一个紧密结合的框架，大大提高了 RAG 管道的性能和能源效率。与高端服务器级系统相比，REIS将检索阶段的性能（能效）平均提高了13×（55×）。与现有基于 ISP 的 ANNS 加速器相比，REIS 提供了改进的性能，无需引入任何硬件修改，从而更容易采用 RAG 管道。

papers.title: Resource Analysis of Low-Overhead Transversal Architectures for Reconfigurable Atom Arrays.
papers.abstract:
Neutral atom arrays have recently emerged as a promising platform for fault-tolerant quantum computing. Based on these advances, including dynamically-reconfigurable connectivity and fast transversal operations, we present a low-overhead architecture that supports the layout and resource estimation of large-scale fault-tolerant quantum algorithms. Utilizing recent advances in fault tolerance with transversal gate operations, this architecture achieves a run time speed-up on the order of the code distance d , which we find directly translates to run time improvements of large-scale quantum algorithms.

Our architecture consists of functional building blocks of key algorithmic subroutines, including magic state factories, quantum arithmetic units, and quantum look-up tables. These building blocks are implemented using efficient transversal operations, and we design space-time efficient versions of them that minimize interaction distance, thereby reducing atom move times and minimizing the volume for correlated decoding. We further propose models to estimate their logical error performance. We perform resource estimation for a large-scale implementation of Shor’s factoring algorithm, one of the prototypical benchmarks for large-scale quantum algorithms, finding that 2048-bit RSA factoring can be executed with 19 million qubits in 5.6 days, for 1 ms QEC cycle times. This represents close to 50 × speed-up of the run-time compared to existing estimates with similar assumptions, with no increase in space footprint.
papers.abstract_zh:
中性原子阵列最近已成为容错量子计算的一个有前景的平台。基于这些进步，包括动态可重构连接和快速横向操作，我们提出了一种低开销架构，支持大规模容错量子算法的布局和资源估计。利用横向门操作容错方面的最新进展，该架构实现了代码距离 d 数量级的运行时间加速，我们发现这直接转化为大规模量子算法的运行时间改进。

我们的架构由关键算法子例程的功能构建块组成，包括神奇状态工厂、量子算术单元和量子查找表。这些构建块是使用高效的横向操作来实现的，我们设计了它们的时空有效版本，以最小化交互距离，从而减少原子移动时间并最小化相关解码的体积。我们进一步提出模型来估计其逻辑错误性能。我们对 Shor 分解算法（大规模量子算法的原型基准之一）的大规模实现进行了资源估计，发现可以在 5.6 天内使用 1900 万个量子位执行 2048 位 RSA 分解，且 QEC 周期时间为 1 毫秒。与具有类似假设的现有估计相比，这意味着运行时间加速了近 50 倍，且空间占用没有增加。

papers.title: Rethinking Prefetching for Intermittent Computing.
papers.abstract: Prefetching improves performance by reducing cache misses. However, conventional prefetchers are too aggressive to serve batteryless energy harvesting systems (EHSs) where energy efficiency is the utmost design priority due to weak input energy and the resulting frequent outages. To this end, this paper proposes IPEX, an I ntermittence-aware P refetching EX tension that can be integrated into existing prefetchers on EHSs. IPEX aims to avert useless prefetches by suppressing the prefetching of the cache blocks receiving no hit before their loss on power failure, which would otherwise waste harvested energy. At a proper moment before an upcoming outage, IPEX throttles the prefetch degree to target only those blocks that are likely to be used before the outage. That way IPEX saves energy and spends it on making further execution progress. Experimental results show that on average, IPEX reduces energy consumption by 7.86% (up to 21.64%) and improves performance by 8.96% (up to 23.49%) compared to a conventional prefetcher.
