papers.abstract_zh: 预取通过减少缓存未命中来提高性能。然而，传统的预取器过于激进，无法服务于无电池能量收集系统 (EHS)，在无电池能量收集系统 (EHS) 中，由于输入能量较弱以及由此导致的频繁断电，能源效率是最重要的设计优先事项。为此，本文提出了 IPEX，一种间歇性感知的预取 EX 张力，可以集成到 EHS 上现有的预取器中。 IPEX 旨在通过抑制在断电丢失之前未收到命中的缓存块的预取来避免无用的预取，否则会浪费所收集的能量。在即将发生中断之前的适当时刻，IPEX 会限制预取程度，以仅针对那些可能在中断之前使用的块。这样，IPEX 就可以节省能源，并将其用于取得进一步的执行进展。实验结果表明，与传统预取器相比，IPEX 平均能耗降低 7.86%（最高可达 21.64%），性能提升 8.96%（最高可达 23.49%）。

papers.title: RTSpMSpM: Harnessing Ray Tracing for Efficient Sparse Matrix Computations.
papers.abstract:
The significance of sparse matrix algebra pushes the development of sparse matrix accelerators. Despite the general reception of using hardware accelerators to address application demands and the convincement of substantial performance gain, integrating heterogeneous hardware accelerators always introduces manufacturing costs on new hardware and challenges the system interconnects.

Inspired by the similar algorithmic behaviors between ray tracing and sparse matrix problems, this paper exploits ray tracing hardware. This increasingly popular accelerator has become the standard in modern GPU architectures to address the demand for virtual/augmented/mixed reality applications. We propose an algorithm that maps the most classical sparse matrix multiplication problem (SpMSpM) as a ray tracing problem. By implementing the proposed algorithm using a modern ray tracing programming framework, the resulting program, SW-RTSpMSpM can leverage the accelerated intersection test unit in commercialized GPUs and reveals 1.85 × speedup over the state-of-the-art SpMSpM library.

Despite the “similarities” in both problems enabling the potential of accelerating SpMSpM using existing ray tracing hardware, the “difference” between these two algorithms leaves room for performance gain with architectural optimizations. The insights from evaluating SW-RTSpMSpM guide the proposal of RT+SpMSpM , where we present two major architectural optimizations that (1) allow simultaneous computation on multiplications along with intersection tests and (2) ray mapping and scheduling and a small row accumulation engine to leverage Gustavson’s dataflow and eliminate the reliance of additional shader functions and redundant memory operations.

The resulting RT+SpMSpM only introduces 0.2% area overhead to a modern high-end ray-tracing-hardware-equipped GPU and improves SW-RTSpMSpM by 1.66 ×, achieving 3.06 × speedup over software library and 80% performance per area compared to a state-of-the-art SpMSpM accelerator, without losing the capability in supporting ray tracing.
papers.abstract_zh:
稀疏矩阵代数的重要性推动了稀疏矩阵加速器的发展。尽管人们普遍认为使用硬件加速器来满足应用需求，并确信可以显着提高性能，但集成异构硬件加速器总是会增加新硬件的制造成本，并对系统互连提出挑战。

受到光线追踪和稀疏矩阵问题之间类似算法行为的启发，本文利用了光线追踪硬件。这种日益流行的加速器已成为现代 GPU 架构的标准，以满足虚拟/增强/混合现实应用的需求。我们提出了一种将最经典的稀疏矩阵乘法问题（SpMSpM）映射为光线追踪问题的算法。通过使用现代光线追踪编程框架实现所提出的算法，生成的程序 SW-RTSpMSpM 可以利用商业化 GPU 中的加速相交测试单元，并比最先进的 SpMSpM 库实现 1.85 倍的加速。

尽管这两个问题的“相似性”使得使用现有光线追踪硬件加速 SpMSpM 的潜力成为可能，但这两种算法之间的“差异”为架构优化带来的性能提升留下了空间。评估 SW-RTSpMSpM 的见解指导了 RT+SpMSpM 的提议，其中我们提出了两种主要的架构优化，(1) 允许同时计算乘法和相交测试，(2) 光线映射和调度以及小行累积引擎，以利用 Gustavson 的数据流并消除对额外着色器函数和冗余内存操作的依赖。

由此产生的 RT+SpMSpM 仅给配备了光线追踪硬件的现代高端 GPU 带来了 0.2% 的面积开销，并将 SW-RTSpMSpM 提高了 1.66 倍，与最先进的 SpMSpM 加速器相比，实现了 3.06 倍的软件库加速和每面积 80% 的性能，同时又不失去支持光线追踪的能力。

papers.title: S-SYNC: Shuttle and Swap Co-Optimization in Quantum Charge-Coupled Devices.
papers.abstract: The Quantum Charge-Coupled Device (QCCD) architecture is a modular design to expand trapped-ion quantum computer that relies on the coherent shuttling of qubits across an array of segmented electrodes. Leveraging trapped ions for their long coherence times and high-fidelity quantum operations, QCCD technology represents a significant advancement toward practical, large-scale quantum processors. However, shuttling increases thermal motion and consistently necessitates qubit swaps, significantly extend execution time and negatively affect application success rates. In this paper, we introduce S-SYNC – a compiler designed to co-optimize the number of shuttling and swapping operations. S-SYNC exploits the unique properties of QCCD and incorporates generic SWAP operations to efficiently manage shuttle and SWAP counts simultaneously. Building on the static topology formulation of QCCD, we develop scheduling heuristics to enhance overall performance. Our evaluations demonstrate that our approach reduces the shuttling number by 3.69x on average and improves the success rate of quantum applications by 1.73x on average. Moreover, we apply S-SYNC to gain insights into executing applications across various QCCD topologies and to compare the trade-offs between different initial mapping methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子电荷耦合器件 (QCCD) 架构是一种模块化设计，用于扩展捕获离子量子计算机，该计算机依赖于量子位在分段电极阵列上的相干穿梭。 QCCD 技术利用捕获离子的长相干时间和高保真量子操作，代表了实用的大规模量子处理器的重大进步。然而，穿梭会增加热运动并始终需要量子位交换，显着延长执行时间并对应用程序的成功率产生负面影响。在本文中，我们介绍了 S-SYNC——一种旨在共同优化穿梭和交换操作数量的编译器。 S-SYNC 利用 QCCD 的独特属性，并结合通用的 SWAP 操作，以同时有效地管理穿梭和 SWAP 计数。基于 QCCD 的静态拓扑公式，我们开发了调度启发式方法来提高整体性能。我们的评估表明，我们的方法平均将穿梭次数减少了 3.69 倍，并将量子应用的成功率平均提高了 1.73 倍。此外，我们应用 S-SYNC 来深入了解跨各种 QCCD 拓扑执行应用程序，并比较不同初始映射方法之间的权衡。

papers.title: Scaling Llama 3 Training with Efficient Parallelism Strategies.
papers.abstract: Llama is a widely used open-source large language model. This paper presents the design and implementation of the parallelism techniques used in Llama 3 pre-training. To achieve efficient training on tens of thousands of GPUs, Llama 3 employs a combination of four-dimensional parallelism: fully sharded data parallelism, tensor parallelism, pipeline parallelism, and context parallelism. Beyond achieving efficiency through parallelism and model co-design, we also address other equally critical aspects. First, we enhance flexibility —for example, through novel pipeline parallelism that supports evolving batch sizes and heterogeneous model architectures, and innovative context parallelism that enables model innovations such as document-mask attention. Second, we prioritize practicality —for example, by enabling the diagnosis of performance and numerical issues at scale. Finally, drawing on our experience with large-scale training, we provide recommendations for future hardware design.
papers.abstract_zh: Llama 是一种广泛使用的开源大语言模型。本文介绍了 Llama 3 预训练中使用的并行技术的设计和实现。为了实现在数万个 GPU 上的高效训练，Llama 3 采用了四维并行的组合：完全分片数据并行、张量并行、管道并行和上下文并行。除了通过并行性和模型协同设计实现效率之外，我们还解决其他同样重要的方面。首先，我们增强灵活性——例如，通过支持不断变化的批量大小和异构模型架构的新颖管道并行性，以及支持文档掩码注意力等模型创新的创新上下文并行性。其次，我们优先考虑实用性——例如，通过大规模诊断性能和数值问题。最后，根据我们大规模训练的经验，我们为未来的硬件设计提供了建议。

papers.title: SEAL: A Single-Event Architecture for In-Sensor Visual Localization.
papers.abstract: Image sensors have low costs and broad applications, but the large data volume they generate can result in significant energy and latency overheads during data transfer, storage, and processing. This paper explores how shifting from traditional binary encoding to delay-based codes early on can address these inefficiencies, enabling keypoint detection and tracking within digital pixel sensors. The result is SEAL , a S ingle- E vent A rchitecture for In-Sensor L ocalization. SEAL optimizes the entire pipeline between the pixel array and the sensor-processor interface by introducing a temporal processor co-designed with analog-to-time converters, followed by a custom heavily quantized frontend processor. Its implementation is fully digital, relying on off-the-shelf CMOS cells and EDA tools, and adheres to race logic’s single-wire-per-variable and single-event-per-wire policies to maximize energy and area efficiency wherever possible. Our evaluation—combining analog and digital simulations, FPGA prototyping, and an end-to-end system analysis incorporating a host processor for visual inertial odometry (VIO) backend tasks—demonstrates a 16–61 × reduction in the latency of keypoint detection and tracking compared to software baselines running on the host processor, and a 7 × reduction in energy consumption compared to a standard digital pixel sensor without processing capabilities. Meanwhile, SEAL preserves robust tracking accuracy: on the EuRoC dataset, the average root mean square absolute trajectory error decreases by 1.0 cm for HybVIO and increases by just 0.3 cm for VINS-Mono compared to their original implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 图像传感器成本低、应用广泛，但它们生成的大数据量会在数据传输、存储和处理过程中导致大量的能源和延迟开销。本文探讨了如何尽早从传统的二进制编码转向基于延迟的代码来解决这些低效率问题，从而实现数字像素传感器内的关键点检测和跟踪。结果是 SEAL，一种用于传感器内定位的单事件架构。 SEAL 通过引入与模拟时间转换器共同设计的时间处理器，然后是定制的高度量化前端处理器，优化了像素阵列和传感器处理器接口之间的整个管道。其实现是完全数字化的，依赖于现成的 CMOS 单元和 EDA 工具，并遵循竞赛逻辑的每变量单线和每线单事件策略，以尽可能提高能源和面积效率。我们的评估结合了模拟和数字模拟、FPGA 原型设计和端到端系统分析，并结合了用于视觉惯性里程计 (VIO) 后端任务的主机处理器，结果表明，与在主机处理器上运行的软件基线相比，关键点检测和跟踪的延迟减少了 16-61 倍，与不具有处理功能的标准数字像素传感器相比，能耗减少了 7 倍。同时，SEAL 保留了强大的跟踪精度：在 EuRoC 数据集上，与原始实现相比，HybVIO 的平均均方根绝对轨迹误差减少了 1.0 cm，VINS-Mono 仅增加了 0.3 cm。

papers.title: Single Spike Artificial Neural Networks.
papers.abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) circumvent the need for large scale arithmetic using techniques inspired by biology. However, SNNs are designed with fundamentally different algorithms from ANNs, which have benefited from a rich history of theoretical advances and an increasingly mature software stack. In this paper we explore the potential of a new technique that lies between these two approaches, one that can leverage the software and system level optimizations of ANNs while utilizing biologically inspired circuits for energy efficient computation. The resulting hardware represents the traditional weight of an ANN as nothing more than a delay element and the degree of activation as nothing more than arrival time of a digital signal. Building on these fundamental operations, we can implement complete ANNs through several innovations: spatial and temporal reuse that facilitates classical dataflows, reducing memory system demands for ANN temporal operations; a new noise-tolerant temporal summation operation; novel hybrid digital/temporal memories; and the integration of temporal memory circuits for shepherding inter-layer activations. Using the MLPerf Tiny benchmark suite, we demonstrate how several architectural parameters can impact inference accuracy, that our proposed systolic array can provide 11 × better energy consumption with a 4 × improvement in latency compared to SNNs, and when equipped with temporal memories provides 3.5 × improvements in energy compared to the most aggressive 8-bit digital systolic arrays.
papers.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 使用受生物学启发的技术来规避大规模算术的需求。然而，SNN 的设计算法与 ANN 根本不同，后者受益于丰富的理论进步历史和日益成熟的软件堆栈。在本文中，我们探索了介于这两种方法之间的一种新技术的潜力，该技术可以利用人工神经网络的软件和系统级优化，同时利用受生物学启发的电路进行节能计算。由此产生的硬件将 ANN 的传统权重表示为延迟元件，将激活程度表示为数字信号的到达时间。在这些基本操作的基础上，我们可以通过多项创新来实现完整的人工神经网络：促进经典数据流的空间和时间重用，减少人工神经网络时间操作的内存系统需求；一种新的耐噪声时间求和运算；新颖的混合数字/时间记忆；以及用于管理层间激活的时间记忆电路的集成。使用 MLPerf Tiny 基准套件，我们演示了多个架构参数如何影响推理精度，与 SNN 相比，我们提出的脉动阵列可以提供 11 倍的能耗，同时延迟提高 4 倍，并且与最先进的 8 位数字脉动阵列相比，配备临时存储器时，能耗可提高 3.5 倍。

papers.title: Single-Address-Space FaaS with Jord.
papers.abstract: Function-as-a-Service (FaaS) has emerged as a popular cloud paradigm that simplifies software development and deployment by providing scalable and event-driven function execution without the burden of managing servers. FaaS was originally created with a function as a function semantics to enable standalone microservices with adequately short execution time to meet microsecond-scale service-level objectives (SLOs). Unfortunately, today’s FaaS systems fundamentally suffer from millisecond-level performance bottlenecks that arise from isolating functions in separate address spaces inside containers or microVMs. Prior work has focused on optimizing FaaS performance, but these systems still fall short of meeting microsecond-level SLOs. In this paper, we present Jord , a FaaS system that revives the original function-as-a-function vision of FaaS. Jord leverages hardware/software co-design to colocate functions in a single address space with user-level in-process memory isolation, extending the capability of traditional virtual memory. By performing memory isolation and management in nanoseconds, Jord enables zero-copy cross-function communication and scalable function dispatch, thereby minimizing FaaS overheads. We demonstrate that Jord can meet microsecond-level SLOs for microservice workloads while performing within 16% of an idealized but insecure baseline and delivering over 2 × higher throughput compared to enhanced state-of-the-art systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 功能即服务 (FaaS) 已成为一种流行的云范例，它通过提供可扩展和事件驱动的功能执行来简化软件开发和部署，而无需管理服务器的负担。 FaaS 最初是使用“函数即函数”语义创建的，旨在支持具有足够短执行时间的独立微服务，以满足微秒级服务级别目标 (SLO)。不幸的是，当今的 FaaS 系统从根本上受到毫秒级性能瓶颈的困扰，这些瓶颈是由于容器或微虚拟机内不同地址空间中的功能隔离而产生的。之前的工作重点是优化 FaaS 性能，但这些系统仍然无法满足微秒级的 SLO。在本文中，我们提出了 Jord，一个 FaaS 系统，它复兴了 FaaS 的原始功能即功能愿景。 Jord 利用硬件/软件协同设计将功能并置在单个地址空间中，并具有用户级进程内内存隔离，从而扩展了传统虚拟内存的功能。通过在纳秒内执行内存隔离和管理，Jord 实现了零拷贝跨功能通信和可扩展的功能调度，从而最大限度地减少了 FaaS 开销。我们证明，Jord 可以满足微服务工作负载的微秒级 SLO，同时性能在理想但不安全的基准的 16% 以内，并且与增强的最先进系统相比，吞吐量提高了 2 倍以上。

papers.title: SpecASan: Mitigating Transient Execution Attacks Using Speculative Address Sanitization.
papers.abstract: Transient execution attacks (TEAs), such as Spectre and Meltdown, exploit speculative execution to leak sensitive data through residual microarchitectural state. Traditional defenses often incur high performance and hardware costs by delaying speculative execution or requiring additional shadow structures and dynamic information flow tracking. In contrast, our approach models these attacks as violations of software-defined security contracts and enforces these contracts in hardware using existing features. We introduce Speculative Address Sanitization (SpecASan) , which leverages ARM’s Memory Tagging Extension (MTE) to extend memory safety protection from the committed path to the speculative path. When a speculative access does not pass the MTE tag comparison, this access is delayed until speculation resolves. This ensures that only validated accesses affect the microarchitectural state while preserving the performance benefits of speculation. When combined with Control-Flow Integrity (CFI) enforcement mechanisms, already supported by some hardware implementations, our evaluation shows that SpecASan effectively mitigates a broad class of transient execution attacks, including Spectre and Microarchitectural Data Sampling (MDS). Furthermore, SpecASan achieves this with low performance overhead and minimal hardware complexity, highlighting its practicality and efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 瞬态执行攻击 (TEA)，例如 Spectre 和 Meltdown，利用推测执行通过残余微架构状态泄露敏感数据。传统防御通常会因延迟推测执行或需要额外的影子结构和动态信息流跟踪而导致高性能和硬件成本高。相比之下，我们的方法将这些攻击建模为违反软件定义的安全合同，并使用现有功能在硬件中强制执行这些合同。我们引入了推测地址清理 (SpecASan)，它利用 ARM 的内存标记扩展 (MTE) 将内存安全保护从提交路径扩展到推测路径。当推测访问未通过 MTE 标签比较时，该访问将被延迟，直到推测解决。这确保只有经过验证的访问才会影响微架构状态，同时保留推测的性能优势。当与一些硬件实现已经支持的控制流完整性 (CFI) 执行机制相结合时，我们的评估表明 SpecASan 有效地缓解了广泛的瞬态执行攻击，包括 Spectre 和微架构数据采样 (MDS)。此外，SpecASan 以较低的性能开销和最小的硬件复杂性实现了这一点，凸显了其实用性和效率。

papers.title: SpecEE: Accelerating Large Language Model Inference with Speculative Early Exiting.
papers.abstract:
Early exiting has recently emerged as a promising technique for accelerating large language models (LLMs) by effectively reducing the hardware computation and memory access. In this paper, we identify that the LLM vocabulary serves as the runtime search space of the early exiting predictor and significantly influences the predictor workload ( e.g. , \(\sim 20\%\) overall inference latency with ∼ 3 × 10 4 vocabulary size in Llama2). We propose a novel paradigm using speculative models to reduce this search space, while addressing three critical challenges for further predictor optimization. (1) Time-consuming predictor with high computational complexity. Current predictor designs leverage basic models with high-dimensional input that ignore inherent data variation and GPU parallelization opportunities, resulting in \(\sim 15\%\) overall inference latency. (2) Under-utilization of layer-wise predictor deployment. Current early exiting systems treat the predictor in each layer equally without considering the activation frequencies of layer-wise predictors, leading to \(\sim 20\%\) inference overhead. (3) Exponential mapping complexity of predictor in speculative decoding. Each token in the token tree of speculative decoding is treated as an independent search space when applying the current early exiting mapping, leading to exponential mapping complexity and failing to incorporate the high-throughput benefits

To address the above challenges, we present SpecEE , a fast LLM inference engine with speculative early exiting. (1) At the algorithm level , we propose the speculation-based lightweight predictor design by exploiting the probabilistic correlation between the speculative tokens and the correct results and high parallelism of GPUs . (2) At the system level , we point out that not all layers need a predictor and design the two-level heuristic predictor scheduling engine based on skewed distribution and contextual similarity. (3) At the mapping level , we point out that different decoding methods share the same essential characteristics, and propose the context-aware merged mapping for predictor with efficient GPU implementations to support speculative decoding, and form a framework for various existing orthogonal acceleration techniques ( e.g. , quantization and sparse activation) on cloud and personal computer (PC) scenarios, successfully pushing the Pareto frontier of accuracy and speedup . It is worth noting that SpecEE can be applied to any LLM by negligible training overhead in advance without affecting the model’s original parameters. Extensive experiments show that SpecEE achieves 2.25 × and 2.43 × speedup with Llama2-7B on cloud and PC scenarios respectively. The code is open-sourced in https://github.com/infinigence/SpecEE
papers.abstract_zh:
早期退出最近成为一种有前景的技术，可以通过有效减少硬件计算和内存访问来加速大型语言模型（LLM）。在本文中，我们发现 LLM 词汇表充当早期现有预测器的运行时搜索空间，并显着影响预测器工作负载（例如，\(\sim 20\%\) 整体推理延迟，Llama2 中词汇量约为 3 × 10 4 ）。我们提出了一种新颖的范例，使用推测模型来减少搜索空间，同时解决进一步预测器优化的三个关键挑战。 (1)预测器耗时，计算复杂度高。当前的预测器设计利用具有高维输入的基本模型，忽略固有的数据变化和 GPU 并行化机会，导致整体推理延迟为\(\sim 15\%\)。 (2)分层预测器部署利用不足。当前的早期现有系统平等地对待每一层中的预测器，而不考虑逐层预测器的激活频率，导致\(\sim 20\%\)推理开销。 (3)推测解码中预测器的指数映射复杂度。在应用当前早期存在的映射时，推测解码的令牌树中的每个令牌都被视为独立的搜索空间，导致指数映射复杂性并且无法结合高吞吐量的优势

为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了 SpecEE，一种具有推测性早期退出功能的快速 LLM 推理引擎。 （1）在算法层面，我们通过利用推测令牌与正确结果之间的概率相关性以及GPU的高并行性，提出了基于推测的轻量级预测器设计。 (2)在系统层面，我们指出并非所有层都需要预测器，并设计了基于偏态分布和上下文相似性的两级启发式预测器调度引擎。 （3）在映射层面，我们指出不同的解码方法具有相同的基本特征，并提出了具有高效GPU实现的预测器的上下文感知合并映射以支持推测解码，并为云和个人计算机（PC）场景上的各种现有正交加速技术（例如量化和稀疏激活）形成了框架，成功地推动了准确性和加速的帕累托前沿。值得注意的是，SpecEE 可以通过预先的可忽略的训练开销应用于任何 LLM，而不影响模型的原始参数。大量实验表明，SpecEE 在云和 PC 场景下使用 Llama2-7B 分别实现了 2.25 倍和 2.43 倍的加速。代码开源于 https://github.com/infinigence/SpecEE

papers.title: SWIPER: Minimizing Fault-Tolerant Quantum Program Latency via Speculative Window Decoding.
papers.abstract: Real-time decoding is a key ingredient in future fault-tolerant quantum systems, yet many decoders are too slow to run in real time. Prior work has shown that parallel window decoding can scalably meet throughput requirements in the presence of increasing decoding times. However, windowed decoding require that some decoding tasks be delayed until others have completed, which can be problematic during time-sensitive operations such as T gate teleportation, leading to suboptimal program runtimes. To alleviate this, we introduce SWIPER, a speculative window decoder. Taking inspiration from branch prediction in classical computer architecture, SWIPER utilizes a light-weight speculation step to predict data dependencies between adjacent decoding windows, allowing multiple layers of decoding tasks to be resolved simultaneously. Through a state-of-the-art compilation pipeline and a detailed open-source simulator, we find that SWIPER reduces application runtimes by 40% on average compared to prior parallel window decoders.
papers.abstract_zh: 实时解码是未来容错量子系统的关键要素，但许多解码器速度太慢而无法实时运行。先前的工作表明，在解码时间增加的情况下，并行窗口解码可以扩展地满足吞吐量要求。然而，窗口解码要求某些解码任务延迟到其他解码任务完成为止，这在 T 门隐形传态等时间敏感操作期间可能会出现问题，导致程序运行时间不理想。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了 SWIPER，一种推测窗口解码器。 SWIPER 受到经典计算机架构中分支预测的启发，利用轻量级推测步骤来预测相邻解码窗口之间的数据依赖性，从而允许同时解决多层解码任务。通过最先进的编译管道和详细的开源模拟器，我们发现与之前的并行窗口解码器相比，SWIPER 平均减少了 40% 的应用程序运行时间。

papers.title: SwitchQNet: Optimizing Distributed Quantum Computing for Quantum Data Centers with Switch Networks.
papers.abstract: Distributed Quantum Computing (DQC) provides a scalable architecture by interconnecting multiple quantum processor units (QPUs). Among various DQC implementations, quantum data centers (QDCs) — where QPUs in different racks are connected through reconfigurable optical switch networks — are becoming feasible in the near term. However, the latency of cross-rack communications and dynamic switch reconfigurations poses unique challenges to communications in QDCs, significantly increasing the overall latency, thereby also reducing the overall fidelity. In this paper, we address these challenges by introducing a novel compiler that optimizes scheduling of communications across the program and network layers. Our evaluation shows that it reduces the overall latency by \({\color {black}8.02}\times\) over prior approaches with a small overhead and can be integrated with quantum error correction (QEC) to facilitate fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC). We have open-sourced our codes at https://zenodo.org/records/15377656.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式量子计算 (DQC) 通过互连多个量子处理器单元 (QPU) 提供可扩展的架构。在各种 DQC 实现中，量子数据中心 (QDC)（不同机架中的 QPU 通过可重新配置的光开关网络连接）在短期内变得可行。然而，跨机架通信和动态交换机重新配置的延迟给 QDC 中的通信带来了独特的挑战，显着增加了整体延迟，从而也降低了整体保真度。在本文中，我们通过引入一种新颖的编译器来解决这些挑战，该编译器可以优化程序和网络层之间的通信调度。我们的评估表明，与之前的方法相比，它以较小的开销减少了整体延迟 \({\color {black}8.02}\times\)，并且可以与量子纠错 (QEC) 集成以促进容错量子计算 (FTQC)。我们已在 https://zenodo.org/records/15377656 开源我们的代码。

papers.title: Synchronization for Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computers.
papers.abstract:
Quantum Error Correction (QEC) codes store information reliably in logical qubits by encoding them in a larger number of less reliable qubits. The surface code, known for its high resilience to physical errors, is a leading candidate for fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC). Logical qubits encoded with the surface code can be in different phases of their syndrome generation cycle, thereby introducing desynchronization in the system. This can occur due to the production of non-Clifford states, dropouts due to fabrication defects, and the use of other QEC codes with the surface code to reduce resource requirements. Logical operations require the syndrome generation cycles of the logical qubits involved to be synchronized. This requires the leading qubit to pause or slow down its cycle, allowing more errors to accumulate before the next cycle, thereby increasing the risk of uncorrectable errors.

To synchronize the syndrome generation cycles of logical qubits, we define three policies - Passive , Active , and Hybrid . The Passive policy is the baseline, and the simplest, wherein the leading logical qubits idle until they are synchronized with the remaining logical qubits. On the other hand, the Active policy aims to slow the leading logical qubits down gradually, by inserting short idle periods before multiple code cycles. This approach reduces the logical error rate (LER) by up to 2.4 × compared to the Passive policy. The Hybrid policy further reduces the LER by up to 3.4 × by reducing the synchronization slack and running a few additional rounds of error correction. Furthermore, the reduction in the logical error rate with the proposed synchronization policies enables a speedup in decoding latency of up to 2.2 × with a circuit-level noise model.
papers.abstract_zh:
量子纠错 (QEC) 代码通过将信息编码为大量不太可靠的量子位，将信息可靠地存储在逻辑量子位中。 Surface 代码以其对物理错误的高恢复能力而闻名，是容错量子计算 (FTQC) 的主要候选者。用表面代码编码的逻辑量子位可以处于其校正子生成周期的不同阶段，从而在系统中引入去同步。发生这种情况的原因可能是非 Clifford 状态的生成、由于制造缺陷而导致的丢失以及将其他 QEC 代码与表面代码一起使用以减少资源需求。逻辑运算要求所涉及的逻辑量子位的校正子生成周期同步。这需要领先的量子位暂停或减慢其周期，从而允许在下一个周期之前累积更多错误，从而增加不可纠正错误的风险。

为了同步逻辑量子位的综合症生成周期，我们定义了三种策略 - Passive 、 Active 和 Hybrid 。被动策略是基线，也是最简单的，其中领先的逻辑量子位空闲，直到它们与剩余的逻辑量子位同步。另一方面，主动策略旨在通过在多个代码周期之前插入短空闲期来逐渐减慢领先逻辑量子位的速度。与被动策略相比，这种方法将逻辑错误率 (LER) 降低了 2.4 倍。通过减少同步松弛并运行几轮额外的纠错，混合策略进一步将 LER 降低了 3.4 倍。此外，通过所提出的同步策略降低了逻辑错误率，使得电路级噪声模型的解码延迟速度提高了 2.2 倍。

papers.title: Telos: A Dataflow Accelerator for Sparse Triangular Solver of Partial Differential Equations.
papers.abstract:
Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) serve as the backbone of numerous scientific problems. Their solutions often rely on numerical methods, which transform these equations into large, sparse systems of linear equations. These systems, solved with iterative methods, exhibit structured sparsity patterns when derived from stencil-based numerical schemes. In preconditioned solvers, the sparse triangular solve procedure, SpTRSV, usually dominates the entire execution due to its loop-carried dependencies. Optimizing SpTRSV requires extracting parallelism from dependent computations. However, prior works have struggled to achieve both high parallelism and data locality, leading to suboptimal performance.

We propose Telos, a dataflow accelerator for SpTRSV that exploits structured sparsity patterns in PDE solving. The dataflow execution leverages stencil patterns, efficiently utilizing pipeline parallelism to resolve data dependencies with minimal overhead. We tackle the challenge of complex data dependencies by proposing a plane-parallel pipelining technique that maps computations onto processing elements (PEs) while preserving data locality. A cross-plane communication aggregation technique is developed to streamline data transfers into a systolic manner. Our accelerator features effective pipelining of dependent computations and overlapping of computations with memory accesses. Experiments demonstrate that Telos delivers average speedups of 61 ×, 8 ×, and 11 × over CPUs, GPUs, state-of-the-art accelerator, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
偏微分方程 (PDE) 是许多科学问题的支柱。他们的解决方案通常依赖于数值方法，将这些方程转化为大型、稀疏的线性方程组。这些系统通过迭代方法求解，在从基于模板的数值方案导出时表现出结构化稀疏模式。在预处理求解器中，稀疏三角求解过程 SpTRSV 由于其循环携带依赖性，通常主导整个执行过程。优化 SpTRSV 需要从相关计算中提取并行性。然而，之前的工作一直在努力实现高度并行性和数据局部性，从而导致性能不佳。

我们提出 Telos，它是 SpTRSV 的数据流加速器，它在偏微分方程求解中利用结构化稀疏模式。数据流执行利用模板模式，有效地利用管道并行性以最小的开销解决数据依赖性。我们通过提出一种平面并行流水线技术来应对复杂数据依赖性的挑战，该技术将计算映射到处理元素（PE），同时保留数据局部性。开发了跨平面通信聚合技术，以将数据传输简化为脉动方式。我们的加速器具有有效的相关计算流水线以及计算与内存访问的重叠。实验表明，与 CPU、GPU 和最先进的加速器相比，Telos 的平均加速分别为 61 倍、8 倍和 11 倍。

papers.title: The Sparsity-Aware LazyGPU Architecture.
papers.abstract:
General-Purpose Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) are essential accelerators in data-parallel applications, including machine learning, and physical simulations. Although GPUs utilize fast wavefront context switching to hide memory access latency, memory continues to be a significant bottleneck, limiting overall performance for many important workloads. Current GPU hardware enhancements focus on issuing memory requests in advance to help solve the memory bandwidth bottleneck and improve GPU performance. However, this approach can still be inefficient, leading to hardware contention and suboptimal resource utilization.

Instead of issuing memory requests in advance, we take an alternative view on improving GPU performance: lazily issuing memory requests to eliminate memory requests where either (a) the fetched values are zero or (b) they do not affect the result of the executing workload. Building on these insights, we propose LazyGPU, which integrates lazy execution cores with a Zero Cache to eliminate memory requests when all data required by a wavefront is zero. Moreover, LazyGPU utilizes instructions, including multiplication and multiply-add, to eliminate memory requests whose fetched values do not affect the outcomes of these instructions. For example, LazyGPU achieves a 2.18 × speedup compared with the baseline at 60% weight sparsity for the inference of LLaMA 7B.
papers.abstract_zh:
通用图形处理单元 (GPU) 是数据并行应用程序（包括机器学习和物理模拟）中必不可少的加速器。尽管 GPU 利用快速波前上下文切换来隐藏内存访问延迟，但内存仍然是一个重要的瓶颈，限制了许多重要工作负载的整体性能。当前GPU硬件增强主要集中在提前发出内存请求，以帮助解决内存带宽瓶颈并提高GPU性能。然而，这种方法仍然效率低下，导致硬件争用和资源利用率不佳。

我们没有提前发出内存请求，而是采取了另一种提高 GPU 性能的观点：延迟发出内存请求以消除内存请求，其中（a）获取的值为零或（b）它们不影响执行工作负载的结果。基于这些见解，我们提出了 LazyGPU，它将惰性执行核心与零缓存集成在一起，以在波前所需的所有数据为零时消除内存请求。此外，LazyGPU 利用指令（包括乘法和乘加）来消除其获取的值不会影响这些指令的结果的内存请求。例如，对于 LLaMA 7B 的推理，在权重稀疏度为 60% 的情况下，LazyGPU 与基线相比实现了 2.18 倍的加速。

papers.title: The XOR Cache: A Catalyst for Compression.
papers.abstract: Modern computing systems allocate significant amounts of resources for caching, especially for the last level cache (LLC). We observe that there is untapped potential for compression by leveraging redundancy due to private caching and inclusion that are common in today’s systems. We introduce the XOR Cache to exploit this redundancy via XOR compression. Unlike conventional cache architectures, XOR Cache stores bitwise XOR values of line pairs, halving the number of stored lines via a form of inter-line compression. When combined with other compression schemes, XOR Cache can further boost intra-line compression ratios by XORing lines of similar value, reducing the entropy of the data prior to compression. Evaluation results show that the XOR Cache can save LLC area by 1.93 × and power by 1.92 × at a cost of \(2.06\%\) performance overhead compared to a larger uncompressed cache, reducing energy-delay product by \(26.3\%\) .
papers.abstract_zh: 现代计算系统分配大量资源用于缓存，尤其是最后一级缓存 (LLC)。我们观察到，由于当今系统中常见的私有缓存和包含，通过利用冗余来进行压缩有尚未开发的潜力。我们引入 XOR 缓存，通过 XOR 压缩来利用这种冗余。与传统的缓存架构不同，XOR 缓存存储行对的按位 XOR 值，通过行间压缩的形式将存储的行数减半。当与其他压缩方案结合使用时，XOR Cache 可以通过对相似值的行进行异或来进一步提高行内压缩率，从而降低压缩前数据的熵。评估结果表明，与更大的未压缩缓存相比，XOR Cache 可以节省 1.93 倍的 LLC 面积和 1.92 倍的功耗，但代价是“2.06%”的性能开销，从而将能量延迟乘积减少“26.3%”。

papers.title: Topology-Aware Virtualization over Inter-Core Connected Neural Processing Units.
papers.abstract:
With the rapid development of artificial intelligence (AI) applications, an emerging class of AI accelerators, termed Inter-core Connected Neural Processing Units (NPU), has been adopted in both cloud and edge computing environments, like Graphcore IPU, Tenstorrent, etc. Despite their innovative design, these NPUs often demand substantial hardware resources, leading to suboptimal resource utilization due to the imbalance of hardware requirements across various tasks. To address this issue, prior research has explored virtualization techniques for monolithic NPUs, but has neglected inter-core connected NPUs with the hardware topology.

This paper introduces vNPU, the first comprehensive virtualization design for inter-core connected NPUs, integrating three novel techniques: (1) NPU route virtualization, which redirects instruction and data flow from virtual NPU cores to physical ones, creating a virtual topology; (2) NPU memory virtualization, designed to minimize translation stalls for SRAM-centric and NoC-equipped NPU cores, thereby maximizing the memory bandwidth; and (3) Best-effort topology mapping, which determines the optimal mapping from all candidate virtual topologies, balancing resource utilization with end-to-end performance. We have developed a prototype of vNPU on both an FPGA platform (Chipyard+FireSim) and a simulator (DCRA). Evaluation results demonstrate that when executing multiple NPU workloads on virtual NPUs, vNPU achieves performance improvements of up to 1.92x and 1.28x for the Transformer and ResNet models, respectively, in comparison to the MIG-based virtualization method. Furthermore, the hardware performance overhead associated with the virtualization itself is minimal, incurring less than 1% reduction in end-to-end performance.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着人工智能（AI）应用的快速发展，一类新兴的人工智能加速器，称为核间连接神经处理单元（NPU），已在云计算和边缘计算环境中得到采用，例如Graphcore IPU、Tenstorrent等。尽管这些NPU具有创新的设计，但通常需要大量的硬件资源，由于各种任务之间的硬件需求不平衡，导致资源利用率不高。为了解决这个问题，先前的研究探索了单片 NPU 的虚拟化技术，但忽略了具有硬件拓扑的核心间连接的 NPU。

本文介绍了vNPU，这是第一个针对核间连接的NPU的全面虚拟化设计，它集成了三种新技术：（1）NPU路由虚拟化，将指令和数据流从虚拟NPU核重定向到物理核，创建虚拟拓扑； (2) NPU内存虚拟化，旨在最大限度地减少以SRAM为中心和配备NoC的NPU内核的转换停顿，从而最大化内存带宽； (3)尽力而为的拓扑映射，它从所有候选虚拟拓扑中确定最佳映射，平衡资源利用率和端到端性能。我们在 FPGA 平台（Chipyard+FireSim）和模拟器（DCRA）上开发了 vNPU 原型。评估结果表明，当在虚拟 NPU 上执行多个 NPU 工作负载时，与基于 MIG 的虚拟化方法相比，vNPU 对 Transformer 和 ResNet 模型的性能分别提高了高达 1.92 倍和 1.28 倍。此外，与虚拟化本身相关的硬件性能开销很小，导致端到端性能下降不到 1%。

papers.title: TRACI: Network Acceleration of Input-Dynamic Communication for Large-Scale Deep Learning Recommendation Model.
papers.abstract:
Large-scale deep learning recommendation models (DLRMs) rely on embedding layers with terabyte-scale embedding tables, which present significant challenges to memory capacity. In addition, these embedding layers exhibit sparse and random data access patterns, which demand high memory bandwidth. Multi-GPU systems provide a promising solution, allowing for the scaling of both memory and aggregated bandwidth. However, network communication bandwidth becomes a bottleneck for multi-GPU DLRM systems. Overcoming the communication bottleneck is crucial to unlocking the potential of multi-GPU systems for efficient and high-performance DLRM training.

This paper introduces TRACI, an in-network acceleration architecture designed to optimize the communication operator in embedding layers: Aggregation. While in-network acceleration has proven successful for the All-Reduce communication collective, existing solutions do not directly apply to Aggregation due to two key challenges. Firstly, existing multi-GPU shared memory operations are designed for point-to-point communication and do not allow the network to proactively optimize communication. Secondly, in Aggregation, data transfer patterns are dynamic and dependent on input, demanding the network to dynamically discover and exploit message connections on-the-fly. To address these challenges, we propose a solution that involves a novel network transaction and switch hardware design. We introduce a new network transaction that augments messages with input reuse and output reuse identifications, and can empower the network to proactively reduce data transfers. Additionally, we present an in-switch cache and a reduction table structure, effectively harnessing input and output reuse opportunities. Using these innovations, TRACI achieves up to 4.04 × and an average of 3.12 × speedup to Aggregation for a 64-GPU system.
papers.abstract_zh:
大规模深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）依赖于具有 TB 级嵌入表的嵌入层，这对内存容量提出了重大挑战。此外，这些嵌入层表现出稀疏和随机的数据访问模式，这需要高内存带宽。多 GPU 系统提供了一个有前途的解决方案，允许扩展内存和聚合带宽。然而，网络通信带宽成为多GPU DLRM系统的瓶颈。克服通信瓶颈对于释放多 GPU 系统进行高效、高性能 DLRM 训练的潜力至关重要。

本文介绍了 TRACI，一种网内加速架构，旨在优化嵌入层中的通信运营商：聚合。虽然网络内加速已被证明对于 All-Reduce 通信集体来说是成功的，但由于两个关键挑战，现有解决方案并不直接适用于聚合。首先，现有的多GPU共享内存操作是为点对点通信而设计的，不允许网络主动优化通信。其次，在聚合中，数据传输模式是动态的并且依赖于输入，要求网络动态地发现和利用即时的消息连接。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种涉及新颖的网络事务和交换机硬件设计的解决方案。我们引入了一种新的网络事务，它通过输入重用和输出重用标识来增强消息，并且可以使网络主动减少数据传输。此外，我们还提供了交换机内缓存和缩减表结构，有效地利用了输入和输出重用机会。利用这些创新，TRACI 为 64-GPU 系统实现了高达 4.04 倍和平均 3.12 倍的聚合加速。

papers.title: Transitive Array: An Efficient GEMM Accelerator with Result Reuse.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) and Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized artificial intelligence, yet their deployment faces significant memory and computational challenges, especially in resource-constrained environments. Quantization techniques have mitigated some of these issues by reducing data precision, primarily focusing on General Matrix Multiplication (GEMM). This study introduces a novel sparsity paradigm, transitive sparsity , which leverages the reuse of previously computed results to substantially minimize computational overhead in GEMM operations. By representing transitive relations using a directed acyclic graph, we develop an efficient strategy for determining optimal execution orders, thereby overcoming inherent challenges related to execution dependencies and parallelism. Building on this foundation, we present the Transitive Array , a multiplication-free accelerator designed to exploit transitive sparsity in GEMM. Our architecture effectively balances computational workloads across multiple parallel lanes, ensuring high efficiency and optimal resource utilization. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that the Transitive Array achieves approximately 7.46 × and 3.97 × speedup and 2.31 × and 1.65 × energy reduction compared to state-of-the-art accelerators such as Olive and BitVert while maintaining comparable model accuracy on LLaMA models.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 和大型语言模型 (LLM) 彻底改变了人工智能，但它们的部署面临着巨大的内存和计算挑战，特别是在资源有限的环境中。量化技术通过降低数据精度来缓解其中一些问题，主要关注通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM)。本研究引入了一种新颖的稀疏性范式，即传递稀疏性，它利用先前计算结果的重用来大大减少 GEMM 操作中的计算开销。通过使用有向无环图表示传递关系，我们开发了一种有效的策略来确定最佳执行顺序，从而克服与执行依赖性和并行性相关的固有挑战。在此基础上，我们提出了传递数组，这是一种无乘法加速器，旨在利用 GEMM 中的传递稀疏性。我们的架构有效地平衡多个并行通道的计算工作负载，确保高效率和最佳的资源利用率。综合评估表明，与 Olive 和 BitVert 等最先进的加速器相比，传递阵列实现了约 7.46 倍和 3.97 倍的加速以及 2.31 倍和 1.65 倍的能耗降低，同时在 LLaMA 模型上保持了相当的模型精度。

papers.title: TrioSim: A Lightweight Simulator for Large-Scale DNN Workloads on Multi-GPU Systems.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have become increasingly capable of performing tasks ranging from image recognition to content generation. The training and inference of DNNs heavily rely on GPUs, as GPUs’ massively parallel architecture delivers extremely high computing capability. With the growing complexity of DNNs and the size of training datasets, training DNNs with a large number of GPUs is becoming a prevalent strategy. Researchers have been exploring how to design software and hardware systems for GPU farms to achieve the best utilization, efficiency, and DNN accuracy during training or inference. However, when designing and deploying such systems, designers usually rely on testing on physical hardware platforms equipped with many GPUs, incurring high costs that are almost prohibitive for system designers to test different configurations and designs, even for highly resourceful companies. While an alternative solution is to test on GPU simulators, they are often too slow for these large-scale systems and depend on profiling details collected from real distributed systems to initiate the simulation. To address these challenges, we present TrioSim, a novel lightweight simulator for DNNs on multi-GPU systems. TrioSim combines performance modeling techniques and simulation methods to achieve high flexibility, high simulation speed, and high accuracy. TrioSim minimizes the required input from users by only relying on operator-level execution traces collected on a single GPU and can simulate new software and hardware designs that involve multiple GPUs connected with complex, asymmetrical interconnects. Completing within seconds, TrioSim predicts the execution time of DNN training on multi-GPU systems with average errors of 2.91%, 4.54%, and 6.82% for data parallelism, tensor parallelism, and pipeline parallelism, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 执行从图像识别到内容生成等任务的能力越来越强。 DNN 的训练和推理严重依赖 GPU，GPU 的大规模并行架构提供了极高的计算能力。随着 DNN 的复杂性和训练数据集的规模不断增大，使用大量 GPU 训练 DNN 正在成为一种流行的策略。研究人员一直在探索如何为 GPU 群设计软硬件系统，以在训练或推理过程中实现最佳利用率、效率和 DNN 准确性。然而，在设计和部署此类系统时，设计人员通常依赖于配备许多 GPU 的物理硬件平台上的测试，这会产生高昂的成本，这使得系统设计人员几乎无法测试不同的配置和设计，即使对于资源丰富的公司也是如此。虽然替代解决方案是在 GPU 模拟器上进行测试，但它们对于这些大型系统来说通常太慢，并且依赖于从真实分布式系统收集的分析详细信息来启动模拟。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 TrioSim，这是一种用于多 GPU 系统上的 DNN 的新型轻量级模拟器。 TrioSim 结合了性能建模技术和仿真方法，实现了高灵活性、高仿真速度和高精度。 TrioSim 仅依靠在单个 GPU 上收集的操作员级执行跟踪来最大程度地减少用户所需的输入，并且可以模拟涉及通过复杂的非对称互连连接的多个 GPU 的新软件和硬件设计。 TrioSim 在数秒内完成预测多 GPU 系统上 DNN 训练的执行时间，数据并行性、张量并行性和管道并行性的平均误差分别为 2.91%、4.54% 和 6.82%。

papers.title: UGPU: Dynamically Constructing Unbalanced GPUs for Enhanced Resource Efficiency.
papers.abstract:
Different GPU generations have various numbers of SMs but still keep the balanced idea during the manufacture, i.e., the proportion of compute and memory resources within a single physical GPU is similar. Although GPU applications have different characteristics, it is still uncommon and uneconomic to build unbalanced physical GPUs for customers. With their powerful computational capabilities, GPUs are widely used in the cloud to accelerate diverse workloads from multiple users, creating opportunities to explore the unbalanced GPU concept in multitasking environments.

In this paper, we take the first step in exploring the feasibility and performance benefits of building unbalanced GPUs. Specifically, these unbalanced GPUs, referred to as GPU slices, are dynamically constructed with dedicated compute and memory resources from a single physical GPU to effectively address the diverse demands of co-executing applications, achieving high performance during the execution. However, there are two challenges that must to be solved. First, determining the size of unbalanced GPU slices during execution is challenging, as predicting GPU performance under varying resource allocations is inherently difficult. Second, reallocating memory resources after partitioning requires extensive data migration, with traditional methods leading to unacceptable performance degradation. To address the first challenge, UGPU employs a demand-aware resource partitioning algorithm that partitions resources dynamically without relying on a complex or inaccurate performance model. For the second challenge, UGPU introduces PageMove, a novel mechanism for efficient page migration between different memory dies within an HBM stack. Our key insight is that all memory channels already have physical connections to all through-silicon via (TSV) within a DRAM stack, while different bank groups can transfer data at the same time. PageMove slightly modifies DRAM architecture, uses a customized memory address mapping, designs a new parallel page migration mode (PPMM) and updates the virtual memory management scheme. By doing this, PageMove supports fast entire page migration from one memory die to another memory die which significantly reduces the data migration overhead during the memory resource reallocation. For the heterogeneous workloads with different characteristics, compared to the traditional balanced GPU design, UGPU increases the system performance by 34.3% on average while providing QoS support.
papers.abstract_zh:
不同代的GPU具有不同数量的SM，但在制造过程中仍然保持平衡的理念，即单个物理GPU内的计算和内存资源的比例相似。尽管GPU应用程序具有不同的特性，但为客户构建不平衡的物理GPU仍然不常见且不经济。凭借其强大的计算能力，GPU 被广泛应用于云端，以加速多个用户的不同工作负载，为探索多任务环境中的不平衡 GPU 概念创造了机会。

在本文中，我们迈出了探索构建不平衡 GPU 的可行性和性能优势的第一步。具体来说，这些不平衡的 GPU（称为 GPU 切片）是利用单个物理 GPU 的专用计算和内存资源动态构建的，可有效满足共同执行应用程序的不同需求，从而在执行过程中实现高性能。然而，有两个挑战必须解决。首先，确定执行期间不平衡 GPU 切片的大小具有挑战性，因为预测不同资源分配下的 GPU 性能本身就很困难。其次，分区后重新分配内存资源需要大量的数据迁移，传统方法会导致不可接受的性能下降。为了解决第一个挑战，UGPU 采用了需求感知的资源分区算法，该算法可以动态地分区资源，而不依赖于复杂或不准确的性能模型。针对第二个挑战，UGPU 引入了 PageMove，这是一种在 HBM 堆栈内的不同内存芯片之间进行高效页面迁移的新颖机制。我们的主要见解是，所有内存通道都已与 DRAM 堆栈中的所有硅通孔 (TSV) 建立物理连接，而不同的存储体组可以同时传输数据。 PageMove稍微修改了DRAM架构，使用定制的内存地址映射，设计了新的并行页面迁移模式（PPMM）并更新了虚拟内存管理方案。通过这样做，PageMove 支持从一个内存芯片到另一内存芯片的快速整个页面迁移，这显着减少了内存资源重新分配期间的数据迁移开销。针对不同特性的异构工作负载，相比传统的平衡GPU设计，UGPU在提供QoS支持的同时，系统性能平均提升34.3%。

papers.title: Unified Memory Protection with Multi-granular MAC and Integrity Tree for Heterogeneous Processors.
papers.abstract: Recent system-on-a-chip (SoC) architectures for edge systems incorporate a variety of processing units, such as CPUs, GPUs, and NPUs. Although hardware-based memory protection is crucial for the security of edge systems, conventional mechanisms experience a significant performance degradation in such heterogeneous SoCs due to the increased memory traffic with diverse access patterns from different processing units. To mitigate the overheads, recent studies, targeting a specific domain such as machine learning software or accelerator, proposed techniques based on custom granularities applicable either to counters or MACs, but not both. In response to this challenge, we propose a unified mechanism to support both multi-granular MACs and counters in a device-independent way. It supports a granularity-aware integrity tree to make it adaptable to various access patterns. The multi-granular tree architecture stores both coarse-grained and fine-grained counters at different levels in the tree. Combined with the multi-granularity technique for MACs. Our optimization technique, termed multi-granular MAC&tree , supports four different levels of granularity. Its dynamic detection mechanism can select the most appropriate granularity for different memory regions accessed by heterogeneous processing units. In addition, we combine the multi-granularity support with the prior subtree approaches to further reduce the overheads. Our simulation-based evaluation results show that the multi-granular MAC and tree reduce the execution time by 14.2% from the conventional fixed-granular MAC&tree. By combining prior sub-tree techniques, the multi-granular MAC and tree finally reduce the execution time by 21.1% compared to the conventional fixed-granular MAC&tree.
papers.abstract_zh: 最新的边缘系统片上系统 (SoC) 架构包含各种处理单元，例如 CPU、GPU 和 NPU。尽管基于硬件的内存保护对于边缘系统的安全至关重要，但由于不同处理单元的不同访问模式导致内存流量增加，传统机制在此类异构 SoC 中会出现显着的性能下降。为了减轻开销，最近的研究针对特定领域（例如机器学习软件或加速器）提出了基于自定义粒度的技术，该技术适用于计数器或 MAC，但不能同时适用于两者。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种统一的机制，以独立于设备的方式支持多粒度 MAC 和计数器。它支持粒度感知的完整性树，使其能够适应各种访问模式。多粒度树架构在树的不同级别存储粗粒度和细粒度计数器。与 MAC 的多粒度技术相结合。我们的优化技术称为多粒度 MAC&tree，支持四种不同的粒度级别。其动态检测机制可以针对异构处理单元访问的不同内存区域选择最合适的粒度。此外，我们将多粒度支持与先前的子树方法相结合，以进一步减少开销。我们基于仿真的评估结果表明，多粒度 MAC 和树比传统的固定粒度 MAC 和树减少了 14.2% 的执行时间。通过结合现有的子树技术，多粒度MAC和树最终比传统的固定粒度MAC和树减少了21.1%的执行时间。

papers.title: UPP: Universal Predicate Pushdown to Smart Storage.
papers.abstract:
In large-scale analytics, in-storage processing (ISP) can significantly boost query performance by letting ISP engines ( e.g. , FPGAs) pre-select only the relevant data before sending them to databases. This reduces the amount of not only data transfer between storage and host, but also database computation, facilitating faster query processing. However, existing ISP solutions cannot effectively support a wide range of modern analytical queries because they only support simple combinations of frequently used operators ( e.g. , = , < ), particularly on fixed-length columns. As modern databases allow filter predicates to include numerous operators/functions ( e.g. , dateadd ) compatible with diverse data formats (and their complex combinations), it becomes more challenging for existing approaches to accelerate such queries efficiently.

To address the limitations, we propose a new ISP approach, called Universal Predicate Pushdown (UPP), that can accelerate modern analytical databases, leveraging hardware/software co-design for a high level of flexibility. Our core insight is that instead of programming for individual filter operators/functions, we should devise a compact instruction set architecture (ISA) tailored explicitly for predicate pushdown. The software ( i.e. , database) layer recognizes and compiles various general filters (called a universal predicate ) to a set of UPP-compliant instructions, which are then processed efficiently by FPGA using bitwise comparisons, leveraging lightweight metadata. In our experiments with a 100 GB TPC-H dataset, UPP running on SmartSSD could speed up Spark’s end-to-end query performance by 1.2 × –7.9 × without changing input data formats.
papers.abstract_zh:
在大规模分析中，存储内处理 (ISP) 可以通过让 ISP 引擎（例如 FPGA）在将相关数据发送到数据库之前仅预先选择相关数据来显着提高查询性能。这不仅减少了存储和主机之间的数据传输量，还减少了数据库计算量，从而促进更快的查询处理。然而，现有的 ISP 解决方案无法有效支持广泛的现代分析查询，因为它们仅支持常用运算符的简单组合（例如， = 、 < ），特别是在固定长度列上。由于现代数据库允许过滤谓词包含与不同数据格式（及其复杂组合）兼容的大量运算符/函数（例如 dateadd ），因此现有方法有效加速此类查询变得更具挑战性。

为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新的 ISP 方法，称为通用谓词下推 (UPP)，它可以加速现代分析数据库，利用硬件/软件协同设计来实现高度灵活性。我们的核心见解是，我们不应该为单个过滤器运算符/函数进行编程，而应该设计一个专门为谓词下推定制的紧凑指令集架构（ISA）。软件（即数据库）层识别各种通用过滤器（称为通用谓词）并将其编译为一组符合 UPP 的指令，然后由 FPGA 使用按位比较、利用轻量级元数据进行高效处理。在我们使用 100 GB TPC-H 数据集进行的实验中，在 SmartSSD 上运行的 UPP 可以在不改变输入数据格式的情况下将 Spark 的端到端查询性能提高 1.2 × –7.9 ×。

papers.title: Variational Quantum Algorithms in the era of Early Fault Tolerance.
papers.abstract:
Quantum computing roadmaps predict the availability of 10,000-qubit devices within the next 3–5 years. With projected two-qubit error rates of 0.1%, these systems will enable certain operations under quantum error correction (QEC) using lightweight codes, offering significantly improved fidelities compared to the NISQ era.

However, the high qubit cost of QEC codes like the surface code (especially at near-threshold physical error rates) limits the error correction capabilities of these devices. In this emerging era of Early Fault Tolerance (EFT), it will be essential to use QEC resources efficiently and focus on applications that derive the greatest benefit.

In this work, we investigate the implementation of Variational Quantum Algorithms in the EFT regime (EFT-VQA). We explore the ideas of partial quantum error correction (pQEC), a strategy that error-corrects Clifford operations while performing R z ( θ ) rotations via magic state injection instead of the more expensive T-state distillation, and adapt it to VQAs. Our results show that pQEC can improve VQA fidelities by 9.27x over standard approaches. Furthermore, we propose architectural optimizations that reduce circuit latency by ∼ 2x, and achieve qubit packing efficiency of \(66\%\) in the EFT regime. The source code can be accessed here https://github.com/siddharthdangwal/EFT-VQA.
papers.abstract_zh:
量子计算路线图预测未来 3-5 年内将出现 10,000 个量子位的设备。预计两个量子位错误率为 0.1%，这些系统将使用轻量级代码在量子纠错 (QEC) 下实现某些操作，与 NISQ 时代相比，保真度显着提高。

然而，QEC 代码（例如表面代码）的高量子比特成本（尤其是在接近阈值的物理错误率下）限制了这些设备的纠错能力。在这个早期容错 (EFT) 的新兴时代，有效使用 QEC 资源并专注于获得最大收益的应用程序至关重要。

在这项工作中，我们研究了 EFT 机制 (EFT-VQA) 中变分量子算法的实现。我们探索了部分量子纠错 (pQEC) 的想法，这是一种在通过神奇状态注入而不是更昂贵的 T 状态蒸馏执行 R z ( θ ) 旋转时对 Clifford 运算进行纠错的策略，并将其适应 VQA。我们的结果表明，与标准方法相比，pQEC 可以将 VQA 保真度提高 9.27 倍。此外，我们提出了架构优化，可将电路延迟减少约 2 倍，并在 EFT 机制中实现 66% 的量子位打包效率。源代码可以在此处访问 https://github.com/siddharthdangwal/EFT-VQA。

papers.title: WarmCache: Exploiting STT-RAM Cache for Low-Power Intermittent Systems.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces WarmCache , an optimized STT-RAM cache design with relaxed non-volatility, for an energy harvesting system (EHS) to avoid such compulsory misses across power failure. The key insight is that if the retention time of a cache is longer than a power outage period, the cache contents can be preserved, thereby preventing compulsory misses. Based on this insight, WarmCache leverages a STT-RAM cache with reduced thermal stability to preserve non-volatility during power outages while not persisting any data. To mitigate retention failure that may occur in the relaxed STT-RAM cache, WarmCache lets its compiler partition program into a series of regions and conducts region-level error correction. At each region boundary, WarmCache verifies the execution of the region by scrubbing updated cache lines and re-executes it if any multi-bit error is detected therein. For optimization, WarmCache compiler introduces a novel region formation technique that adjusts the size of each region to match the scrubbing interval. This is achieved through region stitching for combining shorter regions and region splitting for dividing longer regions. Our experiments demonstrate that WarmCache manages to avoid compulsory cache misses and improves the performance by 1.3 ∼ 1.4x on average compared to the state-of-the-art cache design for EHS.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 WarmCache，这是一种优化的 STT-RAM 缓存设计，具有宽松的非易失性，适用于能量收集系统 (EHS)，以避免电源故障时出现此类强制丢失。关键在于，如果缓存的保留时间长于断电时间，则可以保留缓存内容，从而防止强制丢失。基于这一见解，WarmCache 利用热稳定性较低的 STT-RAM 缓存来在断电期间保持非易失性，同时不保留任何数据。为了减轻宽松的 STT-RAM 缓存中可能发生的保留故障，WarmCache 让其编译器将程序划分为一系列区域并进行区域级错误纠正。在每个区域边界，WarmCache 通过清理更新的缓存行来验证该区域的执行情况，如果在其中检测到任何多位错误，则重新执行它。为了优化，WarmCache 编译器引入了一种新颖的区域形成技术，该技术可以调整每个区域的大小以匹配清理间隔。这是通过用于组合较短区域的区域缝合和用于划分较长区域的区域分割来实现的。我们的实验表明，与 EHS 最先进的缓存设计相比，WarmCache 能够避免强制缓存未命中，并将性能平均提高 1.3 ∼ 1.4 倍。

papers.title: When Mitigations Backfire: Timing Channel Attacks and Defense for PRAC-Based RowHammer Mitigations.
papers.abstract:
Per Row Activation Counting (PRAC) has emerged as a robust framework for mitigating RowHammer (RH) vulnerabilities in modern DRAM systems. However, we uncover a critical vulnerability: a timing channel introduced by the Alert Back-Off (ABO) protocol and Refresh Management (RFM) commands. We present PRACLeak , a novel attack that exploits these timing differences to leak sensitive information, such as secret keys from vulnerable AES implementations, by monitoring memory access latencies.

To counter this, we propose Timing-Safe PRAC (TPRAC) , a defense that eliminates PRAC-induced timing channels without compromising RH mitigation efficacy. TPRAC uses Timing-Based RFMs , issued periodically and independent of memory activity. It requires only a single-entry in-DRAM mitigation queue per DRAM bank and is compatible with existing DRAM standards. Our evaluations demonstrate that TPRAC closes timing channels while incurring only 3.4% performance overhead at the RH threshold of 1024.
papers.abstract_zh:
每行激活计数 (PRAC) 已成为缓解现代 DRAM 系统中 RowHammer (RH) 漏洞的强大框架。然而，我们发现了一个严重漏洞：警报退避 (ABO) 协议和刷新管理 (RFM) 命令引入的计时通道。我们提出了 PRACLeak，这是一种新颖的攻击，它通过监控内存访问延迟，利用这些时间差异来泄露敏感信息，例如来自易受攻击的 AES 实现的密钥。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了时序安全 PRAC (TPRAC)，这是一种在不影响 RH 缓解功效的情况下消除 PRAC 引起的时序通道的防御措施。 TPRAC 使用基于定时的 RFM，定期发布且独立于内存活动。它仅需要每个 DRAM 组有一个单条目 DRAM 缓解队列，并且与现有 DRAM 标准兼容。我们的评估表明，TPRAC 关闭定时通道，同时在 RH 阈值 1024 时仅产生 3.4% 的性能开销。

papers.title: WindServe: Efficient Phase-Disaggregated LLM Serving with Stream-based Dynamic Scheduling.
papers.abstract:
Existing large language model (LLM) serving systems typically batch the compute-bound prefill and I/O-bound decoding phases together. This co-location approach not only leads to significant interference between the two phases but also limits resource allocation and placements. To address these limitations, recent work proposes disaggregating the prefill and decoding phases to enhance performance. However, these works often rely on coarse-grained static scheduling strategies, resulting in imbalanced and insufficient resource utilization. For instance, compute resources for the prefill phase may be overloaded while those for the decoding phase remain idle, resulting in performance bottlenecks.

In this paper, we propose WindServe , an efficient phase dis-aggregated LLM serving system that leverages stream-based, fine-grained dynamic scheduling to enhance resource utilization and performance. WindServe features a global scheduler that monitors compute and memory resource usage to dynamically orchestrate cross-phase jobs, effectively reducing queuing delay and KV cache swapping overhead. We also introduce a stall-free rescheduling strategy to saturate the memory resources while minimizing the scheduling overhead from KV cache transfers. Furthermore, we design a stream-based approach to mitigate interference between prefill and decoding jobs. Our evaluation demonstrates that WindServe achieves remarkable stability and SLO attainment under high-load scenarios, outperforming state-of-the-art phase-disaggregated LLM serving systems by delivering a 4.28 × improvement in TTFT median latency and a 1.5 × reduction in TPOT P99 latency.
papers.abstract_zh:
现有的大型语言模型 (LLM) 服务系统通常将计算密集型预填充和 I/O 密集型解码阶段一起批处理。这种共置方法不仅导致两个阶段之间存在显着干扰，而且限制了资源分配和放置。为了解决这些限制，最近的工作建议分解预填充和解码阶段以提高性能。然而，这些工作往往依赖于粗粒度的静态调度策略，导致资源利用率不平衡和不足。例如，预填充阶段的计算资源可能会过载，而解码阶段的计算资源则保持空闲，从而导致性能瓶颈。

在本文中，我们提出了 WindServe，这是一种高效的阶段分解 LLM 服务系统，它利用基于流的细粒度动态调度来提高资源利用率和性能。 WindServe 具有全局调度程序，可监控计算和内存资源使用情况，动态编排跨阶段作业，有效减少排队延迟和 KV 缓存交换开销。我们还引入了一种无停顿重新调度策略来饱和内存资源，同时最大限度地减少 KV 缓存传输的调度开销。此外，我们设计了一种基于流的方法来减轻预填充和解码作业之间的干扰。我们的评估表明，WindServe 在高负载场景下实现了显着的稳定性和 SLO 实现，通过将 TTFT 中值延迟提高 4.28 倍，将 TPOT P99 延迟降低 1.5 倍，优于最先进的阶段分解 LLM 服务系统。

papers.title: WSC-LLM: Efficient LLM Service and Architecture Co-exploration for Wafer-scale Chips.
papers.abstract:
The deployment of large language models (LLMs) imposes significant demands on computing, memory, and communication resources. Wafer-scale technology enables the high-density integration of multiple single-die chips with high-speed Die-to-Die (D2D) interconnections, presenting a promising solution to meet these demands arising from LLMs. However, given the limited wafer area, a trade-off needs to be made among computing, storage, and communication resources. Maximizing the benefits and minimizing the drawbacks of wafer-scale technology is crucial for enhancing the performance of LLM service systems, which poses challenges to both architecture and scheduling. Unfortunately, existing methods cannot effectively address these challenges.

To bridge the gap, we propose WSC-LLM, an architecture and scheduling co-exploration framework. We first define a highly configurable general hardware template designed to explore optimal architectural parameters for wafer-scale chips. Based on it, we capitalize on the high D2D bandwidth and fine-grained operation advantages inherent to wafer-scale chips to investigate optimal disaggregated scheduling strategies, effectively addressing the highly dynamic demands of LLM workloads. Compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) LLM service systems, WSC-LLM can achieve an average overall performance improvement of 3.12 × across various LLM models and datasets. Moreover, we leverage WSC-LLM to reveal intriguing insights about wafer-scale architecture design and the execution of LLM workloads.
papers.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 的部署对计算、内存和通信资源提出了很高的要求。晶圆级技术实现了多个单芯片芯片与高速芯片间 (D2D) 互连的高密度集成，为满足法学硕士提出的这些需求提供了一种有前途的解决方案。然而，考虑到晶圆面积有限，需要在计算、存储和通信资源之间进行权衡。最大化晶圆级技术的优势并最小化其缺陷对于提高LLM服务系统的性能至关重要，这对架构和调度都提出了挑战。不幸的是，现有方法无法有效应对这些挑战。

为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 WSC-LLM，一种架构和调度协同探索框架。我们首先定义一个高度可配置的通用硬件模板，旨在探索晶圆级芯片的最佳架构参数。在此基础上，我们利用晶圆级芯片固有的高D2D带宽和细粒度操作优势，研究最佳的分解调度策略，有效解决LLM工作负载的高度动态需求。与最先进（SOTA）的LLM服务系统相比，WSC-LLM在各种LLM模型和数据集上可以实现平均3.12倍的整体性能提升。此外，我们利用 WSC-LLM 揭示有关晶圆级架构设计和 LLM 工作负载执行的有趣见解。

papers.title: XHarvest: Rethinking High-Performance and Cost-Efficient SSD Architecture with CXL-Driven Harvesting.
papers.abstract: The occasional nature of I/O bursts in production clusters makes the substantial and expensive SSD internal hardware resources (e.g., computation and memory resources) always underutilized, resulting in cost inefficiency. Open-Channel SSD (OCSSD), as a pioneering solution, removes the SSD internal resources but rather leverages the host-side resources to serve I/O requests. Unfortunately, it faces adoption obstacles due to the heavy resource contention with user applications, hampered host-SSD collaboration, and proprietary firmware leakage risks. Tackling these challenges, we propose XHarvest, a new cost-efficient and high-performance SSD architecture, which harnesses compute express link (CXL) and trusted execution environment (TEE) to facilitate dynamic, efficient, and secure host resource harvesting. It reserves moderate SSD internal resources to isolate SSD internal tasks and applications under regular I/O loads while coping with occasional I/O bursts via dynamic host resource harvesting. To this end, XHarvest executes the firmware within the host-side TEE without disclosing sensitive algorithms while leveraging the cache-coherent and fine-grained CXL to build a unified and efficient metadata cache. XHarvest also capitalizes on the CXL and its security feature to enable secure and efficient host-SSD collaboration. The evaluation results show that XHarvest reduces the hardware cost by 31.50% while achieving the same or even higher performance than conventional SSDs. It relieves resource contention via dynamic harvesting, reducing 2.27 × execution time over OCSSD in memory-intensive tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 生产集群中 I/O 突发的偶然性使得大量且昂贵的 SSD 内部硬件资源（例如计算和内存资源）始终未得到充分利用，导致成本效率低下。开放通道 SSD (OCSSD) 作为一种开创性的解决方案，消除了 SSD 内部资源，而是利用主机端资源来满足 I/O 请求。不幸的是，由于与用户应用程序的严重资源争用、主机与 SSD 协作的阻碍以及专有固件泄漏风险，它面临着采用障碍。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 XHarvest，一种新的经济高效且高性能的 SSD 架构，它利用计算快速链路 (CXL) 和可信执行环境 (TEE) 来促进动态、高效和安全的主机资源收集。它保留适度的 SSD 内部资源，以在常规 I/O 负载下隔离 SSD 内部任务和应用程序，同时通过动态主机资源收集来应对偶尔的 I/O 突发。为此，XHarvest 在主机端 TEE 内执行固件，而不会泄露敏感算法，同时利用缓存一致性和细粒度的 CXL 来构建统一且高效的元数据缓存。 XHarvest 还利用 CXL 及其安全功能来实现安全高效的主机与 SSD 协作。评估结果显示，XHarvest在实现与传统SSD相同甚至更高的性能的同时，降低了31.50%的硬件成本。它通过动态收集缓解资源争用，在内存密集型任务中比 OCSSD 减少 2.27 倍的执行时间。

papers.title: Zettafly: A Network Topology with Flexible Non-blocking Regions for Large-scale AI and HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: Interconnection networks are playing an increasingly crucial role in achieving scalability and throughput for post-exascale and zettascale computing systems. Resource consumption characteristics of AI and HPC workloads are essential to designing effective network infrastructure. The operation practice of production supercomputing systems reveals that small and medium-sized jobs consume most compute-core hours, generating traffic that mainly utilizes a size-restricted portion of the network. Unfortunately, current topologies lack sufficient support for flexible partitioning of distinct concurrent jobs. This study bridges this gap by exploring a new tradeoff among scalability, throughput, and non-blocking regions. We present Zettafly, a family of low-diameter topologies with large-scale non-blocking sub-networks, allowing the majority of jobs to be isolated within a single sub-network. Zettafly is a two-layer structure, consisting of non-blocking groups and global routers, such that each minimally routed packet between groups traverses at most one global router. We also introduce simple and efficient adaptive routing algorithms for Zettafly. We conduct extensive simulations and analysis to evaluate the performance and cost of Zettafly against state-of-the-art topologies. The results show that Zettafly achieves great performance under typical HPC workloads, offers cost-effectiveness under multi-task mixed traffic, supports flexible configurations and incremental deployments, and is cost-effective to deploy for post-exascale and zettascale systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 互连网络在实现后百亿亿次和泽塔级计算系统的可扩展性和吞吐量方面发挥着越来越重要的作用。 AI 和 HPC 工作负载的资源消耗特征对于设计有效的网络基础设施至关重要。生产超级计算系统的运行实践表明，中小型作业消耗了大部分计算核心时间，产生的流量主要利用网络中大小受限的部分。不幸的是，当前的拓扑缺乏对不同并发作业的灵活分区的足够支持。本研究通过探索可扩展性、吞吐量和非阻塞区域之间的新权衡来弥补这一差距。我们推出了 Zettafly，这是一个具有大规模无阻塞子网络的低直径拓扑系列，允许将大多数作业隔离在单个子网络内。 Zettafly 是一种两层结构，由非阻塞组和全局路由器组成，使得组之间的每个最小路由数据包最多穿过一个全局路由器。我们还为 Zettafly 引入了简单高效的自适应路由算法。我们进行了广泛的模拟和分析，以根据最先进的拓扑来评估 Zettafly 的性能和成本。结果表明，Zettafly 在典型 HPC 工作负载下实现了出色的性能，在多任务混合流量下提供了成本效益，支持灵活配置和增量部署，并且对于后百亿亿次和 zettascale 系统的部署具有成本效益。
